title: DIRECCIÓ D'OPERACIONS- CATALUNYA- SALLAR
description:
DIRECCIÓ D'OPERACIONS

Posició de direcció d'operacions a Catalunya, de Fundació Sallar

A la Fundació Sallar treballem per transformar habitatges en llars dignes i accessibles, oferint a les famílies en situació de vulnerabilitat una nova oportunitat. El nostre propòsit és donar vida i llum a espais i comunitats degradades, garantint un habitatge que sigui més que un sostre: un punt de partida per a la dignitat, l’estabilitat i la transformació social.

El nom de la Fundació Sallar neix de la fusió de “Sa llar”, que evoca un espai acollidor i segur, i “sallar”, que suggereix la imatge d’una nau avançant amb agilitat i decisió, tallant l’aigua. Aquest simbolisme representa el nostre compromís d’actuar amb rapidesa per transformar habitatges en situació irregular en llars dignes, acompanyant a les persones i famílies cap a un futur estable.

Vols unir-te a nosaltres? Si la resposta és SÍ, aquest és el teu projecte!

El teu dia a dia consistirà en garantir el correcte funcionament operatiu de la Fundació Sallar, assegurant la gestió eficient, segura, territorial i de qualitat del parc d’habitatges; la coordinació d’obres i rehabilitacions; el desplegament territorial; la relació amb administracions; i l’execució dels projectes estratègics de creixement i innovació.

Alguns dels teus reptes seran els següents:


 * Gestió del parc d'habitatges
    * Coordinació amb la direcció tècnica de l'àrea social
    * Control de l'estat dels habitatges
    * Assegurar el manteniment preventiu, correctiu i urgent amb protocols d'actuació clars. Supervisar la getió d'incidències i temps de resposta
    * Coordinar rehabilitacions
    * Vetllar pels estàndards de dignitat, sostenibilitat i accessibilitat dels immobles

 * Obres, manteniment i rehabilitació
    * Coordinació amb la direcció d'obres
    * Direcció operativa de qualitat i logística
    * Coordinar l'execució d'obres de rehabilitació, adequació o nova implantació
    * Controlar pressupostos calendari certificacions i qualitat d'obra
    * Gestionar proveïdors i empreses d'inserció

 * Desplegament territorial i prospecció
    * Captació de nous habitatges, impulsar el creixement territorial ordenat i sostenible a cada territori.
    * Liderar prospecció de municipis, solars i noves oportunitats.
    * Elaborar informes tècnics i operatius de viabilitat.
    * Coordinar visites i diagnòstics territorials.
    * Fer seguiment d’acords i convenis amb ajuntaments
    * Elaborar informes operatius i tècnics de viabilitat o adequació per a noves incorporacions.

 * Execució de projectes estratègics
    * Impulsar les adquisicions via tanteig i retracte.
    * Pilotar la implementació de promocions modulars i projectes innovadors.
    * Impulsar rehabilitacions integrals i promocions socials noves.
    * Assegurar el desplegament operatiu de projectes de creixement.

 * Relacions institucionals operatives
    * Representar Sallar davant ajuntaments, serveis socials i entitats col·laboradores.
    * Garantir comunicació clara, rigorosa i orientada a resultats.
    * Elaborar informes tècnics i operatius per reunions i convenis.
    * Acompanyar Gerència/Direccions en reunions estratègiques i operatives

 * Gestió econòmica i control pressupostari
    * Coordinació amb el cap d’administració.
    * Seguiment dels costos operatius: manteniment, obres, subministraments.
    * Validació de pressupostos i factures del seu àmbit.
    * Seguiment i report de desviacions pressupostàries.
      

Quins requisits has de complir?


 * Formació universitària, preferentment en àmbits relacionas amb la direcció i gestió d'entitats, gestió de polítiques públiques, enginyeria, arquitectura tècnica, urbanisme, tercer sector o ciències socials.
 * Experiència mínima de 5 anys en direcció o coordinació de programes i serveis, experiència en lideratge i organització d'equips
 * Mínim disposar d'experiència de 3 anys en tasques de direcció operativa, preferentment dins el sector de l'habitatge
 * Indispensable demostrar trajectòria provada en gestió operativa d'entitats o projectes del sector social, habitatge o serveis públics.
 * Valorable tenir coneixements de la legislació vigent relacionada amb habitatge i tercer sector
 * Valorable coneixements control de costos, obres, manteniment i rehabilitació d'immobles
 * Domini d'Office 365 i eines de gestió ERP/CRM
 * Valorable disposar de coneixements relacionat amb eines d'intel·ligència artificial
 * Disposar de carnet de conduir i vehicle propi (per mobilitat de territori)
   
   

Competències:


 * Autoconeixement
 * Empatia
 * Habilitat de comunicació
 * Motivació
 * Cohesió d'equips
 * Presa de decisions
 * Anticipació
 * Organització
   
   

Que t’ oferim? 1 vacant estable al 100% de la jornada

Horari : de dilluns a divendres de matins i una tarda.

Incorporació: Immediata

title: Director Of Administration
description:
Job Title

Director of the Administration Department

Ref.

:

UfM/FT/*******

Reports To

Deputy Secretary General - Administration

Division /Department

Administration Department- Finance, Corporate and Support Services (CSS), Contracts and Procurement, IT

Staff Category And Conditions

Contracted Staff as per Staff Regulations and Implementing Rules

Post Classification

CS1.2, Step 1

Gross Salary

87,040 Euros

The UfM Secretariat is seeking to incorporate a Director of Administration for its headquarters in Barcelona.

Below is the job description, detailing the responsibilities and required skills and qualifications.

Summary

The Director of Administration is responsible for the overall leadership and effective performance of the Administration Department, in accordance with Section IX of the Statutes of the Secretariat.

The role ensures that the organization's accounting systems, financial and procurement processes, and reporting mechanisms meet the highest standards of accuracy, compliance, and transparency, applying deep technical and procedural expertise in line with institutional regulations and delegated authorities.

The Director provides strategic leadership to the department's core functions—Finance, Central Support Services (CSS), Contracts and Procurement, and Information Technology—ensuring that each team delivers professional, efficient, and mission-aligned support services across the UfM.

The Director of Administration reports directly to the Deputy Secretary general of Administration and is a member of the UfM Management Committee.

Primary Responsibilities

Lead the development, implementation and monitoring of comprehensive financial strategies, policies and procedures in line with organizational goals, EU financial regulations, international accounting standards (e.g., IPSAS) and donor requirements.

Oversee all financial operations, including budgeting, forecasting, financial reporting, accounting, treasury management, payroll and procurement.

Provide strategic financial analysis and advice to support informed decision-making and resource allocation.

Define the department's work programme in collaboration with the various Units, ensuring alignment with the UfM strategy.

Ensure the department has the appropriate resources and people to implement its activities and achieve organizational goals.

Oversee the organization's financial management, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and integrity in all accounting operations in accordance with applicable regulations and internal governance frameworks.

Ensure the implementation of agile processes and digital tools within the department, fostering a culture of continuous improvement to effectively support the organization's activities.

Drive continuous improvement of financial workflows, procedures, and systems to maintain operational excellence; act as the Accounting Officer.

Ensure that the IT infrastructure and up-to-date technology meet the organization's needs, and that the ICT operations activities (maintenance of information systems, management of the infrastructure, helpdesk coordination, security coordination) are implemented.

Ensure that the CSS Unit provides agile support to all departments and divisions in logistics, event coordination, mission management, and facility operations, ensuring a functional and safe workplace.

Report regularly to the Secretary General, including on the implementation status of ongoing projects.

Actively participate in the Management Committee and provide all required information and input.

Carry out any other duties assigned by the Deputy Secretary General, including representing them in meetings and conferences, preparing notes, talking points, or speeches, and any other tasks within the scope of your competencies.

Ensure performance management of teams (Finance, CSS, Contracts and Procurement, IT), setting objectives for direct reports and evaluating their contributions to departmental goals.

Motivate and support team development by promoting training and professional growth opportunities within the organization.

Act as a driver of change within the organization.

Qualifications, Skills And Relevant Experience

Academic Background

Master's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Accounting, Economics or any related fields.

Professional accounting qualification (e.g., ACCA, CIMA, CPA, Certified Public Accountant) is highly desirable.

Professional Requirements

Minimum of 10 years of professional experience, of which at least 8 years in management roles relevant to the duties described above.

Management: Demonstrated experience in managing administrative services, including budget responsibility, with a strong grasp of institutional governance and internal control frameworks, in managing complex budgets and financial reporting for institutional donors.

Experience with audit management and risk assessment.

Accounting Expertise: Proven in-depth technical knowledge of accounting principles and procedures (e.g., Generally Accepted Accounting Principles), including oversight of accounting systems, validation of financial processes, accounting policies and preparation of financial statements, ensuring compliance with applicable accounting standards and institutional rules.

Communication & Institutional Representation: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to represent the organisation at senior levels, engage effectively with institutional stakeholders, and promote a culture of accountability and service excellence.

Analytical & Decision-Making Skills: Strong ability to assess complex financial data, exercise sound judgment, support high-quality financial reporting and decision-making.

Institutional & EU Financial Knowledge (Highly desirable): Experience working in EU institutions or Agencies, with familiarity in EU financial systems, programme structures, and financial management standards.

Leadership and people management skills: ability to give directions, take decisions, manage and motivate people effectively

Planning and organizational skills.

Service-oriented and results-driven attitude.

High level of both resilience and confidentiality.

Additional Desirable Experience And Competencies

Knowledge and/or work experience in Mediterranean countries is an advantage.

Languages Skills Requirements

Minimum Requirements: Excellent knowledge of English in speaking and writing and another UfM Language (French, Spanish or Arabic).

Desirable: the knowledge of other Euro-Mediterranean languages would be an asset.


 * Submission of applications
   
   

To apply, you need to complete the application form on the website and include the following information and documents:

A detailed curriculum vitae in English (pdf version only) clearly elaborating educational and professional experience relevant for the position.

Please note it is mandatory to choose a file name that includes your name i.e. \"Name Surname–CV\".

A motivation letter in English (pdf version only) including a clear mention of the profile applied for and full postal address.

Please note it is mandatory to choose a file name that includes your name i.e. \"Name Surname–cover letter\".

Please, do not send any supporting documents (i.e.: copies of ID-card, educational certificates, evidence of previous professional experience etc.) with the application at this stage.


 * Selection Process
   
   

Complete applications are assessed based on relevant experience, educational background, and required skills.

Eligible candidates will undergo a selection process that includes a competency-based interview and may also involve technical tests.


 * Conditions
   
   

Based on candidates ´ qualifications and experiences, the UfM Secretariat reserves the right to appoint the selected candidate at a lower grade and/or step than the ones advertised in the above call for candidatures.

Protection of personal data - Privacy notice

The UfMS, as the body responsible for organizing the selection process, will ensure that Candidates' personal data are processed with greatest care and confidentiality.

This applies in particular to the security of such data.

Personal data shall be processed solely for the purpose of the selection procedure.

Candidates are free to give their data on voluntary basis, although failure to respond with any further information requested will exclude the concerned candidate automatically from the recruitment procedure.

Thus, Candidates give an explicit consent by submitting their candidatures for their processing, which constitutes a complimentary ground for lawfulness of data processing, notably with regard to sensitive data.

Should any Candidate have any query concerning the processing of her/his personal data, she/he shall address it to the following address: ******.

Tips: Provide a summary of the role, what success in the position looks like, and how this role fits into the organization overall.

title: Director/a de Formación Corporativa (H/M/X)
description:
Desde Manpower Business Professional nos encontramos en la búsqueda de un/a Director/a de Formación Corporativa (H/M/X) para uno de nuestros clientes especializados en formación profesional para empresas.




La misión del puesto consiste en diseñar, coordinar y supervisar programas y servicios de formación dirigidos a empresas, asegurando que los productos respondan a las necesidades estratégicas de los clientes y contribuyan al desarrollo del talento y mejora de la competitividad empresarial.




Principales tareas y responsabilidades:

 * Planificar estrategias de servicios, alineados con los objetivos de negocio.
 * Identificar clientes potenciales y realizar actividad comercial para su captación.
 * Supervisar al equipo productivo para asegurar el crecimiento del negocio y garantizar la calidad de servicio.
 * Diseñar y gestionar presupuestos de carácter estratégico.
 * Supervisar los recursos humanos y materiales asignados para garantizar la rentabilidad del negocio.
 * Mantener relaciones con entidades colaboradoras y proveedores.
 * Asegurar el cumplimiento normativo.
 * Evaluar el impacto de la formación mediante KPIs y feedback de clientes.

 * Formación complementaria en gestión de proyectos (valorable).

 * Experiencia en trato con clientes empresariales y gestión de equipos
 * Diseño instruccional y metodologías de aprendizaje.
 * Legislación aplicable en materia de formación para el empleo




Ofrecemos:

• Incorporación a una empresa consolidada y referente en su sector

• Proyecto estable con recorrido y desarrollo profesional

• Formación en productos y soluciones de la compañía

• Salario fijo + variable

title: New Business Manager (Freelance Remoto)
description:
En FlowFlamingo, agencia de influencer marketing y creación de contenido, ayudamos a marcas a crecer a través de estrategias con influencers, UGC y funnels de ventas.


Buscamos un/a New Business Manager freelance que resida en España o Europa, y que tenga disponibilidad para trabajar en horario europeo (GMT o CET). Su misión será atraer nuevas marcas interesadas en nuestros servicios, gestionando el proceso comercial desde la prospección hasta el cierre.


Si te apasiona el mundo del marketing digital, disfrutas hablando con marcas y tienes mentalidad proactiva y comercial, queremos conocerte.


Tareas


-Prospectar marcas potenciales alineadas con los servicios de FlowFlamingo (influencer marketing, UGC, funnels de ventas, paid media).


-Contactar a empresas por email, LinkedIn o teléfono para presentar la agencia.


-Realizar videollamadas de presentación, entender necesidades y ofrecer soluciones personalizadas.


-Gestionar y hacer seguimiento de leads en el CRM.


-Colaborar con el equipo de marketing para optimizar mensajes, estrategias de prospección y presentaciones.


-Negociar y cerrar acuerdos comerciales con marcas.


-Reportar avances y resultados de forma semanal.


Requisitos


-Experiencia previa en ventas B2B, agencias de marketing o empresas SaaS (al menos 2 años).


-Residencia en España o Europa, o disponibilidad para trabajar en horario europeo (GMT o CET) — requisito imprescindible para coordinar llamadas y reuniones con clientes potenciales.


-La colaboración se realiza en modalidad freelance/autónomo, requisito indispensable.


-Excelentes habilidades de comunicación y negociación.


-Proactividad, autonomía y orientación a resultados.


-Capacidad para mantener conversaciones fluidas con decisores de marketing y dirección.


-Manejo de herramientas como CRM, LinkedIn y correo profesional.


-Nivel alto de inglés, valorable pero no imprescindible


-Experiencia utilizando herramientas CRM (HubSpot, Apollo o similares)


Beneficios


-Colaboración freelance 100% remota, con flexibilidad total de horarios dentro del marco europeo (GMT o CET).


-Formar parte de una agencia internacional en crecimiento, con proyectos innovadores en influencer marketing, UGC y funnels de ventas.


-Fijo mensual más bonus por objetivos, con posibilidad de aumentar la retribución según rendimiento.


-Aprendizaje continuo en estrategias de marketing digital, ventas B2B y herramientas CRM.


-Entorno dinámico, joven y colaborativo, donde se valora la iniciativa y las ideas propias.


-Oportunidad de colaboración a largo plazo si el desempeño es excelente.


Si cumples con los requisitos y te motiva la idea de hacer crecer una agencia de marketing internacional, envíanos tu candidatura.


Buscamos a alguien con iniciativa, actitud comercial y ganas de generar impacto real.

title: Regional Head of Talent Management and Development
description:
GENERAL DESCRIPTION:

Zurich Santander will hire a Regional Head of Talent Management and Development, to join our regional team, reporting directly to our Chief People Officer, who is member of the executive committee of the company and based in Madrid.

This position will be based in Madrid, with a hybrid working scheme.

This is an extraordinary opportunity to join a very profitable and fast growing company, in a specific segment of the financial services industry (bank assurance) with a huge business potential for the upcoming years.




Purpose:

Creates and defines a broad organizational vision, strategy and governance on talent to enable the overall HR and business strategy

Acts as a trusted advisor to HR Business Partners and Managers in addressing talent acquisition strategies and challenges. Serves as a subject matter expert with regards to talent attraction, sourcing and engagement strategies and leads initiatives aligned to connecting talents to open positions.

Manages and(or) implements regional or local learning solutions for technical, leadership, management or professional development, to enable the overall HR and business strategy. Continuously innovates to meet the business needs around upskilling and reskilling of the respective employee group.

Delivers and shapes Talent Management activities and outcomes to ensure implementation and application of the talent management framework and practices to enable the overall talent and business strategy.




MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES:

Our Regional Head of Talent Management and Development will be responsible within our whole business (Spain, Brazil, Mexico, Chile, Argentina and Uruguay)

Responsible for leading the Regional Talent strategy and implementation, initiates and executes strategic programs to meet the needs of our people, business partners and customers. Ensures appropriate governance and controls are in operation on global processes. Provides consultative services to identify, design and develop targeted solutions and initiatives to meet business goals and objectives. Establishes regional or country talent learning agenda so that there is appropriate balance and complementarity between central and regional/local initiatives. Manages budget ensuring that resources are allocated and spent efficiently to meet objectives of the function. Ensures stakeholder management and internal communication with the key functions and ensures interaction and alignment with the Group's leadership.

Leads processes and has strategic oversight for team of recruiters and achievement of both service levels and performance levels across all aspects of talent acquisition delivery. Partners with HR Business Partners and their leadership to review their staffing plans and forecast future hiring needs, aligning hiring strategy to talent sourcing and pipeline planning as well as ensuring appropriate talent acquisition resourcing and job marketing levers to meet these needs. Monitors and analyses of market trends and data that impact labor supply and demand and advise HR Business Partners and managers of opportunities to shift sourcing strategies to optimize talent acquisition outcomes.

Ensures best in class learning programs and initiatives offered to our employees in close collaboration with the business, regions, countries and external learning partners. Leads self and may lead a team to deliver outstanding learning solutions. Selection and appointment of best in class global, regional or local external learning partners to add external best practices to the internal ones. Creates and manages the evaluation approach to measure and improve the effectiveness and business impact of the offered learning solutions

Ensures talent management activities (assessment, coaching, feedback, succession planning, talent reviews, etc..) are planned and completed in close collaboration with the business, regions and countries. Partners with HR Business Partners in the identification and tracking of acceleration talent, as well as talent pools in our core capability areas. Collaborates with Talent Management Community of Practice, functional or business and talent management teams as well as external partners to combine internal with external best practices. Leverages assessment certification and experience to deliver feedback results to senior executives and Acceleration talent. Participates in global talent management systems implementation or change activities and initiatives. Leads design and development of regional or local initiatives. Uses data insights to inform evolution of talent strategy and influencing business change




Performance Management Accountabilities:

 * Demonstrate commitment to corporate values.
 * Take accountability for participating in the performance management cycle.
 * Take action to improve performance on the job.
 * Assist and support co-workers.
 * Take action to manage own personal development

Functional Skills:

 * Candidate Screening
 * Compensation Management
 * Diversity & Inclusion

title: EU Operations Director
location: El Prat de Llobregat, Catalonia, Spain
description:
Revelyst – Adventure Sports Group Europe is a fast-growing international organization operating in dynamic, highly seasonal industries such as sports, apparel and performance gear. We are looking for a strategic, analytical and transformational EU Operations Director to lead end-to-end operational performance across Europe.




This is a high-impact leadership role responsible for managing the full product flow across EMEA — from vendor pickup to final customer delivery — ensuring service excellence, cost control and continuous improvement across all logistics processes.

If you combine strong operational expertise with transformation experience and multi-country leadership, this opportunity is for you.

The main tasks of the position are:

The EU Operations Director will lead all European logistics operations (NL, UK, FR), managing inbound transportation, customs, 3PL performance, outbound distribution and reverse logistics.




Operational Leadership

• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations across Europe, ensuring timely and accurate execution

• Drive the commercial and operational relationship with EMEA 3PL partners, including contract negotiations and performance management

• Lead inbound flows, customs clearance, warehouse operations, outbound transportation and returns

• Coordinate closely with US Global Planning on demand signals, inventory strategy and S&OP inputs

• Monitor service levels and lead resolution of complex operational issues

• Ensure alignment with global sourcing strategies and operational standards.




Cost Management & Optimization

• Own operational cost control and transparency across all EU flows

• Identify and execute cost optimization initiatives in partnership with Global Logistics leadership

• Analyze operational performance data to uncover efficiencies and structural improvements

• Support carrier strategy and network optimization decisions.




Project Ownership & Transformation

• Act as project owner for major transformation initiatives (e.g., WMS implementation, operating model evolution)

• Lead cross-functional project governance with Supply Chain, IT, 3PL and Global stakeholders

• Conduct feasibility analyses for new warehouse models (e.g., bonded warehouse, network redesign)

• Reassess ongoing operational structures to ensure scalability and long-term efficiency.




Team Leadership

• Lead and develop a cross-country operations team (6 FTE) across NL, UK and FR

• Foster a culture of accountability, continuous improvement and operational excellence

• Build strong collaboration between regional teams and global stakeholders




Position requirements:




Qualifications:

• Engineering degree (Industrial, Process or similar) or equivalent operational background

• At least 10 years of experience leading logistics transformation in fast-moving, seasonal industries (fashion, apparel, sportswear, footwear, outdoor)

• Proven experience managing multi-site 3PL operations across different countries

• Strong experience in cost control, budgeting and carrier strategy

• High analytical capability with advanced Excel & PowerPoint skills

• Experience with WMS implementation or optimization projects

• Fluent English required (Dutch or Spanish is a plus).




Competences:

• Strategic thinker with strong operational execution mindset

• Proven leadership and people development capabilities

• Strong negotiation and stakeholder management skills

• Data-driven decision maker

• Project management expertise with hands-on approach

• High accountability and results orientation

• Ability to operate in complex, international environments.




📩 Ready to lead European operations at scale? Apply now and become part of our European leadership team.

title: Director Comercial (Canal Farmacia)
description:
Director Comercial – Canal Farmacia

Ubicación: Madrid / Barcelona (con posibilidad de gestión de otras zonas: Levante)

Sector: Parafarmacia, Cosmética y Salud




Buscamos un/a Director Comercial para el canal farmacia con enfoque multicanal, capaz de liderar el crecimiento de nuestras marcas en el mercado nacional. La persona seleccionada definirá e implementará la estrategia comercial, desarrollará relaciones sólidas con clientes y centrales de compras, y asegurará la optimización del PVP en farmacias, integrando un modelo innovador de venta directa y multicanal (farmacia, e-commerce, cadenas de tiendas y marketplaces).




Responsabilidades:

 * Definir e implementar la estrategia comercial nacional en el canal farmacia y multicanal.
 * Coordinar y optimizar la red de distribuidores existentes, planificando su transición a un modelo de venta directa donde sea necesario.
 * Identificar oportunidades de crecimiento y expansión de las marcas en farmacias y otros canales de venta.
 * Elaborar y controlar presupuesto comercial, forecast y objetivos de ventas.
 * Diseñar e implementar planes de trade marketing y activaciones en el punto de venta.
 * Analizar KPIs comerciales, incluyendo sell-in, sell-out, rotación, cobertura y rentabilidad.
 * Colaborar estrechamente con marketing, operaciones y regulatory para alinear estrategias comerciales.
 * Representar a la compañía en ferias, congresos y eventos del sector farmacéutico y de consumo.




Perfil requerido:

Formación:

 * Licenciatura o Grado en ADE, Marketing, Ciencias de la Salud o similar.
 * Valorable Máster en Dirección Comercial o Marketing Farmacéutico.

Experiencia:

 * Mínimo 5 años en ventas canal farmacia, preferiblemente en entornos multicanal.
 * Experiencia demostrable como KAM, National Sales Manager o Responsable Comercial.
 * Conocimiento profundo del ecosistema farmacéutico español: grupos, centrales de compras y modelos sell-in / sell-out.
 * Valorable experiencia en parafarmacia, OTC, cosmética o productos de cuidado personal no prescripción.




Competencias clave:

 * Liderazgo y capacidad de gestión de equipos y redes de distribuidores.
 * Alta capacidad de negociación y orientación a resultados.
 * Mentalidad estratégica, analítica y de planificación.
 * Excelentes habilidades de comunicación y presentación.
 * Capacidad de autonomía, integración con la compañía y visión de negocio multicanal.
 * Dinamismo y manejo de nuevas tecnologías y CRMs.

title: Finance Manager
location: Alcalá de Henares, Community of Madrid, Spain
description:
Founded in1985, Haulotte is a French group with over a century of expertise, designing,assembling, and marketing aerial work platforms. As an international mid-capcompany, Haulotte operates in 21 countries and generates over 80% of its salesinternationally. Thanks to reliable and high-quality products, Haulotte standsout as a provider of safe lifting solutions, offering a unique and valuableuser experience.

The Role

Join ahigh-powered structure. Positioned as one of the leaders on a European scale,our Spanish subsidiary currently generates a turnover of €50 million.Recognized in the market for its solidity and unwavering commitment to itsclients, it offers an environment where performance rhymes with excellence.

Reportingto the Subsidiary General Management, you will act as a true "BusinessPartner" for the entity. You will supervise all functions related to accounting,controlling, treasury, tax, and reporting, ensuring compliance withQ/C/D/HR/S/E objectives (Quality, Cost, Delivery, HR, Safety, Environment) andthe company's values.

MainMissions And Responsibilities

Accountingand Tax


 * Produce and validate the entity's financial statements in accordance with local legal requirements.
 * Ensure compliance with local and international accounting standards (IFRS) and substantiate accounts to legal authorities.
 * Prepare tax declarations in compliance with current regulations.
 * Collaborate with the legal department to prepare legal and financial documents (management reports, general assemblies).
   
   

Controlling and Reporting


 * Develop and present monthly reporting to the Group, providing relevant analyses on financial performance.
 * Build the budget and reforecasts for the entity in alignment with the strategic guidelines of the Zone and the Group.
 * Analyze monthly results, identify variances, and propose corrective actions to achieve budget objectives.
   
   

Treasury and Internal Control


 * Manage the entity's cash flow plans.
 * Monitor customer risk and apply the "Credit Management" policy established by the Group.
 * Ensure strict compliance with spending commitments and delegation levels defined by the Group.
   
   

Continuous Improvement and Processes


 * Implement and improve procedures for managing and optimizing financial flows.
 * Propose improvements to tools (ERP, BI, Reporting, etc.), procedures, and information systems to optimize financial data processing.
 * Provide General Management and the Zone with all information and analyses required to steer the activity.
   
   

We arelooking for a Finance Manager with significant experience (at least 5years) in a similar position, ideally acquired in a BtoB commercialenvironment.

Technical Skills


 * Solid skills in local accounting and tax, as well as management control.
 * Advanced mastery of financial management IT tools, Excel, and BI tools.
 * Knowledge of IFRS standards and credit management.
 * An excellent level of English is required (regular exchanges with headquarters and European contacts) & French is a strong +
   
   

Soft Skills


 * Leadership, flexibility, and autonomy are essential for this Business Partner role.
 * Team spirit, sense of commitment, and strong results orientation.
 * Excellent communication skills and ability to meet demanding deadlines.
   
   

Ready toelevate your career?

JoiningHaulotte means sharing with its 1,700 employees the desire to take care ofpeople: colleagues, customers, and suppliers. Our employees' work is guided byour values: respect, engagement, and performance.

title: Retail Director (Perfumes & Home Fragrances)
description:
Buscamos un/a Retail Director especialista en Perfumes y Home Fragrances para liderar la estrategia comercial y operativa de estas categorías en el canal retail. La persona ideal aportará una visión estratégica, sensibilidad por el producto y un sólido track record gestionando equipos y P&L en entornos premium.




Responsabilidades:

 * Definir y ejecutar la estrategia de Perfumes & Home Fragrances.
 * Liderar el desempeño comercial: ventas, margen, KPIs retail y rentabilidad.
 * Optimizar el surtido, lanzamientos, pricing y promociones.
 * Garantizar una experiencia de cliente premium y sensorial en tienda.
 * Negociar con marcas, proveedores y casas perfumistas.
 * Liderar equipos retail, impulsando la excelencia operativa.




Estrategia y Desarrollo de Categoría

 * Definir la estrategia integral de Perfumes y Home Fragrances alineada con la visión de la compañía.
 * Analizar tendencias olfativas, dinámicas de mercado y comportamiento del consumidor para identificar oportunidades.
 * Construir un surtido competitivo y aspiracional acorde al posicionamiento deseado.




Gestión Comercial y KPIs

 * Supervisar el rendimiento de ventas y los KPIs clave: margen, ticket medio, conversión, ATV, UPT y rotación.
 * Optimizar el mix de marcas, colecciones, estacionalidades y lanzamientos.
 * Diseñar estrategias de pricing y promociones específicas para cada subcategoría.




Customer Experience & Visual Merchandising

 * Garantizar una experiencia premium coherente con la esencia de la categoría.
 * Impulsar implantaciones sensoriales: testers, rituales, ambientaciones y materiales de alta calidad.
 * Asegurar la correcta ejecución en tienda y el cumplimiento de estándares de marca.




Relación con Marcas y Proveedores

 * Negociar con casas perfumistas, marcas premium y proveedores especializados.
 * Coordinar lanzamientos exclusivos, colaboraciones estratégicas y activaciones retail.
 * Captar formaciones técnicas, soporte de marca y materiales comerciales.




Liderazgo y Gestión de Equipos

 * Dirigir al equipo de ventas del área de retail.
 * Fomentar una cultura orientada al cliente, al producto y a la excelencia operativa.
 * Trabajar de forma transversal con Marketing y Formación.




Gestión Financiera

 * Elaborar y monitorizar el presupuesto de la categoría.
 * Analizar indicadores de rentabilidad.
 * Anticipar necesidades de stock y asegurar niveles óptimos de inventario.




Requisitos

 * Experiencia mínima de 8–10 años en el sector de Perfumería Selectiva y/o Home Fragrances
 * Grado en ADE, Marketing, Comercio, Moda & Belleza o áreas relacionadas.
 * Posgrado (MBA, Retail Management) valorable.
 * Experiencia demostrada en gestión retail multitienda, liderazgo de equipos y P&L.
 * Conocimiento profundo de tendencias, categorías olfativas y marcas del sector.
 * Alta capacidad analítica, visión estratégica y habilidades de negociación.
 * Sensibilidad por el producto y orientación al cliente.




Habilidades Técnicas

 * Manejo avanzado de herramientas de análisis comercial (Excel, Power BI).
 * Conocimiento profundo de tendencias, notas olfativas, marcas líderes y comportamiento del consumidor en perfumería.
 * Familiaridad con CRM y herramientas retail.




Lo que ofrecemos

 * Liderar una categoría estratégica con alto impacto en negocio.
 * Entorno dinámico, colaborativo y orientado a la innovación.
 * Oportunidades de crecimiento y desarrollo.

title: Director/a Médico Nacional
description:
El director médico es el principal responsable de la relación con proveedores asistenciales, sus objetivos fundamentales son:

Objetivos


 * Control del gasto médico.
 * Planificación Asistencial.
 * Calidad de la prestación asistencial.
   
   

Misión: Definición del Plan Estratégico Asistencial.

Funciones principales


 * Cumplimiento de los objetivos de calidad asistencial en el cuadro y control del presupuesto de gasto médico.
 * Negociación de precios y condiciones de contratación con proveedores médicos.
 * Dirección y supervisión de los equipos de las direcciones médicas territoriales.
 * Coordinación de la Inspección Hospitalaria así como de los criterios de revisión de facturas.
 * Fijación de criterios de Planificación Asistencial y gestión de altas/bajas de claves médicas para el mantenimiento óptimo de la calidad del servicio.
 * Contratación de nuevas coberturas y servicios médicos en la red asistencial.
 * Soporte a la Dirección Médica de Grandes Cuentas en la relación Cliente-Aseguradora-Proveedor para asegurar el equilibrio entre el control del gasto médico y el interés comercial.
 * Coordinación en la fijación de criterios de valoración médica de las prestaciones y de autorización de servicios médicos.
 * Definición, creación e implantación de servicios médicos innovadores para la diferenciación de la propuesta de valor de la compañía.
 * Colaboración en el diseño de productos, coberturas, planes específicos y definición de la oferta asistencial para la mejor captación de clientes.
 * Definición de requisitos y mejoras de los cuadros de mando asistenciales para el análisis, gestión y control del gasto médico.
 * Dirección de la política de comunicación con el cuadro médico en la red médica/asistencial.
 * Gestión y coordinación de los requisitos de contratación para la automatización de procesos y la mejora en la eficiencia de las áreas operativas en el pago a proveedores médicos.
   
   

Contactos principales


 * Internos: Todas las áreas de gestión asistencial, comercial y operaciones (autorizaciones).
 * Externos: Hospitales, médicos y asegurados.
   
   

Formación


 * Grado en Medicina con al menos 10 años de experiencia en puesto similar.
 * Experiencia como médico asistencial.
 * Amplia red de contactos y relación con los interlocutores en la red asistencial.
 * Capacidad de trabajo en equipo.
 * Capacidad de para las relaciones institucionales, comunicación y empatía.
 * Capacidad para trabajar en un entorno de diversidad cultural.
   
   

Otras características a tener en cuenta


 * Muy recomendable nivel alto de inglés.
 * Carné de conducir
   
   

About Cigna Healthcare

Cigna Healthcare, a division of The Cigna Group, is an advocate for better health through every stage of life. We guide our customers through the health care system, empowering them with the information and insight they need to make the best choices for improving their health and vitality. Join us in driving growth and improving lives.

Qualified applicants will be considered without regard to race, color, age, disability, sex, childbirth (including pregnancy) or related medical conditions including but not limited to lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, veteran or military status, religion, national origin, ancestry, marital or familial status, genetic information, status with regard to public assistance, citizenship status or any other characteristic protected by applicable equal employment opportunity laws.

If you require reasonable accommodation in completing the online application process, please email: SeeYourselfEMEA@cigna.com for support. Do not email SeeYourselfEMEA@cigna.com for an update on your application or to provide your resume as you will not receive a response.

title: Head of Assembly Area
description:
Who We Are

You’ll be joining a diverse and ambitious team, spread across Germany, Canada, and Spain, all working together to shape the future of sustainable energy. At PowerCo we celebrate collaboration, progress and that spark that turns bold ideas into real impact. From our new gigafactory in Sagunto (Valencia), we’re driving a project that’s transforming both the region and the future of clean mobility in Europe — and you can be part of it.

Your Role And Key Responsibilities

This position will be part of our Operations Department, the heart of PowerCo — where innovation becomes reality. This area brings together multiple teams working on the construction of our gigafactory and the different stages of battery cell production. From engineering and design to process optimization and production excellence, Operations is where the future of energy takes shape.

In Your Day-to-day, You Will


 * Lead the end-to-end technical delivery of the Assembly area from construction through handover to Operations (up to SOP +6 months), ensuring readiness, quality, and milestone delivery.
 * Coordinate launch preparation across battery-specific infrastructure (BSI), equipment installation/start-up, key procurement needs, contractor resourcing, and ramp-up activities.
 * Own and steer the master project plan (incl. Primavera), keeping activities on track and driving early risk identification and corrective actions.
 * Manage timeline and budget performance with full transparency on risks and opportunities, implementing mitigation plans to prevent delays or cost overruns.
 * Act as the central cross-functional interface for your area (engineering, logistics, permitting, procurement, HSE, IT, process), representing the area in senior steering and stakeholder meetings aligned with the taskforce.
   
   

What You Bring To The Team


 * Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration or Engineering (Mechanical, Mechatronics, Materials, Chemical, or similar).
 * Minimum 10+ years of experience in industrial projects / construction & ramp-up environments, including 3–5 years in people leadership; strong project controls (time/cost/quality/safety), risk & change management, and stakeholder communication.
 * Willingness to work in Sagunto. Please note that while some positions are currently based in Valencia, our operations will progressively move to Sagunto, so we require availability to work there from the start.
 * Willingness to work rotating shifts.
 * Please submit your CV in English.
   
   

What Makes You Stand Out


 * Experience in fast-paced corporate and/or large-scale ramp-up settings.
 * Exposure to battery cell production and/or the integration of new technologies and processes into production.
 * Possession of a disability certificate of 33% or more is valued. At PowerCo, we are deeply committed to diversity and inclusion — embracing neurodiversity, functional diversity, and all forms of individual difference. We believe diverse perspectives make us stronger and ensure everyone feels welcome, valued, and heard.
   
   

What To Look Forward To


 * A unique opportunity to join a fast-growing organization driving the future of sustainable energy.
 * A flexible, inclusive, and collaborative work environment.
 * Competitive salary package with short- and long-term incentives (STI & LTI).
 * 30 vacation days per year.
 * Comprehensive health insurance covering you and your family (partner and children under 18).
 * Company car included in your role.
 * Gympass membership to support your well-being.
 * Monthly meal allowance via Cobee.
 * The chance to grow your career alongside a diverse international team.
 * PowerCo operates under the Spanish Chemical Industry Collective Agreement (Convenio Colectivo de la Industria Química).
 * Employee discounts, including special rates on vehicles from the Group.
   
   

Ready to power the future? Join PowerCo and be part of the change — your journey starts here.
