title: Gerente de planta (H/M/X)
description:
Misión

En esta posición, serás la persona responsable de coordinar la producción y asegurar la eficacia y calidad de los procesos, alineados con los objetivos estratégicos del Grupo. Liderarás la mejora continua, la planificación operativa y la supervisión de los equipos clave de la planta, garantizando un funcionamiento eficiente, seguro y orientado a la excelencia.




Responsabilidades principales

 * Supervisar el departamento de matricería, mantenimiento y la planta de inyección, garantizando los estándares de calidad y productividad requeridos.
 * Analizar problemas operativos y proponer soluciones efectivas que aseguren la calidad del producto.
 * Realizar seguimiento de los sistemas de control para detectar desviaciones y aplicar medidas correctoras.
 * Colaborar con el área de Recursos Humanos en la selección y formación del personal según las necesidades productivas.
 * Cumplir los objetivos de producción, productividad, calidad y costes establecidos, impulsando la implantación de mejoras en los procesos de fabricación.
 * Revisar periódicamente el cumplimiento de los objetivos operativos.
 * Valorar y calcular las necesidades de personal para optimizar la eficiencia productiva.
 * Garantizar el cumplimiento de las normas internas definidas por la empresa.
 * Asegurar que las órdenes de fabricación de material GRS se realizan con la lista de materiales adecuada.




Requisitos

 * Ingeniería en Organización Industrial o formación técnica similar.
 * Mínimo 3 años de experiencia en funciones afines dentro de entornos industriales o productivos.




Idiomas

 * Inglés profesional




Competencias

 * Conocimiento en sistemas ERP (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics), especialmente en módulos de manufactura y planificación.
 * Experiencia en metodologías de mejora continua como Lean Manufacturing o Six Sigma.
 * Manejo de herramientas de modelado de procesos (BPMN, Visio, Bizagi, Lucidchart o similares).
 * Dominio de herramientas de planificación y pronósticos (APS, S&OP).
 * Manejo avanzado de Excel y herramientas de análisis de datos (Power BI, Tableau).
 * Gestión sólida de inventarios y optimización de la cadena de suministro.
 * Conocimientos de análisis de procesos Kaizen, 5S, VSM.

title: Senior Product Marketing Manager
description:
Do you have a deep understanding of target audiences' everyday challenges? And can you clearly explain how our solutions help solve their problems. Are you motivated by collaborating with sales,  marketing content creators and other cross-functional stakeholders to effectively shape product marketing and Go-To-Market Strategies? Yes? You should read on!

The role you'll play

LanguageWire provides language solutions to customers in the B2B sector, comprising multilingual localisation services and AI-powered solutions to enable our customers to reach their global audience.

You'll be responsible for crafting strong value propositions for our key offerings to match the needs of target audience. 

For this role, we are looking for an analytical and strategic thinker with a strong command of product marketing tools. You will have the ability to translate complex technology into clear, compelling narratives, crafting messages that resonate with our target audience while reinforcing our brand positioning.

You will be collaborating closely with our teams from Sales, Marketing & Product and Tech to create a shared understanding of our products and the market to create great solutions together.  

The team you'll be a part of

You'll become part of our global Product & Marketing division, where you'll be working from our Valencia / Copenhagen office. With a presence in 16 locations around Europe, and the US, we have touchpoints around the globe and act as a central hub for global marketing and branding. We're an international team with a curious and open mindset, and a team where learning from and supporting each other is always a priority.  

If you want to make a difference, make it with us by...


 * Developing product marketing strategies, incl. strong value propositions and GTM plans for product launches  
 * Lead and run internal enablement initiatives to help equip our commercial organisation with the knowledge and tools to sell our solutions   
 * Following and analysing market trends to position products  
 * Crafting compelling messages across marketing channels  
 * Collaborating with sales & marketing team on product related events and campaigns  
 * Collaborating with product and tech teams across the full product life cycle  
 * Setting and following up on product marketing KPIs  
   
   

Desired Experience And Competencies

What does it take to work for LanguageWire?

What You'll Need To Bring


 * Min. a bachelor's degree from a relevant field
 * 3-5 years of product marketing experience within space of AI products, Saas and/or services  
 * Experience with developing value propositions and go-to-market plans  
 * Deep customer and target audience understanding  
 * Deep understanding of market trends and product lifecycles  
 * Strong ability to translate technical details into benefits for the customer  
 * Strong collaboration and stakeholder management skills  
   
   

This will make you stand out


 * Business and data driven mindset 
 * Experience with user research 
 * Experience conducting trainings 
 * True passion for product marketing 
 * Project management toolbox 
 * A lover of languages and tech 
   
   

Your colleagues say you


 * Have an outgoing spirit, are a strong executor, work independently and proactively   
 * That you contribute to a cool office vibe and great culture  
 * A highly skilled product marketing professional  
 * Have a YES-mindset  
 * Have a structured and strategic mindset  
 * Are ambitious with a strong personal drive  
 * Are a strong collaborator and engaging communicator  
   
   

Our Perks


 * Enjoy flat hierarchies, responsibility and freedom, direct feedback, and room to stand up for your own ideas
 * Internal development opportunities, ongoing support from your People Partner, and an inclusive and fun company culture
 * International company with over 300 employees. Offices in Copenhagen, Aarhus, Stockholm, Varberg, London, Leuven, Lille, Paris, Munich, Hamburg, Atlanta, Finland and Valencia
 * We have a hybrid work model called FlexiWire. We offer weekly flexibility, working three days in the office and two days from home. Together with your team, you can coordinate which days to collaborate in the office. 
 * We take care of our people and initiate many social get-togethers from Friday Bars a to Summer or Christmas parties. We have fun!
 * 150 great colleagues in the Valencia office belonging to different business departments
 * Excellent location in cool and modern offices in the city center, with a great rooftop terrace and a view over the Town Hall Square
 * Private health insurance
 * Working in an international environment—more than 20 different nationalities
 * A dog friendly atmosphere
 * Big kitchen with access to organic fruits, nuts and biscuits and coffee.
 * Social area and game room (foosball table, darts, and board games)
 * Bike and car parking
   
   

About LanguageWire

At LanguageWire, we want to wire the world together with language. Why? Because we want to help people & businesses simplify communication. We are fueled by the most advanced technology (AI) and our goal is to make customer's lives easier by simplifying their communication with any audience across the globe.

Our values drive our behavior

We are curious. We are trustworthy. We are caring. We are ambitious.

At LanguageWire, we are curious and intrigued by what we don't understand. We believe relationships are based on honesty and responsibility, and being trustworthy reinforces an open, humble, and honest way of communicating. We are caring and respect each other personally and professionally. We encourage authentic collaboration, invite feedback and a positive social environment. Our desire to learn, build, and share knowledge is a natural part of our corporate culture.

Working at LanguageWire — why we like it: 

"Our purpose and values are flowing through LanguageWire in many ways: in the collaboration between teams and colleagues, in the relation with our customers and our mindset in how we approach challenges. From an HR perspective, it´s great to see how curious, ambitious, trustworthy and caring all colleagues and leaders are, which makes LanguageWire an amazing place to work. All of that makes it easier to contribute to LanguageWire´s purpose to wire the world together with language."

(Julia, Senior People & Compliance Manager, Valencia)

Yes, to diversity, equity & inclusion

In LanguageWire, we believe diversity in gender, age, background, and culture is essential for our growth. Therefore, we are committed to creating a culture that incorporates diverse perspectives and expertise in our everyday work.

LanguageWire's recruitment process is designed to be transparent and fair for all candidates. We encourage candidates of all backgrounds to apply, and we ensure that candidates are provided with an equal opportunity to demonstrate their competencies and skills.

Want to know more?

We can't wait to meet you! So, why wait 'til tomorrow? Apply today!

If you want to know more about LanguageWire, we encourage you to visit our website!

title: Head of Recruitment H/F/X
description:
The Community Team

Cette équipe est l'une des composantes majeures du succès d'Ekkiden. Cette Team Community est la réponse du groupe aux enjeux du recrutement, à travers l'utilisation de tous les canaux, comme la gestion des relations avec les écoles de commerce et d'ingénieurs, la participation à des salons spécialisés, la présence sur les réseaux sociaux et la production de contenus, le suivi de nos nombreuses candidatures et l'animation de la relation avec nos candidats.

Cette équipe hybride permet aux équipes Business de gagner des parts de marché et au groupe d'atteindre ses objectifs de croissance ambitieux en s'entourant des meilleures personnes au bon moment et au bon endroit.

Le rôle : Head of Recruitment

Responsabilités


 * Vous prenez la responsabilité au niveau des périmètres français de l’ensemble du process de Talent Acquisition et de Community Management
 * Vous définirez les standards, process et outils du périmètre, et adapterez chacun de ces éléments pour nos différentes offres
 * Vous serez en charge des équipes qui composent la Team Community FR IT/Digital et Industrie et de son organisation
 * Vous mettrez en place les méthodes, process, outils et KPIs liés au suivi opérationnel de vos équipes
 * Brainstorm sur des stratégies d’acquisition innovantes / Analyse du marché et de la compétition
 * Travailler avec les équipes business et growth sur la segmentation du marché, l’analyse des besoins et la conception des parcours de conversion
   
   

Ce Que Nous Recherchons


 * 5 à 10 ans d'expérience dans l'acquisition de talents (dans les profils ingénieurs et en cabinet de conseil serait un plus !)
 * Une expérience avérée en management et coordination d'équipes
 * Une personnalité ! Une personne autonome, persévérante, avec une envie folle de s'impliquer, d'avoir un impact et de participer à un projet entrepreneurial ambitieux au sein d'une équipe passionnée et motivée.
 * Une personne ayant un intérêt marqué pour le community management, le digital, la communication, le recrutement et le networking.
 * Études axées sur les RH, l'acquisition de talents, le numérique, le marketing ou la communication.
 * La maîtrise du français et de l'anglais est obligatoire, toute autre langue est un plus.
   
   

Ce Que Nous Proposons

🤝 Nous rejoindre au bon moment pour faire ta place au sein d’une organisation en très forte croissance

🚀 Des missions variées dans un environnement challengeant qui te permettront d’avoir un réel impact sur la boîte

💪 La possibilité de travailler de façon autonome et d’être force de proposition pour grandir ensemble

✨ Un parcours de carrière adapté à ta personnalité, aussi bien au niveau du rôle que de la localité

🤓 Une formation exigeante en continu pour libérer tout ton potentiel

👍 Des conditions de travail flexibles (horaires, télétravail, …)

💸 Une culture de la performance avec de belles primes de résultats

❤️ Un mutuelle très complète (Sanitas) et des titres-restaurant (carte Edenred)

🏠 Un super bureau à Madrid (Alonso Martinez)

title: Senior People Business Partner EMEA (GTM & G&A)
description:
Talkdesk is pioneering a new era of Customer Experience Automation (CXA), redefining how the world’s most admired brands interact with their customers through AI. Our global team of courageous innovators is customer-obsessed, building AI-first solutions that put empathy, trust, and transparency at the center of every interaction. We foster an inclusive culture where diverse perspectives drive our success and every voice belongs. Combining the stability of a global leader with the agility of a disruptor, Talkdeskers are empowered with the autonomy to drive meaningful impact, while giving back to the communities and environment around us.

Talkdesk has been recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Contact Center as a Service (CCaaS) and in the G2 Overall Grid® Reports for AI Agents and Contact Center. With seven consecutive years on the Forbes Cloud 100 and multiple AI Breakthrough awards, there has never been a more exciting time to join us as we shape the future of customer experience automation!

A hands-on and business-focused People Business Partner with deep experience supporting Go to market and G&A functions—in fast-growing tech environments. Based in Portugal, this leader partners closely with leaders across EMEA to drive organizational effectiveness, leadership support, and scalable people solutions. They bring strong business acumen, a track record of execution, and the ability to influence and deliver outcomes across cultures and time zones.

Experience & Background

 * 10+ years of progressive HR/People experience, including 5+ years as a People Business Partner supporting technical organizations (Sales, GTM, FP&A, AI, or SaaS)
 * Experience supporting leaders and teams in countries within the EMEA regions, ideally within global, matrixed tech / growth companies
 * Demonstrated ability to execute organizational design, change management, and workforce planning initiatives that meet business needs
 * Partnered on core people programs such as performance management, engagement, talent development, and employee experience
 * Strong track record of building trusted relationships with senior technical leaders and driving measurable business and people outcomes

Mindset & Style

 * Thrives in fast-moving, high-growth environments with the ability to bring clarity and focus in moments of ambiguity
 * Operates with urgency and accountability, translating strategy into execution that advances business priorities
 * Strong communicator and problem solver, skilled at influencing across cultures and functions
 * Collaborative, resilient, and growth-minded—motivated by scaling impactful People practices that enable technical talent to thrive

Work Environment and Physical Requirements:

Primarily office-environment work, extended periods of sitting or standing, computer-based work. Limited lifting, and equipment usage limited to computer-related equipment (keyboards, mouse, etc.)

The Talkdesk story hinges on empathy and acceptance. It is the shared goal among all Talkdeskers to empower a new kind of customer hero through our innovative software solution, and we firmly believe that the best path to success for our mission is inclusivity, diversity, and genuine acceptance. To that end, we will hire, promote, work along, cheer for, bond with, and warmly welcome into the Talkdesk family all persons without regard to ethnic and racial identity, indigenous heritage, national origin, religion, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, marital status, veteran status, genetic information, or any other legally protected status.

title: Creative Director - EdTech (French fluent 🇫🇷)
description:
What if your next playground was transforming a massive Personal Brand ecosystem into a global, iconic Company Brand? What about challenging the status quo of an entire industry and building a brand you can be proud of, and that will help millions of people?

Then you’ll love this.

We’re not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to follow a calendar. We’re looking for a Creative Director (Brand & Content).

Someone who understands that to win today, you don't just need "content", you need a Movement. You will have the freedom to propose bold, unconventional concepts and the resources to bring them to life immediately.

We need a strategist like you who will bridge the gap between David Laroche’s personal influence and Paradox’s institutional power.

A Brand Architect, capable of orchestrating a complex dual-strategy: scaling a personal brand while simultaneously building a standalone Company Brand that outlasts its founder.

A Creative Disruptor, you hate "best practices" because they lead to average results. You constantly hunt for the "Purple Cow", the angle, the format, or the story that no one else is daring to tell.

A "Doer" with Taste, you don't just float ideas in a meeting room. You script them, you drive them, and you ship them.

This is a full-time position, carried out remotely or from our beautiful offices in Dubaï or Lisbon. French and English fluency is required.

About Paradox

WHAT WE DO

At Paradox, we are convinced that greatness is trainable.

That’s why we want to empower people at scale, by leveraging cutting edge technologies like AI, and crafting user experiences with outstanding aesthetics.

We do that by merging :


 * Human Intelligence (coaches, peers, and mentors)
 * Structured Intelligence (protocols, mental models, rituals),
 * Technological Intelligence (AI personalization, feedback loops, adaptive journeys)
   
   

To create one seamless ecosystem: Paradox OS.

OUR BELIEFS

We believe self-help is broken.

Most learning platforms are used the same way : consuming generic theories, getting quick highs, ending with no real change.

At Paradox, we believe people deserve more.

More than content. More than motivation.

They deserve a system that knows them, one that adapts, challenges, and grows with them.

We believe that every human learns differently, and that technology can do more than entertain or save time.

It can translate insight into transformation, through AI personalization, lean experimentation, and deep psychological understanding.

Because learning shouldn’t just make you feel inspired for a day, it should change how you live, think, and create.

OUR VISION

At Paradox, we want to re-invent how people grow.

We do not build another course or coaching app but the Operating System for Greatness.

Founded by David Laroche, a creator followed by over 2 million people and known for his interviews with icons like Tony Parker, Mike Horn, Richard Branson, and Gad Elmaleh, Paradox aims to build something that will live beyond any individual (including its founder), for decades to come.

Our ambition is to compete with players like Mindvalley (150M ARR), but with a sharper vision, grounded protocols for achievers, people who want more for their life, refusing mediocrity.

To do that, we bring together designers, tech, coaches, and filmmakers to create learning experiences that are cinematic, precise, and effective.

We move fast, aim high, and hold ourselves to the standards of Apple, Spotify, and MasterClass. No fluff, focused on meaningful impact.

While others hide their numbers, we want to let our results speak loudly for us.

Get obsessed with transforming our clients’ lives and let those transformations be our marketing.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Transform a "Personal Brand" into a "Top-Tier Media".

You lead the Content Factory not by administrative management, but by creative authority. Your goal is to produce content that is so good, unique, and aligned with our values that it makes our competitors look outdated.

Your 4 Major Responsibilities


 * Architect the "Dual-Brand" Strategy
 * Build a symbiotic strategy where David Laroche’s personal brand and Paradox’s company brand reinforce each other without cannibalization.
 * Propose radical new formats (documentaries, reality shows, conceptual shorts) that shatter the boring codes of the "Self-Help" industry.
 * Define distinct, sharp editorial lines for each platform: Depth & Search for YouTube, Aesthetic & Vibe for Instagram, and Authority & Authenticity for LinkedIn.
 * Radical Concepting & End-to-End Delivery
 * Take responsibility for the entire production chain by writing the hooks, storyboarding the narrative, and ensuring the final cut matches the vision.
 * Deliver what you pitch: if your concept requires a specific motion designer, a drone operator, or a niche expert, you find them, hire them, and onboard them to bring the vision to life.
 * Treat David as the "Actor" on set: you ensure scripts, set, and direction are flawless so he can just show up, perform, and leave without any mental load, trusting you to handle every detail of the final output.
 * Command the Content Factory
 * Take full leadership of the internal content team (Factory Manager, Video Editors, Graphic Designers…) by setting the tempo, the culture, and the daily standards of excellence.
 * Provide high-level artistic direction and act as the final quality check; nothing gets published if it doesn't meet the "Paradox Standard" of aesthetics and storytelling.
 * Challenge the team to constantly upskill, pushing them for sharper cuts, better sound design, and stronger visual storytelling.
 * Fuel the Growth Engine
 * Treat content as our primary acquisition channel by collaborating with the Head of Growth to produce assets specifically designed to convert in Ads.
 * Analyze retention graphs, CTR, and CPL to iterate based on feedback, killing what fails and aggressively scaling what works.
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience


 * Proven Content Builder: You have successfully grown a media brand, a YouTube channel, or a personal brand to significant scale (100k+ followers or millions of views). You understand the mechanics of virality and retention.
 * Editorial Leadership: You have experience managing a creative team (editors, designers) and know how to give feedback that elevates a "good" video to a "masterpiece."
 * Elite Scripting Skills: You can show us scripts you wrote that performed. You know how to structure a narrative, write a hook that stops the scroll, and keep an audience engaged for 20+ minutes.
 * Performance Fluency: You have worked in environments where content had to drive business results (ads, launches, conversion), not just vanity metrics.
   
   

PERSONALITY


 * Intolerant to Mediocrity: You have "Taste." You are physically pained by a bad font, a clumsy cut, or a weak headline. You fight for the details that others ignore.
 * Psychology Obsessed: You don't just "make content"; you study human nature. You constantly ask why people click, why they share, and what emotion drives them.
 * A "Doer" with Authority: You command respect not by title, but by competence. You can jump into a project, write the script, direct the shoot, and fix the edit if needed.
 * No Ego, Just Impact: You don't fall in love with your ideas. You accept that even the best concepts can flop. When it happens, you don't take it personally; you analyze the data, pivot immediately, and ship the next concept with renewed energy.
   
   

Language

French: Native / Bilingual

English: Fluent English, you can hold a conversation on specific details with English-speaking colleagues.

Our chosen language for written communication is English.

IT MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

❌ If you need clarity before chaos — wrong place.

❌ If you prefer balance over intensity — wrong season.

❌ If you don't genuinely care about the topics we cover — wrong place.

❌ If you want to strategize without getting your hands dirty in scripting, directing, or the editing suite — wrong role.

WHY JOIN US ❤️

Help us market a product that fuses neuroscience, design, and AI to reinvent how humans grow.

Work with filmmakers, psychologists, engineers, and creatives obsessed with impact.

In the heart of our headquarters stands the 100 000 Dreams Wall,

Every photo on that wall is a life rewritten:

“I ran a marathon.”

“I started my company.”

“I found peace with my father.”

You will play a crucial role in the development of an Iconic Product.

Growth & Ambition


 * > 🏅Being surrounded by A-players who strive to perform
   
   

Impact & Meaning


 * > Playing a crucial role in the development of a company whose content and products will be used by millions of people
 * > Waking up in the morning feeling like you are making a difference is something!
   
   

We receive messages every day from clients who have successfully lost weight, quit smoking, reach a milestone in their business, built better relationships, and made positive changes in their lives.


 * > ❤️ Contributing to the Paradox Foundation (our non-profit), dedicated to empower teenagers
   
   

But that's not all, we believe that driven people deserve…

Freedom & Well Being 🗽


 * > 😎A company culture based on autonomy & accountability
 * > 🗽Flexible working hours
 * > 🌎A remote culture from day one with the freedom to work from wherever you want
 * > 🏤Magnificent office in Dubai, Paris, Lisbon - it feels like home :)
 * > 💻Work on Mac, for us it counts :)
 * > 🏀350€ per year paid by the company to take care of yourself ( for your gym, or dance class or whatever make you feel great)
 * > 📚150€ of books or education - At Paradox, we are learner lovers and we want to support you in that
 * > 🔥6 1:1coachings - A Paradox Coach supporting you on anything personal or professional, we want you to live your best life
   
   

How To Apply 📃

That job description resonated with you?

Click on "Apply for this position" and fill out a short questionnaire (7 to 8 minutes) to tell us more about yourself and send us your CV!

Hiring process

📃 A 6 to 8 minutes application survey.

💻 A 15-30 minutes video call with Timy, our HR, to assess the fit between the position, the company, and your own career path.

💻 A video-call focused on your career with Quentin, VP Marketing, to review your background & see how we can match your desires with our needs.

💻 A culture-fit video call to check in depth the alignment between you and our values and culture.

💼 Reference calls to get in-depth insights about how you work in different environments, make your onboarding easier, and give everybody on the team the insurance to be surrounded by A-Players.

🤗 Welcome aboard!

About Our Hiring Process

Our recruitment process is tailored to do our best to avoid that you or us realize that we’re not a perfect fit in two or six months. It might seem long, but every step serves a purpose and will allow us to get to know you better as much as it’ll help you understand more where you’ll be stepping in.

We also want you to have time to ask all of your questions regarding your job description, the long-term vision of your team and the company, our values, with the relevant interlocutor in front of you.

The steps mentioned above can be rearranged depending on yours and the interviewer’s availability.

If you’re not joining to tweak landing pages.

If you’re here to engineer behavioral change at scale, for millions.

Welcome to Paradox.

Let’s build the Operating System for Greatness.

title: KAM Plataforma Logística (Pharma)
description:
Misión:

Gestionar la actividad logística a nivel comercial, relación con clientes, velando por mantener los niveles de calidad en el servicio establecidos por la Dirección.




Funciones:

 * Mantener la relación comercial con los clientes en su zona de influencia realizando visitas a los laboratorios, manteniendo y negociación acuerdos de colaboración, siguiendo las directrices de la Dirección de Logística Externa.
 * Participar en la elaboración de tarifas de transporte a clientes junto a la Dirección.
 * Participar en la elaboración de tarifas de servicios de operador logístico junto a la Dirección.
 * Mantener la relación con las cooperativas y distribuidoras farmacéuticas para la propuesta de nuevos servicios, rutas y colaboraciones.
 * Coordinar los servicios y contrataciones con las agencias de transporte y resto de proveedores de la plataforma.
 * Reportar periódicamente a la Dirección de la actividad comercial con laboratorios y cooperativas.
 * Realizar el seguimiento de la actividad y el nivel de servicio de los clientes y de la plataforma.
 * Coordinar los diferentes equipos de la plataforma para garantizar que los procesos se ejecuten de acuerdo a los estándares de calidad de la empresa.
 * Velar por el desarrollo del equipo asignado a la plataforma, gestionando las incidencias y aplicando las decisiones de la Dirección.
 * Asegurar, mantener y supervisar el cumplimiento de Sistema de Calidad y Medio Ambiente participando en auditorías externa e implantando nuevos procedimientos y controles de la Calidad.
 * Velar por el correcto funcionamiento de las instalaciones, tratando de optimizar los costes energéticos, en colaboración con el área de Mantenimiento.
 * Cumplir, y hacer cumplir, las normas establecidas respecto a Calidad, Prevención y Sanidad, con el fin de alcanzar un alto nivel de satisfacción en el cliente.




Perfil buscado (H/M/D):

 * Experiencia mínima de 3 a 5 años en posiciones similares dentro del sector logístico y/o transporte, con exposición directa a clientes.
 * Perfil comercial–operativo: sólida capacidad para la gestión y fidelización de clientes, combinada con comprensión de la operativa de plataformas logísticas.
 * Experiencia en negociación comercial, elaboración de tarifas y gestión de acuerdos con clientes y colaboradores.
 * Capacidad de liderazgo y coordinación de equipos, con orientación a resultados y a la mejora continua del servicio.
 * Conocimiento y experiencia en gestión de calidad, procesos y estándares operativos, valorándose la participación en auditorías y sistemas de calidad y medio ambiente.
 * Alta capacidad analítica, organización y seguimiento de indicadores de actividad y nivel de servicio.
 * Habilidades de comunicación y relación con interlocutores de nivel directivo (direcciones de logística y comercial).
sector: Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain and Storage and Pharmaceutical Manufacturing

title: Responsable de Planta Externa
description:
Olin nace con la ambición de consolidar, profesionalizar y hacer crecer a un grupo de operadores locales que ponen foco en la cercanía, la calidad del servicio y la sencillez de sus productos.

Queremos ser un referente en dar acceso a conexiones de alta velocidad tanto en el mercado mayorista como minorista y actualmente estamos en pleno crecimiento y expansión en España.

Buscamos ampliar nuestro equipo en Olin, empresa del grupo OlinGroup, con la incorporación de un Responsable de Planta Externa. La persona seleccionada reportará al CEO de la compañía y al Director de Planta Externa del grupo. Será responsable de la gestión directa de un equipo compuesto por coordinadores, supervisores y técnicos de campo.

Funciones principales:


 * Diseñar, coordinar y gestionar la ejecución, instalación, mantenimiento y despliegue de la red de fibra óptica, asegurando una planificación eficiente, la asignación de tareas al equipo técnico y la colaboración con otras áreas y proveedores.
 * Supervisar las obras en campo para garantizar el cumplimiento de los estándares de calidad, PRL y medio ambiente, verificando que la ejecución se ajuste a planos, normas, procedimientos constructivos y especificaciones técnicas.
 * Gestionar los recursos materiales y equipos necesarios para las operaciones, asegurando el cumplimiento de los KPI’s y optimizando los costes dentro del presupuesto asignado.
 * Garantizar la operatividad de la red mediante mantenimientos preventivos y correctivos, coordinando y supervisando la resolución de averías e incidencias conforme a los SLA´s establecidos.
 * Liderar, motivar y capacitar al equipo de trabajo, fomentando un ambiente colaborativo y asegurando el cumplimiento de procedimientos seguros y buenas prácticas técnicas.
 * Garantizar el cumplimiento de las normas técnicas, de PRL, medioambientales y de calidad, manteniendo actualizada la documentación técnica, los reportes de gestión y producción.
 * Analizar indicadores de gestión y proponer mejoras en los procesos y tecnologías para optimizar la red, implementando acciones correctivas y preventivas.
   
   

Requisitos:


 * Experiencia mínima de 5 años en posiciones similares, gestionando equipos de Instalación y montaje, despliegue, de redes de fibra óptica
 * Formación académica de ingeniería en telecomunicaciones, Electrónica o informática.
 * Conocimientos en infraestructura de redes de fibra óptica.
 * Experiencia gestionando equipos multidisciplinares.
 * Conocimiento de normativas Técnicas, Prl, medioambiente y de calidad.
 * Experiencia en manejo de herramientas de diseño y gestión de proyectos.
 * Valorable cursos o certificaciones en fibra óptica, gestión de proyectos, PRL.
   
   

¿Qué ofrecemos?


 * Contrato indefinido a jornada completa.
 * Vehículo de empresa.
 * Salario a valorar en función de la valía del candidato.
 * Incentivos salariales según consecución de objetivos.
 * Beneficios corporativos: Retribución flexible (restaurantes, guardería, formación...).
 * Incorporación a una empresa en pleno crecimiento.
 * 1 día de teletrabajo: martes
   
   

¿Crees que cumples los requisitos? Envianos tu CV ¡queremos conocerte!

title: Director/a Marketing y Comunicación
description:
Desde Melt Group estamos buscando un perfil de Dirección de Marketing y Comunicación para incorporarse a una compañía de ámbito nacional con proyección internacional, vinculada a entornos B2B e industriales, ubicada en la provincia de Tarragona.




La persona seleccionada será responsable de definir, liderar y ejecutar la estrategia global de marketing y comunicación, con el objetivo de impulsar el crecimiento del negocio, reforzar el posicionamiento de marca y generar demanda cualificada, en coordinación directa con Dirección General y el área Comercial.




Funciones principales

 * Diseñar la estrategia de Marketing y Comunicación a corto y medio plazo: segmentación de mercados, definición de propuesta de valor, canales, posicionamiento y planes de lanzamiento.
 * Desarrollar e implementar planes de generación de demanda B2B, combinando acciones online y offline orientadas a oportunidades reales de negocio.
 * Liderar la estrategia de marketing digital orientada a conversión: SEO, SEM, campañas de pago, redes sociales, automatización de marketing, optimización web y analítica.
 * Gestionar la identidad de marca y la estrategia de contenidos: comunicación corporativa, mensajes clave, calendario editorial, materiales comerciales y técnicos, casos de éxito y soportes audiovisuales.
 * Garantizar la coherencia de marca en todos los puntos de contacto externos: web, campañas, ferias, distribuidores y partners.
 * Definir KPIs, analizar resultados y elaborar reportes ejecutivos para la toma de decisiones y la mejora continua.
 * Impulsar la evolución del ecosistema de herramientas de marketing (CRM, automatización, dashboards y procesos de datos) en coordinación con el área comercial.
 * Planificar y coordinar la presencia en ferias, eventos sectoriales y acciones de trade marketing, asegurando objetivos y retorno de inversión.
 * Gestionar presupuesto, recursos internos y agencias externas, priorizando eficiencia e impacto.
 * Analizar mercado y competencia para identificar tendencias, oportunidades y nuevos segmentos de crecimiento.
 * Supervisar la comunicación corporativa externa y colaborar en la gestión de la reputación de marca.




Requisitos

 * Grado o Licenciatura en Marketing, Comunicación, ADE o titulaciones afines.
 * Valorable posgrado o máster en Marketing Digital, Dirección de Marketing o Branding.
 * Experiencia mínima de 5 años en posiciones de responsabilidad en Marketing, preferiblemente en entornos B2B, industriales o de producto técnico.
 * Experiencia demostrable en lanzamientos de productos, servicios o nuevas líneas de negocio.
 * Experiencia liderando equipos y coordinando proveedores o agencias, con estrecha colaboración con departamentos comerciales.
 * Marketing digital orientado a resultados: SEO, SEM, paid media, analítica y optimización de conversión.
 * Estrategia de marca y posicionamiento: segmentación, propuesta de valor y definición de buyer persona.
 * Manejo de herramientas CRM y automatización de marketing, análisis de funnels y métricas de rendimiento.
 * Uso de herramientas de IA aplicadas a marketing para investigación, generación de contenidos y optimización de campañas.
 * Alta capacidad de comunicación escrita y visual, así como elaboración de presentaciones ejecutivas.
 * Nivel alto de inglés valorable.




Competencias

 * Fuerte orientación a negocio y resultados, combinando visión estratégica y capacidad de ejecución.
 * Liderazgo y coordinación transversal con áreas de ventas, dirección y otros departamentos.
 * Alta autonomía, organización y capacidad analítica para la toma de decisiones basada en datos.

title: Director de F&B
description:
Sobre Nosotros:

En 666 Restaurant, desafiamos lo convencional y abrazamos lo audaz. Somos el lugar donde las hamburguesas se convierten en experiencias infernales, y cada bocado te acerca a una "Buena Muerte". Si tienes una pasión ardiente por la gastronomía, un espíritu rebelde y estás listo/a para liderar nuestro aquelarre culinario, queremos conocerte.




Tu Misión

 * Liderar el Infierno Operativo: Serás el maestro de ceremonias, supervisando sala y cocina, y asegurando que cada servicio sea una experiencia diabólicamente perfecta y fluida. Diseñarás un workflow impecable, donde el caos se transforme en arte.
 * Conjurar Menús Endemoniados: Trabajarás codo a codo con nuestro chef para crear platos que encandilen las papilas gustativas y deleiten a las almas más atrevidas. Recopilarás feedback de los clientes para mantener nuestras creaciones siempre en evolución.
 * Dominar las Hordas del Servicio: Liderarás a nuestro equipo de sala y cocina, asegurándote de que cada miembro abrace el espíritu de la excelencia. Serás responsable de reclutar, formar y mantener al equipo motivado, creando un ambiente de trabajo donde la creatividad y la dedicación ardan con intensidad.
 * Custodiar el Tesoro del Inframundo: Gestionarás y optimizarás el presupuesto de alimentos y bebidas, manteniendo el equilibrio perfecto entre costo y calidad. Supervisarás inventarios, márgenes y negociaciones con proveedores para que todo funcione con precisión infernal.
 * Asegurar el Orden del Caos: Garantizarás que cumplamos con las normativas de seguridad alimentaria, sanitarias y legales mientras mantienes nuestro toque audaz y rebelde.
 * Alianzas con el Consejo del Caos: Trabajarás de la mano con el equipo de eventos y MICE para potenciar nuestras ofertas y crear experiencias inolvidables. Además, colaborarás con el Hotel Manager para alinear nuestras operaciones con la visión apocalíptica de la marca.




Lo Que Buscamos en Ti

 * Experiencia en el Inframundo Gastronómico: Al menos 3 años liderando equipos en alimentos y bebidas, idealmente en lugares donde la norma es romper las reglas.
 * Gestión Infernal de Recursos: Sólida experiencia en manejo de presupuestos, inventarios y optimización de costos.
 * Lenguas de Dos Mundos: Dominio del inglés y español para liderar un equipo multicultural y conectar con nuestras almas visitantes.
 * Líder con Fuego Interno: Capacidad para inspirar y dirigir con pasión, manteniendo al equipo alineado con nuestra visión audaz.
 * Creatividad Demoníaca: Habilidad para innovar y sorprender a través de propuestas que desafíen lo terrenal.
 * Devoción al Cliente: Pasión por superar expectativas y ofrecer experiencias que hagan que los clientes regresen por más.




Por Qué Unirte a Nuestro Aquelarre

Aquí no hay espacio para lo común ni para lo aburrido. Si buscas liderar un equipo que vive y respira la pasión por la gastronomía y el espectáculo, 666 Restaurant es tu destino. Cada día es una nueva oportunidad para desafiar lo divino, abrazar lo profano y crear momentos que nadie olvidará.




¿Te atreves a liderar el fuego de 666 Restaurant? El infierno te espera.

title: Global Sales Director
description:
Global Sales Director




At Fourvenues we are revolutionizing a $100+ billion global market, powering nightclubs, festivals, beach clubs and promoters around the world. Our vision is clear: to become the operating system of the industry, with a strong financial component and a vertical SaaS (vSaaS) model that empowers our clients to achieve their goals. Their success is ours.




We are looking for a Global Sales Director who is eager to make a significant mark on their career and wants to join a high-growth company. If you have the self-demand, ambition, curiosity and commitment to take Fourvenues to the next level, we want to meet you!




Location: Valencia (hybrid model).




Report to: CEO.




What You’ll Be Doing...

The Global Sales Director is a key position to drive the company’s expansion, lead the commercial area, and ensure we maintain an accelerated growth pace. The right candidate must be able to design the commercial strategy, oversee its execution, and provide the leadership and coaching needed for the sales team to consistently deliver outstanding results.




Strategy and Leadership

 * Responsible for the design and execution of Fourvenues’ global commercial & international expansion strategies, in collaboration with the Exec Team.
 * Supervise and support the Sales team in the most relevant commercial operations.
 * Drive consistent achievement of commercial targets across every market.
 * Maintain constant alignment with Exec Team on strategy delivery and progress.
 * Provide market insights and share trends and opportunities with the leadership team.




Team and Culture

 * Lead, coach and mentor the commercial teams in Spain, Corporate and International.
 * Define and implement the optimal structure for each commercial team.
 * Recruit and train key sales talent, bringing industry and commercial insight to enhance team capability.
 * Foster a results-driven sales culture that combines clear performance expectations with encouragement and coaching.
 * Collaborate closely with other departments to strengthen partnerships and identify cross-functional opportunities for market growth.




Market Relations

 * Be recognized and respected within the international nightlife and festivals ecosystem (desirable).
 * Leverage their network to access strategic decision-makers.
 * Build and nurture trusted relationships with key industry stakeholders, uncovering opportunities to drive mutual growth.
 * Act as a visible and respected representative of Fourvenues, strengthening the company’s influence and partnerships within the industry.




What we need from you

 * Proven experience in sales within the entertainment industry, or the ability to rapidly adapt and learn the sector.
 * Track record of building or successfully scaling and developing high performing sales teams internationally.
 * Ability to identify, attract, and retain top performing talent.
 * Ability to inspire confidence and build trusted relationships across teams, clients, and partners.




We Value...

Commercial Strategy & Market Experience

 * Ability to design a realistic forecast and monitor its reliability.
 * Mastery of client segmentation and definition of go-to market priorities.
 * Experienced in sales process design and implementation of sales playbooks and enablement tools.
 * Proven excellent negotiation skills with international experience.
 * Results-oriented mindset with a focus on excellence.
 * Understanding (or ability to quickly learn) the SaaS sales cycle.
 * Experience in enterprise sales and managing complex cycles with multiple decision-makers.
 * Strong commercial acumen and ability to balance short-term results with long-term strategy.




Processes and Metrics

 * Skilled in structuring and optimising the sales funnel and revenue operations profile.
 * Strong analytical skills and ability to solve complex problems and take data driven decisions.
 * Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot), with enough command to lead directly through the platform.




Leadership and Team Management

 * Ability to define and adapt compensation and commission plans according to market and context.
 * Experienced in building, scaling, and managing high-performing global sales teams.
 * Strong track record of developing sales leaders and empowering teams through coaching and accountability.
 * Focused on creating a results-oriented culture grounded in collaboration, ownership, and continuous improvement.




Personal Skills

 * Proactivity to anticipate needs and act autonomously.
 * Flexibility and adaptability in dynamic environments.
 * Collaborative spirit and ability to work effectively as part of a team.
 * Growth mindset and initiative to propose improvements and innovative solutions.
 * Excellent organizational and planning skills in fast-paced environments.
 * Fluent in English. Other languages are a plus.
 * Ability to influence C-level clients and partners.




What We Offer...

 * Competitive compensation aligned with the role and level of responsibility.
 * Annual bonus and incentive plan linked to Fourvenues’ global growth and the achievement of company-wide, individual and team objectives.
 * Hybrid and flexible working model, built on trust, accountability, and measurable impact.
 * Global growth environment, with direct influence on international expansion and strategic business decisions.
 * Leadership and professional development programmes offering continuous learning opportunities.
 * Culture of wellbeing and high performance, including private health insurance, additional vacation days, and modern offices designed for collaboration.
 * High-impact internal experiences and events that strengthen cohesion, professional growth, and a strong sense of belonging.
 * Language classes and flexible benefits tailored to your personal and professional needs.
 * Real opportunity to make an impact, driving the transformation of a scaling project into an international benchmark within its industry.




About Fourvenues

Fourvenues is the B2B company leading the digital transformation of the nightlife industry. We address a global market worth over $100 billion, spanning nightclubs, festivals, beach clubs, event promoters, and bars.




Our vision is clear: to become the operating system of the industry, with a strong financial component and a vertical SaaS (vSaaS) model that empowers our clients to achieve their goals. Their success is ours.




In just three years, we’ve multiplied our revenue by 20x, and we’re only getting started. Our goal is to grow by at least 100% annually, fostering an environment where commitment, high standards, and constant curiosity are non-negotiable. Here, excellence isn’t optional; it’s the standard.




In the last two years, Fourvenues has secured €11 million in funding from top-tier U.S. investors, including Base10 Partners (Notion, Figma, Instacart) and FJ Labs (Stripe, Airbnb, Rappi). This investment fuels our ambitious growth strategy and strengthens our commitment to expanding in the U.S. with a cutting-edge, high-performance product.




At Fourvenues, we scale aggressively while maintaining disciplined unit economics and a long-term vision. We are not just building fast, we are building sustainably, ensuring that every step forward is backed by solid fundamentals. Our goal is to become the leading platform in the nightlife industry while creating a company that lasts.




We have the privilege of collaborating with renowned brands such as Pacha, BRESH, Cova Santa, BCM, Magic Room HK, Blackworks, Sonorama Medellin, Opium, and Gossip Doha. And we’re continuously signing new partnerships every month, presenting challenges that push us to deliver outstanding service.




If you’re at a point in your career where you’re ready to make an impact, unlock your full potential, and join a rapidly expanding company, this is the place for you.

title: Head of content - EdTech (French fluent 🇫🇷)
description:
What if your next playground was transforming a massive Personal Brand ecosystem into a global, iconic Company Brand? What about challenging the status quo of an entire industry and building a brand you can be proud of, and that will help millions of people?

Then you’ll love this.

We’re not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to follow a calendar. We’re looking for a Head of Content (Brand & Content).

Someone who understands that to win today, you don't just need "content", you need a Movement. You will have the freedom to propose bold, unconventional concepts and the resources to bring them to life immediately.

We need a strategist like you who will bridge the gap between David Laroche’s personal influence and Paradox’s institutional power.

A Brand Architect, capable of orchestrating a complex dual-strategy: scaling a personal brand while simultaneously building a standalone Company Brand that outlasts its founder.

A Creative Disruptor, you hate "best practices" because they lead to average results. You constantly hunt for the "Purple Cow", the angle, the format, or the story that no one else is daring to tell.

A "Doer" with Taste, you don't just float ideas in a meeting room. You script them, you drive them, and you ship them.

This is a full-time position, carried out remotely or from our beautiful offices in Dubaï or Lisbon. French and English fluency is required.

About Paradox

WHAT WE DO

At Paradox, we are convinced that greatness is trainable.

That’s why we want to empower people at scale, by leveraging cutting edge technologies like AI, and crafting user experiences with outstanding aesthetics.

We do that by merging :


 * Human Intelligence (coaches, peers, and mentors)
 * Structured Intelligence (protocols, mental models, rituals),
 * Technological Intelligence (AI personalization, feedback loops, adaptive journeys)
   
   

To create one seamless ecosystem: Paradox OS.

OUR BELIEFS

We believe self-help is broken.

Most learning platforms are used the same way : consuming generic theories, getting quick highs, ending with no real change.

At Paradox, we believe people deserve more.

More than content. More than motivation.

They deserve a system that knows them, one that adapts, challenges, and grows with them.

We believe that every human learns differently, and that technology can do more than entertain or save time.

It can translate insight into transformation, through AI personalization, lean experimentation, and deep psychological understanding.

Because learning shouldn’t just make you feel inspired for a day, it should change how you live, think, and create.

OUR VISION

At Paradox, we want to re-invent how people grow.

We do not build another course or coaching app but the Operating System for Greatness.

Founded by David Laroche, a creator followed by over 2 million people and known for his interviews with icons like Tony Parker, Mike Horn, Richard Branson, and Gad Elmaleh, Paradox aims to build something that will live beyond any individual (including its founder), for decades to come.

Our ambition is to compete with players like Mindvalley (150M ARR), but with a sharper vision, grounded protocols for achievers, people who want more for their life, refusing mediocrity.

To do that, we bring together designers, tech, coaches, and filmmakers to create learning experiences that are cinematic, precise, and effective.

We move fast, aim high, and hold ourselves to the standards of Apple, Spotify, and MasterClass. No fluff, focused on meaningful impact.

While others hide their numbers, we want to let our results speak loudly for us.

Get obsessed with transforming our clients’ lives and let those transformations be our marketing.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Transform a "Personal Brand" into a "Top-Tier Media".

You lead the Content Factory not by administrative management, but by creative authority. Your goal is to produce content that is so good, unique, and aligned with our values that it makes our competitors look outdated.

Your 4 Major Responsibilities


 * Architect the "Dual-Brand" Strategy
 * Build a symbiotic strategy where David Laroche’s personal brand and Paradox’s company brand reinforce each other without cannibalization.
 * Propose radical new formats (documentaries, reality shows, conceptual shorts) that shatter the boring codes of the "Self-Help" industry.
 * Define distinct, sharp editorial lines for each platform: Depth & Search for YouTube, Aesthetic & Vibe for Instagram, and Authority & Authenticity for LinkedIn.
 * Radical Concepting & End-to-End Delivery
 * Take responsibility for the entire production chain by writing the hooks, storyboarding the narrative, and ensuring the final cut matches the vision.
 * Deliver what you pitch: if your concept requires a specific motion designer, a drone operator, or a niche expert, you find them, hire them, and onboard them to bring the vision to life.
 * Treat David as the "Actor" on set: you ensure scripts, set, and direction are flawless so he can just show up, perform, and leave without any mental load, trusting you to handle every detail of the final output.
 * Command the Content Factory
 * Take full leadership of the internal content team (Factory Manager, Video Editors, Graphic Designers…) by setting the tempo, the culture, and the daily standards of excellence.
 * Provide high-level artistic direction and act as the final quality check; nothing gets published if it doesn't meet the "Paradox Standard" of aesthetics and storytelling.
 * Challenge the team to constantly upskill, pushing them for sharper cuts, better sound design, and stronger visual storytelling.
 * Fuel the Growth Engine
 * Treat content as our primary acquisition channel by collaborating with the Head of Growth to produce assets specifically designed to convert in Ads.
 * Analyze retention graphs, CTR, and CPL to iterate based on feedback, killing what fails and aggressively scaling what works.
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience


 * Proven Content Builder: You have successfully grown a media brand, a YouTube channel, or a personal brand to significant scale (100k+ followers or millions of views). You understand the mechanics of virality and retention.
 * Editorial Leadership: You have experience managing a creative team (editors, designers) and know how to give feedback that elevates a "good" video to a "masterpiece."
 * Elite Scripting Skills: You can show us scripts you wrote that performed. You know how to structure a narrative, write a hook that stops the scroll, and keep an audience engaged for 20+ minutes.
 * Performance Fluency: You have worked in environments where content had to drive business results (ads, launches, conversion), not just vanity metrics.
   
   

PERSONALITY


 * Intolerant to Mediocrity: You have "Taste." You are physically pained by a bad font, a clumsy cut, or a weak headline. You fight for the details that others ignore.
 * Psychology Obsessed: You don't just "make content"; you study human nature. You constantly ask why people click, why they share, and what emotion drives them.
 * A "Doer" with Authority: You command respect not by title, but by competence. You can jump into a project, write the script, direct the shoot, and fix the edit if needed.
 * No Ego, Just Impact: You don't fall in love with your ideas. You accept that even the best concepts can flop. When it happens, you don't take it personally; you analyze the data, pivot immediately, and ship the next concept with renewed energy.
   
   

Language

French: Native / Bilingual

English: Fluent English, you can hold a conversation on specific details with English-speaking colleagues.

Our chosen language for written communication is English.

IT MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

❌ If you need clarity before chaos — wrong place.

❌ If you prefer balance over intensity — wrong season.

❌ If you don't genuinely care about the topics we cover — wrong place.

❌ If you want to strategize without getting your hands dirty in scripting, directing, or the editing suite — wrong role.

WHY JOIN US ❤️

Help us market a product that fuses neuroscience, design, and AI to reinvent how humans grow.

Work with filmmakers, psychologists, engineers, and creatives obsessed with impact.

In the heart of our headquarters stands the 100 000 Dreams Wall,

Every photo on that wall is a life rewritten:

“I ran a marathon.”

“I started my company.”

“I found peace with my father.”

You will play a crucial role in the development of an Iconic Product.

Growth & Ambition


 * > 🏅Being surrounded by A-players who strive to perform
   
   

Impact & Meaning


 * > Playing a crucial role in the development of a company whose content and products will be used by millions of people
 * > Waking up in the morning feeling like you are making a difference is something!
   
   

We receive messages every day from clients who have successfully lost weight, quit smoking, reach a milestone in their business, built better relationships, and made positive changes in their lives.


 * > ❤️ Contributing to the Paradox Foundation (our non-profit), dedicated to empower teenagers
   
   

But that's not all, we believe that driven people deserve…

Freedom & Well Being 🗽


 * > 😎A company culture based on autonomy & accountability
 * > 🗽Flexible working hours
 * > 🌎A remote culture from day one with the freedom to work from wherever you want
 * > 🏤Magnificent office in Dubai, Paris, Lisbon - it feels like home :)
 * > 💻Work on Mac, for us it counts :)
 * > 🏀350€ per year paid by the company to take care of yourself ( for your gym, or dance class or whatever make you feel great)
 * > 📚150€ of books or education - At Paradox, we are learner lovers and we want to support you in that
 * > 🔥6 1:1coachings - A Paradox Coach supporting you on anything personal or professional, we want you to live your best life
   
   

How To Apply 📃

That job description resonated with you?

Click on "Apply for this position" and fill out a short questionnaire (7 to 8 minutes) to tell us more about yourself and send us your CV!

Hiring process

📃 A 6 to 8 minutes application survey.

💻 A 15-30 minutes video call with Timy, our HR, to assess the fit between the position, the company, and your own career path.

💻 A video-call focused on your career with Quentin, VP Marketing, to review your background & see how we can match your desires with our needs.

💻 A culture-fit video call to check in depth the alignment between you and our values and culture.

💼 Reference calls to get in-depth insights about how you work in different environments, make your onboarding easier, and give everybody on the team the insurance to be surrounded by A-Players.

🤗 Welcome aboard!

About Our Hiring Process

Our recruitment process is tailored to do our best to avoid that you or us realize that we’re not a perfect fit in two or six months. It might seem long, but every step serves a purpose and will allow us to get to know you better as much as it’ll help you understand more where you’ll be stepping in.

We also want you to have time to ask all of your questions regarding your job description, the long-term vision of your team and the company, our values, with the relevant interlocutor in front of you.

The steps mentioned above can be rearranged depending on yours and the interviewer’s availability.

If you’re not joining to tweak landing pages.

If you’re here to engineer behavioral change at scale, for millions.

Welcome to Paradox.

Let’s build the Operating System for Greatness.

title: General Manager - 5* Hotel
description:
We are seeking an experienced and visionary General Manager (GM) to lead the operations of our luxury 5-star hotel in Barcelona. The GM will be responsible for ensuring the highest levels of guest satisfaction, driving financial performance, and maintaining the property’s outstanding reputation in the market. This role requires exceptional leadership, strategic thinking, and operational expertise within the luxury hospitality sector.




Key Responsibilities:




 * Oversee all hotel operations, ensuring alignment with the brand’s high standards of luxury, service, and guest experience.
 * Lead, inspire, and manage department heads and hotel staff, fostering a culture of excellence, teamwork, and continuous improvement.
 * Set and execute the hotel’s strategic goals, ensuring alignment with corporate objectives and market trends.
 * Ensure the seamless day-to-day functioning of all departments.
 * Drive operational excellence by identifying areas for improvement in efficiency, cost management, and service delivery.
 * Foster a positive and productive working environment with a focus on employee engagement, satisfaction, and retention.




Key Qualifications:




 * Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
 * At least 5 years in a General Manager or senior leadership role within a 5-star property.
 * Strong understanding of the Barcelona market and local hospitality landscape.
 * Exceptional leadership and communication skills, with the ability to inspire and lead a diverse team.
 * Fluent in Spanish and English (Other language is a plus).
 * A guest-centric mindset with an eye for detail and innovation.
 * Ability to work under pressure, prioritize tasks, and deliver results in a fast-paced environment.







This role offers an exciting opportunity to lead a premier property in Barcelona’s vibrant hospitality sector, delivering exceptional service and guest experiences while driving business growth.

title: Director/a Clínica Dental
location: San Sebastián de los Reyes, Community of Madrid, Spain
description:
En Avodent (Alcobendas y San Sebastián de los Reyes) buscamos un/a Director/a que asuma la responsabilidad final de la clínica. No buscamos solo un gestor, sino un líder capaz de elevar el nivel de nuestro equipo a través de la formación y la supervisión directa.


Tus Responsabilidades Principales:


   
   
 * RRHH y Formación: Eres responsable de formar al personal (especialmente en Recepción y Atención al Paciente) en protocolos de venta, atención telefónica y trato al cliente. Coordinarás horarios, vacaciones y tareas, asegurando que cada empleado cumpla con sus funciones asignadas.
   
   
 * Gestión Comercial y Cierre: Realización de primeras visitas y cierre de presupuestos complejos, optimizando las herramientas de financiación.
   
   
 * Operativa y Procesos: Organización de la operativa diaria para un flujo ágil de pacientes y mejora continua del uso de Gesden.
   
   
 * Gestión Económica (KPIs): Control mensual de facturación, conversión, compras y costes en coordinación con la propiedad.
   
   


Requisitos:


   
   
 * Experiencia: Mínimo 3 años en dirección de clínicas dentales con personal a cargo.
   
   
 * Capacidad Formadora: Habilidad para transmitir conocimientos y estandarizar protocolos en el equipo.
   
   
 * Idiomas: Inglés.
   
   
 * Perfil: Persona metódica, con "mano izquierda" para liderar, orientada a resultados y con capacidad de apoyo al resto de puestos cuando la operativa lo requiera.
   
   
 * Software: Manejo avanzado de Gesden y herramientas de análisis de datos.
   
   


Ofrecemos:


   
   
 * Proyecto estable con alta autonomía para implementar mejoras.
   
   
 * Salario competitivo + incentivos por objetivos de clínica.
   
   
 * Horario: L-J (10:00-14:00 y 16:00-20:00) y V (10:00-13:30 y 15:30-19:00).

title: Head of Retail, Barcelona
description:
Serás responsable de liderar la estrategia de expansión internacional de retail y de supervisar el rendimiento de una red de tiendas en crecimiento, actualmente presente en varias ciudades europeas con nuevas aperturas ya firmadas. Se trata de un rol de liderazgo de alto impacto que combina expansión, operaciones y gestión de equipo.




Detalles del cliente



Compañía europea de consumer goods en pleno crecimiento, con un modelo de negocio omnicanal y una red de tiendas propia en expansión internacional. La organización se caracteriza por un enfoque digital-first, una marca con fuerte orientación al consumidor y una estrategia de retail muy dinámica.




Descripción de la oferta





 * Liderar la expansión internacional y coordinar la apertura de nuevas tiendas, garantizando una ejecución impecable y una correcta alineación entre los equipos internos y los socios externos (real estate, diseño, construcción, VM, marketing).
 * Definir, estandarizar e implementar procesos escalables que aseguren consistencia operativa y una puesta en marcha eficiente de cada nuevo punto de venta.
 * Impulsar el rendimiento comercial y la rentabilidad de toda la red, monitorizando KPIs, P&L, presupuestos y eficiencia de costes, asegurando una operación excelente y una experiencia de cliente coherente.
 * Optimizar la productividad de las tiendas, velar por la coherencia de la identidad de marca y garantizar una ejecución operativa homogénea a nivel internacional.
 * Liderar y desarrollar al equipo retail, incluyendo Area Managers y el equipo de headquarters, fortaleciendo la cultura de retail y estructurando la organización para un crecimiento futuro sostenible.
   



Perfil del candidato





 * Experiencia de más de 8 años gestionando tiendas y redes retail, requisito imprescindible para el rol.
 * Sólida trayectoria en expansión internacional y aperturas de nuevos puntos de venta.
 * Experiencia gestionando redes multicentro y supervisando su rendimiento.
 * Experiencia liderando equipos de campo (Area Managers) y equipos centrales de retail.

 * Formación universitaria en áreas como Business, Management o similares.
 * Inglés fluido (C1 o superior), considerado un requisito para la posición.
 * Disponibilidad para viajar internacionalmente
   



Oferta de empleo





 * Un rol con impacto directo en la expansión internacional y en la evolución operativa de la red de tiendas.
 * Un entorno dinámico, en crecimiento y con recorrido real para asumir mayor responsabilidad.
 * Un equipo ágil, colaborativo y orientado a la innovación.

Desired Skills and Experience

- Experiencia de más de 8 años gestionando tiendas y redes retail, requisito imprescindible para el rol.

title: Global Banker - Energy (VP)
description:
About the area:




We are looking for a team player, dynamic and proactive professional to join our Energy coverage team as a Vice President, based in Madrid.




In this role, you will be responsible for the Coverage of Global Clients within the Energy Sector in Spain, combining strong client coverage capabilities with deep industry insight and product knowledge.




About the role:




This role combines strong client coverage capabilities with deep industry insight and product knowledge, playing a central role in driving strategic relationship leadership, delivering fully integrated financial solutions, and ensuring seamless collaboration across internal teams.




Joining BBVA CIB means becoming part of a high-performing, globally connected platform with a strong track record in complex, cross-border transactions. Our Energy franchise leverages BBVA’s international footprint, allowing bankers to lead client relationships across multiple jurisdictions while coordinating seamlessly with product, risk and execution teams worldwide. The role offers the opportunity to work in an environment that values strategic thinking, collaboration and execution excellence, where coverage bankers play a central role in delivering fully integrated solutions to global clients navigating energy transition, regulation and market volatility.




Key Responsibilities:




 * Manage and grow a defined portfolio of global Energy clients with a focus on revenue growth, strategic engagement and long-term value creation.
 * Build and sustain trusted relationships with senior executives across client organisations.
 * Lead the development and execution of tailored business and coverage strategies for assigned clients in the Energy industry.
 * Identify and originate new business opportunities, driving profitable growth while expanding BBVA’s footprint in the Energy market.
 * Lead and coordinate cross-border client engagements, ensuring seamless execution across geographies by aligning coverage, product, risk and execution teams to deliver integrated global solutions.
 * Partner with product, risk, and execution teams to ensure disciplined, timely, and high-quality delivery of client solutions.
 * Maintain a robust pipeline, managing opportunity progression, forecasting, and revenue tracking to achieve targets.
 * Monitor global Energy market trends, regulation, and transition dynamics to inform strategic client dialogue and anticipate future needs.




What are we looking for?




 * 5–10 years of experience in Corporate & Investment Banking, with significant client coverage and business development experience.
 * Strong understanding of CIB products and their application to complex client needs.
 * Proven track record in leading strategic client engagements.
 * Excellent analytical, commercial, and risk assessment capabilities.
 * A collaborative, team-oriented mindset, with demonstrated ability to work effectively across functions and with the Spanish Energy team.
 * Experience or strong interest in sustainability and energy transition is highly valued.
 * Exceptional communication and presentation skills.
 * Fluent in English and Spanish.
 * Advanced proficiency in Google Workspace (Slides, Sheets, Docs).




This position will require the candidate to have a valid Mifid certification. In case the candidate is not certified, they will have to obtain the pertaining certification upon the incorporation to the role.

title: Head of Growth
description:
Join Proton and build a better internet where privacy is the default

Proton is one of Europe’s fastest growing scale-ups, serving more than 100 million users around the world. Since the launch of our first service – Proton Mail – in 2014 by scientists who met at CERN, Proton now provides an ecosystem of well-known services such as Proton VPN, Proton Drive (encrypted file storage), Proton Pass (encrypted password manager) and much more.

Our mission is to build a more ethical and responsible alternative to Big Tech services, with a focus on end-to-end encryption, privacy, open-source and ease-of-use. Our user-first approach has helped Proton grow organically to serve millions of consumers and businesses around the world, with users from organisations including The Guardian, The New York Times and the UN. Proton does not have venture capital investors, is profitable and self-sufficient, and today has over 500 employees representing over 40 nationalities. We're headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland, with additional offices in Zurich, London, Paris, Barcelona, Taipei, Skopje, Vilnius and Prague.

As one of Europe's fastest-growing companies, we offer the chance to tackle complex challenges, influence millions and shape a more equitable internet. We want to create more than just one of the world's most impactful tech companies: we want to create a new internet that serves the interests of all people. We need you, your voice, your ideas and your ambition to make it happen.

Purpose of the role

We are looking for a Head of Growth to spearhead all growth activities for the Proton's Mail & Calendar product. You will identify the growth levers and build the roadmap with other senior stakeholders (engineering, product, marketing) to enable the business unit to achieve its growth objectives. This is a high profile role which will have a concrete impact on one of our key products.

What You Will Do



 * Manage growth, acquisition, and retention strategies and execution across all marketing channels for Proton
 * Develop go-to-market plans, pricing strategies plans and business models to support the revenue growth of our business units
 * Define & champion Proton's target audiences, messaging, and positioning.
 * Master the competitive landscape and evaluate market gaps and business development opportunities.
 * Act as the users’ advocate and the voice of the market, synthesizing customer feedback into actionable insights to inform future product development
 * Optimize conversion rates across the board, including landing pages, upgrade pages, renewal pages, and any other touchpoint for our products
 * Own and drive the business metrics of the organization.
 * Facilitate hand-in-hand collaboration between growth, product, engineering, marketing and data to align on the vision and the execution.
   
   
   

Job Requirements



 * Extensive proven experience in driving product revenue growth.
 * We are looking for a candidate with extensive B2C/B2B background in SaaS (tech) product
 * Exceptional project and program management. You need to be good at leadership by influence, as there will people outside of your reporting line that you must be able to motivate and inspire towards achieving your vision
 * You need to be hands on. Proton’s culture is not corporate, and we expect our leaders to lead from the front
 * Analytical and data driven. This is important at Proton, and we welcome candidates with scientific or engineering backgrounds who now work in marketing or growth.
 * 360° business acumen in marketing, sales and finance.
 * Cost-efficient mindset. Proton is a bootstrapped startup. We’re creative and efficient, because that’s how we will win in the long run.
 * Ability to think outside the box. We are looking for creative individuals who aren't scared to make bold decisions that will move the needle.
   
   
   

Why Proton:



 * Work with the best – Hiring at Proton is extremely selective. We believe that small teams with exceptional talent will always outperform larger teams with more bureaucracy. Build quickly with smart people from some of the world’s top universities and organisations who are here because they want to get things done.
 * Grow with us – As one of Europe’s fastest growing tech companies, we provide opportunities for rapid career advancement. We prefer to promote from within whenever possible.
 * Do work that matters – Proton’s services are at the forefront of defending freedom and democracy around the world, and our work helps save the lives of journalists and activists working on the front lines.
 * Be part of a movement – Proton is not just world-class products and services; we are also leaders of a broader community-driven movement advancing a more socially responsible way of doing business online. Whether it’s through maintaining the core open-source libraries used by thousands of other businesses or providing financial/technological support to aligned organisations, your work will have an outsized impact on the world.
 * Benefits – in addition to flexible working hours and career growth support, Proton offers other benefits such as free lunch at the office (or dinner, if needed) along with a supportive, tight-knit in-person office culture. All team members can also be shareholders, with the opportunity to gain outsized financial rewards for our success together.
   
   
   

Check our social media to learn more about Proton:

LinkedIn ,Reddit ,X, YouTube

Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

At Proton, we believe diversity drives innovation and strengthens our mission to provide privacy as a default for all. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment where all individuals, regardless of race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, physical ability, or socio-economic background, feel valued and empowered. We strive to create equal opportunities, promote open dialogue, and support continuous learning to ensure every voice is heard and respected.

If you need any extra support or reasonable adjustments during the hiring process, please let your talent partner know.

Candidate Privacy Notice

When you apply for a position, refer a candidate, or are considered for a role at Proton Technologies AG (Proton, we, us, or our), your information is stored in Greenhouse, in accordance with their Service Privacy Policy. This information is used to evaluate your suitability for the posted position. We also retain this information for consideration for future roles that you may apply for or that we believe may align with your background and skills.

If we no longer have a legitimate business need to process your information, we will either delete or anonymize it. Should you have any inquiries about how we use or manage your information, or if you wish to access, correct, or delete your data, please contact our privacy team.

Proton does not accept unsolicited resumes from any sources other than directly from candidates. We will not pay a fee for any placement resulting from an unsolicited offer, even if the candidate is subsequently hired by Proton.

To learn more about our privacy policy, please visit our privacy policy page.

title: Head of B2B Sales – DACH
description:
