 * Identificación de necesidades y oportunidades de venta.
 * Desarrollo y seguimiento del pipeline comercial.
 * Análisis básico de mercado, precios y competidores.
 * Reporte de actividad y oportunidades a Dirección General.




Requisitos:

 * Experiencia previa en desarrollo comercial o ventas B2B.
 * Entorno industrial, metal, manufactura o servicios industriales (muy valorable).
 * Comodidad con el trabajo en campo y la prospección activa.
 * Capacidad para mantener conversaciones técnicas y comerciales.
 * Perfil estructurado, constante y orientado a resultados.




Interesados: Enviar CV a jimena.rode@almeco.es

title: Director/a de Recursos Humanos
description:
¿Te gustaría liderar el área de Recursos Humanos de una compañía industrial con una amplia y consolidada red de delegaciones en toda la península?




Buscamos incorporar a un/a Director/a de Recursos Humanos que impulse el área y acompañe a la organización en un momento decisivo de crecimiento.




Si eres un perfil generalista en Recursos Humanos, con una fuerte base en relaciones laborales y gestión de empleados, este es tu proyecto. Tendrás un papel estratégico en la negociación y en el alineamiento entre la compañía y los equipos, convirtiéndote en una figura clave para seguir construyendo una organización sólida y cohesionada.




En este rol liderarás la estrategia integral de Recursos Humanos a nivel nacional, gestionando y fortaleciendo las relaciones laborales; negociaciones colectivas, interlocución con comités y seguimiento de convenio. Acompañarás a las delegaciones en la implantación de las políticas de RRHH y la cultura corporativa, y promoverás un clima laboral positivo que impulse relaciones fluidas y constructivas. También coordinarás con tu equipo los procesos de selección, formación, desarrollo y evaluación del talento, participarás en proyectos de transformación y mejora continua en un entorno en expansión y viajarás regularmente a las distintas delegaciones para ofrecer apoyo presencial.




Pensamos en alguien con formación universitaria en Derecho o Relaciones Laborales, que cuente con al menos cinco años de experiencia en un puesto similar dentro de entornos con gran volumen de personal. Sólido conocimiento de la normativa laboral y experiencia demostrable en negociación. Además, pensamos en una persona organizada, cercana y con una orientación clara hacia las personas. La flexibilidad para viajar y la capacidad para liderar con visión estratégica son esenciales para este reto.




Formarás parte de una empresa en pleno crecimiento y con una gran proyección futura, dentro de un proyecto estable, estratégico y con impacto real en la organización. Te incorporarás a un entorno dinámico y retador que valora la iniciativa, la cercanía y el liderazgo humano.

title: Senior Director, Product Strategy & Execution
description:
About Us

At Nextlane, we don’t just develop software solutions – we create the future of the automotive industry.

We are a company that combines advanced technology with a clear vision: simplifying and digitizing every step of the automotive customer journey, empowering manufacturers and dealerships to thrive in a constantly evolving market.

We believe in the value of every team member, offering opportunities for you to develop and contribute to meaningful solutions.

So… What does it mean to be a #Nextlaner?


 * Be part of a growth-oriented culture.
 * Collaborate with colleagues from all over the world.
 * Believe in the power of ideas and the diversity of thought.
 * Be committed to providing an environment where you can learn, grow, and collaborate on projects that make a global impact.
   
   

Our success is measured not just by results, but also by the growth and satisfaction of those who are part of our company.

At Nextlane, you’ll have the opportunity to innovate, push boundaries, and work on solutions that are transforming the automotive world.

Your Responsibilities

As a key member of the team, you will be responsible for:


 * Supporting the definition, stress-testing, and execution of product and technology strategy across Nextlane’s portfolio, working closely with the CTPO and senior product leaders.
 * Translating strategic objectives into clear multi-year plans, annual priorities, and executable roadmaps, ensuring assumptions, dependencies, and trade-offs are explicit and understood.
 * Driving portfolio-level planning and prioritisation across DMS, CRM, Platform, and Cloud use cases, supporting capital allocation and sequencing decisions.
 * Developing, reviewing, and challenging business cases for major initiatives, including revenue impact, cost-to-serve efficiency, delivery cost, risk, and payback timelines.
 * Strengthening product readiness and execution predictability through realistic capacity planning, dependency management, and risk tracking.
 * Helping define and evolve the product operating model, planning cadence, governance, and performance visibility through dashboards and decision-grade metrics.
 * Acting as a trusted partner to the CTPO in executive and investor-level communication, including board materials and strategic narratives.
 * Supporting and constructively challenging senior product leaders to raise the bar on strategic clarity, operational rigor, and outcome focus.
 * Contributing to long-term portfolio evolution and platform convergence initiatives, supporting a more unified, platform-led product organisation.
   
   

What We're Looking For


 * Experience:
   
   

Proven senior experience in product strategy, product operations, or product leadership enablement at Director or Senior Director level within SaaS or other mission-critical enterprise software environments.

Experience in complex, multi-product portfolios, ideally in transformation or legacy-heavy contexts. Exposure to PE-backed or investor-driven environments is highly valued.


 * Languages:
   
   

English: Fluent (interview will be conducted in English).

Second European language preferred (e.g. French or Spanish).


 * Communication:
   
   

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce executive-level narratives, board materials, and influence senior stakeholders without direct authority.


 * Technical Skills:
   
   

Strong understanding of modern product development models, Product–Engineering collaboration, platform architectures, delivery constraints, and portfolio-level planning.

Comfortable developing, assessing, and defending business cases with clear articulation of ROI, risk, and strategic rationale.


 * Interpersonal Skills:
   
   

Ability to collaborate across Product, Engineering, Finance, GTM, Support, Professional Services, and Executive Leadership in complex, matrixed, and international environments.

Our Recruitment Process


 * 15-minute introductory call with our Talent Acquisition Specialist.
 * Interviews with C-level executives and Product VPs to evaluate strategic alignment and leadership fit.
 * Case study / business scenario presentation.
 * Final cultural fit interview.
   
   

What We Offer

We understand that flexibility and trust are essential for our teams. Here are some of the benefits we offer:


 * 🏡 Remote Work: Up to 3 days a week.
 * Work-life balance: Flexible entrance and departure times.
 * Summer schedule on Fridays: Start your weekends early.
 * 🤝 Referral Bonus: €1500 for every talent you refer (after 6 months).
 * 🍱 Flexible Remuneration: COBEE platform.
 * ⚕️ Private Medical Insurance: Adeslas.
 * 📚 Continuous Learning: Access to our internal platform for continuous development.
 * 🌴 Vacation: 23 vacation days plus an intensive schedule in July and August.
 * Teambuilding: Our afterworks and activities are memorable.
   
   

Diversity, Inclusion & Belonging

At Nextlane, we are committed to creating a space where everyone feels valued and respected. We firmly believe that diversity in experiences and backgrounds strengthens our culture and drives innovation.


 * Support for people with disabilities. If you need any adjustments during the recruitment process, let us know so we can provide the best possible experience.
 * Equal opportunities for all: We welcome applications regardless of age, gender, origin, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law.
   
   

Join Nextlane and become part of the technological revolution in the automotive industry.

Discover why we are a great place to develop your talent!

title: Dirección Asociada en Barcelona
description:
GRUPO DATA la formamos personas con perfiles muy diversos:




 * Técnicos, Consultores, Comerciales, Formadores… y una amplia red nacional de profesionales que se encuentran perfectamente capacitados para la prestación de servicios.




En GRUPO DATA tenemos un crecimiento PRESENCIAL a nivel nacional, con el objetivo de continuar siendo un referente en el sector, y es por eso que seleccionamos un perfil personal y profesional, que tenga o quiera tener una OFICINA AUTÓNOMA dentro de una contrastada organización empresarial.




Queremos una persona que aporte aquello que consideramos requisito imprescindible para lograr nuestros objetivos, TRABAJO, HONESTIDAD Y AMBICIÓN.




Tras un proceso de adaptación, y en dependencia directa con la Dirección Territorial, el/la profesional seleccionad@ será quien se responsabilice de la gestión de la firma, la cartera de clientes y colaboradores generada, así como del crecimiento de la firma en la delimitación zonal asignada.




Necesitamos a alguien como nosotros, que tenga:




 * Perfil Comercial, que nos permita continuar con el crecimiento en la provincia.
 * Perfil Técnico, para poder realizar la transmisión de la calidad que acostumbramos.
 * Perfil Representativo, ya que ha de mantener la cartera actual de la empresa en su zona.
 * Capacidad Económica que aplique al crecimiento de su empresa con los requisitos necesarios. Es necesaria una inversión económica para garantizar el desarrollo de negocio.




Aunque no es necesaria, se valorará una cartera de clientes Activa que pueda aportar a la empresa o que pueda complementar con nuestros servicios.




En dependencia directa con la dirección Territorial, la DIRECCIÓN ASOCIADA, se responsabilizará de la gestión de la compañía en la zona asignada.




NECESITAMOS un/a SOCI@ PARA EL DESARROLLO DE NUESTRO NEGOCIO, UNA PERSONA CON LA QUE COMPARTIR NUESTRA EMPRESA.




Se estudiarán alternativas para poder realizar la apertura en otras ciudades de la provincia que forma la DIRECCIÓN ASOCIADA en función de las características de las candidaturas.

title: Head Of Growth - EdTech (Full remote - French fluent 🇫🇷)
description:
Are you obsessed with turning insights into measurable growth?

What if your experiments didn’t just lift conversions but shaped how millions of people grow, learn, and act on their potential?

This Isn’t Another Growth Job.

It’s the chance to define a new category : The EcoSystem for Human Greatness Augmented with AI, combining behavioral science, technology, and AI.

We’re not looking for someone who only advises on what to test, we’re looking for someone who builds it.

A hands-on Head Of Growth who can ideate, copy, design the strategy and launch experiments directly.

Someone who speaks both data and persuasion fluently, and leverages AI tools daily to generate hypotheses, build assets, and accelerate iteration speed.

And you deserve it because you are…


 * A Conversion Architect, skilled at diagnosing funnel bottlenecks and translating data into structured experimentation roadmaps that deliver measurable business outcomes.
 * A Behavioral Strategist, fascinated by what drives human action, able to mix cognitive psychology, UX, and persuasion frameworks to design experiences that convert because they resonate.
 * A Data-driven Creator, fluent in GA4, Hotjar, AB Tasty, VWO, Amplitude, not just running tests, but connecting insights to revenue, retention, and lifetime value.
   
   

This is a full-time position, carried out remotely or from our beautiful offices in Dubaï or Lisbon.

About Paradox

French and English fluency is required.

What We Do

At Paradox, we are convinced that greatness is trainable.

That’s why we want to empower people at scale, by leveraging cutting edge technologies like AI, and crafting user experiences with outstanding aesthetics.

We do that by merging :


 * Human Intelligence (coaches, peers, and mentors)
 * Structured Intelligence (protocols, mental models, rituals),
 * Technological Intelligence (AI personalization, feedback loops, adaptive journeys)
   
   

To create one seamless ecosystem: Paradox OS.

OUR BELIEFS

We believe self-help is broken.

Most learning platforms are used the same way : consuming generic theories, getting quick highs, ending with no real change.

At Paradox, we believe people deserve more.

More than content. More than motivation.

They deserve a system that knows them, one that adapts, challenges, and grows with them.

We believe that every human learns differently, and that technology can do more than entertain or save time.

It can translate insight into transformation, through AI personalization, lean experimentation, and deep psychological understanding.

Because learning shouldn’t just make you feel inspired for a day, it should change how you live, think, and create.

OUR VISION

At Paradox, we want to re-invent how people grow.

We do not build another course or coaching app but the Operating System for Greatness.

Founded by David Laroche, a creator followed by over 2 million people and known for his interviews with icons like Tony Parker, Mike Horn, Richard Branson, and Gad Elmaleh, Paradox aims to build something that will live beyond any individual (including its founder), for decades to come.

Our ambition is to compete with players like Mindvalley (150M ARR), but with a sharper vision, grounded protocols for achievers, people who want more for their life, refusing mediocrity.

To do that, we bring together designers, tech, coaches, and filmmakers to create learning experiences that are cinematic, precise, and effective.

We move fast, aim high, and hold ourselves to the standards of Apple, Spotify, and MasterClass. No fluff, focused on meaningful impact.

While others hide their numbers, we want to let our results speak loudly for us.

Get obsessed with transforming our clients’ lives and let those transformations be our marketing.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Architect and pilot the Revenue Engine. You will transition Paradox from a founder-led marketing approach to a brand-led, repeatable, data-driven engine.

You don't just manage a team, you get your hands dirty to identify growth levers and pull them yourself. Your obsession: taking a funnel, dismantling it, and rebuilding it to convert 2x better. You lead from the front, testing hypotheses, launching new channels, and showing the team how it's done.

Your Key Responsibilities


 * Offer–Market Fit continuously assessed, refined, repositioned, and launched
 * Identify which segments an offer truly works for and which it doesn’t.
 * Refine, reposition, or stop offers based on evidence.
   
   

2. Architect Funnels and campaigns (Hands-On)


 * You don't just "request" new funnels, you map them out and oversee their implementation directly.
 * You set up the tracking, you check the flows, and you ensure the machine works before managing budget scaling.
 * Relentless Optimization (CRO & A/B Testing)
 * You design, launch, and analyze A/B tests yourself (headlines, pricing, offers…). You don't wait for a report, you dig into the data to find the winner.
 * You proactively hunt for friction points in the user journey. If a page isn't converting, you audit it, propose a fix, and implement the test immediately with the team.
 * Design, launch, and analyze experiments across funnels, pricing, messaging
 * Ensure tracking, data integrity, and learnings compound over time
 * Channel Exploration & Scaling
 * While Yann manages our core Paid Social (Meta), your job is to overview Yann’s work and identify the next winning acquisition channels to maximize Profitability and Volume (ROI/ROAS).
 * You are the "Client" of the Content Factory. You analyze ad performance, provide data-backed briefs to the Content Strategist and identify winning angles quickly to scale them aggressively.
 * Growth Loops
 * Design and optimize growth loops (product, retention, referral, content → product → content)
 * Diagnose growth across acquisition, activation, sales alignment, retention, and expansion
 * Identify where growth is constrained and why
 * "Player-Coach" Leadership
 * You manage the Growth team (Paid, Copy, Web, PMM) by showing them the standard of excellence. You are their sparring partner for strategy, copy angles, and technical execution.
 * You’re responsible to build your team by sourcing talents, to manage them, to train them and to stop with them while necessary.
 * Sales Alignment & Revenue Quality
 * Your metric isn't just "Leads generated", it's "Appointments held" and "Deals closed". You set up a tight feedback loop with the Sales Team Lead to adjust targeting based on lead quality.
 * You prioritize High-Intent leads over cheap volume. You stop campaigns that bring tire-kickers, even if the CPL is low.
   
   

Tools you’ll master:

GA4, Optibase, Wefblow, Vidalytics, Clarity, Hotjar, Amplitude, Figma, Looker Studio, VWO, Optimizely, and whatever helps you see what others miss.

You’ll own KPIs :


 * LTV / CAC ratio
 * Funnel conversion rates by stage
 * X experiments launched per week
   
   

Desired Outcomes


 * Conversion Rates 2× better than baseline
 * Growth experimentation runs continuously
 * A Predictable Growth Engine
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience


 * You have ideally a minimum of 3 years of experience in Conversion Rate Optimization, Growth Experimentation, or Performance Marketing, ideally within SaaS, e-commerce, or digital product environments.
 * You have a track record of designing, implementing, and scaling A/B and multivariate tests that have generated measurable improvements in revenue, user activation, or conversion.
   
   

Competencies


 * Growth Diagnosis & System Thinking
 * Persuasion & Behavioral Insight
 * Analytical
   
   

Personality


 * Curiosity: You relentlessly dig into why users behave the way they do until you uncover the insight behind the data.
 * Hands-On Execution
 * Precision: You care about clarity in hypotheses, clean data, and unambiguous results.
 * Agility: You move fast, adapt instantly to new findings, and turn insights into tests within hours, not weeks.
   
   

Language

French: Native / Bilingual

English: Fluent English, you can hold a conversation on specific details with English-speaking colleagues.

Our chosen language for written communication is English.

IT MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

❌ If you need clarity before chaos — wrong place.

❌ If you prefer balance over intensity — wrong season.

❌ If you build to deliver, not to elevate — wrong mission.

❌ If you want to optimize without getting your hands dirty in Webflow, copy, or design — wrong role.

WHY JOIN US ❤️

Help us market a product that fuses neuroscience, design, and AI to reinvent how humans grow.

Work with filmmakers, psychologists, engineers, and creatives obsessed with impact.

In the heart of our headquarters stands the 100 000 Dreams Wall,

Every photo on that wall is a life rewritten:

“I ran a marathon.”

“I started my company.”

“I found peace with my father.”

You will play a crucial role in the development of an Iconic Product.

Growth & Ambition


 * > 🏅Being surrounded by A-players who strive to perform
   
   

Impact & Meaning


 * > Playing a crucial role in the development of a company whose content and products will be used by millions of people
 * > Waking up in the morning feeling like you are making a difference is something!
   
   

We receive messages every day from clients who have successfully lost weight, quit smoking, reach a milestone in their business, built better relationships, and made positive changes in their lives.


 * > ❤️ Contributing to the Paradox Foundation (our non-profit), dedicated to empower teenagers
   
   

But that's not all, we believe that driven people deserve…

Freedom & Well Being 🗽


 * > 😎A company culture based on autonomy & accountability
 * > 🗽Flexible working hours
 * > 🌎A remote culture from day one with the freedom to work from wherever you want
 * > 🏤Magnificent office in Dubai, Paris, Lisbon - it feels like home :)
 * > 💻Work on Mac, for us it counts :)
 * > 🏀350€ per year paid by the company to take care of yourself ( for your gym, or dance class or whatever make you feel great)
 * > 📚150€ of books or education - At Paradox, we are learner lovers and we want to support you in that
 * > 🔥6 1:1coachings - A Paradox Coach supporting you on anything personal or professional, we want you to live your best life
   
   

HIRING PROCESS 📃

📃 A 6 to 8 minutes application survey.

💻 A 15-30 minutes video call with Timy, our HR, to assess the fit between the position, the company, and your own career path.

💻 A video-call focused on your career with Quentin, VP Marketing, to review your background & see how we can match your desires with our needs.

💻 A culture-fit video call to check in depth the alignment between you and our values and culture.

💼 Reference calls to get in-depth insights about how you work in different environments, make your onboarding easier, and give everybody on the team the insurance to be surrounded by A-Players.

🤗 Welcome aboard!

If you’re not joining to tweak landing pages.

If you’re here to engineer behavioral change at scale, for millions.

Welcome to Paradox.

Let’s build the Operating System for Greatness.

title: DIRECTOR/A EXCELENCIA OPERACIONAL
description:
CL Grupo Industrial es un holding de 26 empresas y más de 3.000 empleados que está presente en sectores como packaging, químico, siderúrgico o energías renovables.




En estos momentos queremos incorporar un/a Director/a de Excelencia Operacional.




Esta persona se responsabilizará de la optimización de los procesos productivos de las diferentes empresas del grupo, buscando la eficiencia, la mejora de calidad y la rentabilidad del negocio.




Las funciones a desarrollar incluyen:




 * Mapeo y rediseño de procesos:




Documentación y estandarización.

Análisis de eficiencia y cuellos de botella.

Identificar ineficiencias, problemas operativos y oportunidades de optimización en coordinación con las plantas.

Proponer soluciones que generen ahorros, aumenten la productividad y mejoren la calidad.




 * Coordinación de Equipos de Mejora en Planta:




Supervisión y alineación de los equipos de mejora de las plantas.

Seguimiento de proyectos en curso en cada planta.

Facilitación de buenas prácticas entre plantas.

Soporte metodológico y técnico a los equipos operativos.

Asegurar la correcta aplicación de metodologías como Lean,y 5S.




 * Liderazgo de Proyectos de Cambio:




Dirigir la implementación de mejoras, asegurando el cumplimiento de objetivos, plazos y resultados.

Formar a los equipos en nuevas formas de trabajo, fomentando una cultura participativa de mejora continua.

Medición del impacto del cambio




 * Identificación de oportunidades de automatización (RPA, BPM):




 * Calidad y Auditoría Interna:




Control de calidad de procesos y productos.

Auditorías internas para asegurar cumplimiento de estándares.

Gestión de no conformidades y planes de acción.




 * Innovación Operativa:




Benchmarking y análisis de tendencias de los competidores de CL Grupo Industrial por cada unidad de negocio.




Los requisitos de la posición incluyen:




Titulación universitaria en Ingeniería Industrial, Organización, Producción, o similar.

Valorable: Máster Máster en Lean Manufacturing .Máster en Gestión de la Calidad. Máster en Mejora Continua

Idiomas: Inglés fluido

Mínimo de 10 años de experiencia en mejora continua, gestión de procesos o roles similares.




 * Dominio de metodologías de mejora continua: Lean, Six Sigma, 5S, Kaizen.
 * Conocimiento en análisis de procesos, mapeo de flujos de valor (VSM) y eliminación de desperdicios.
 * Capacidad para liderar proyectos de transformación operativa.
 * Manejo de herramientas de análisis de datos y KPIs (Excel avanzado, Power BI, ERP).
 * Gestión de proyectos (PMI, Agile, Scrum – deseable).
 * Conocimientos en automatización de procesos y digitalización industrial.
 * Capacidad para medir ROI, productividad, eficiencia y calidad.
sector: IT System Data Services and Industrial Machinery Manufacturing

title: DIRECTOR/A TIENDA OLOT
description:
Vols treballar en una empresa on poder créixer professionalment i tenir l'oportunitat de formar, liderar i desenvolupar el teu propi equip?

Ametller Origen és una empresa en plena fase d'expansió i molt dinàmica, on tindràs la llibertat de poder proposar/implantar noves idees i treballar conjuntament amb l'equip per arribar als objectius establerts.

Quina serà la teva missió a Ametller Origen?

Gestionar la teva botiga oferint el millor servei i producte al client a l'hora que lideres el teu equip per tal de formar-lo i ajudar-lo a créixer com a professionals de producte fresc.

Com ho faràs?


 * Cuidaràs i desenvoluparàs al personal vetllant pel seu creixement
 * Transmetràs i enfocaràs a l'equip en els eixos i estratègies de la companyia per tal d'aconseguir els objectius establerts.
 * Portaràs a terme anàlisis comercials detectant punts de millora per tal de millorar els resultats i objectius de la teva botiga.
 * Formaràs i donaràs eines a l'equip perquè siguin autònoms.
   
   

Què et farà triomfar en aquesta posició?


 * La teva experiència en gestió d'equips serà fonamental per poder liderar i acompanyar al teu equip.
 * Experiència en gestió íntegra d'un negoci/botiga per tal de poder fer anàlisis comercials en funció dels eixos estratègics de la companyia.
 * Ser una persona inconformista i reptadora, habituada a treballar amb objectius de vendes i KPIS.
 * Que siguis una persona resolutiva per poder gestionar de forma integral un punt de venda
 * Tenir flexibilitat horària per poder adaptar-te als horaris i necessitats de botiga.
   
   

Com serà el procés de selecció?


 * En la primera fase, faràs una entrevista amb RRHH on t'explicarem el nostre projecte, les funcions a desenvolupar i les condicions que et podem oferir.
 * En la segona fase faràs una entrevista amb el gerent de zona, és a dir, el teu responsable directe per conèixer-lo i poder aclarir els teus dubtes.
 * En la tercera fase faràs l'entrevista final amb el director de Retail.
   
   

Per què treballar a Ametller Origen?


 * Lideratge: T’encarregaràs de la selecció, formació i integració del teu personal. Seràs el responsable de detectar i fidelitzar el teu equip motivant i desenvolupar-los per tal que siguin unes grans professionals del producte fresc.
 * La teva veu té protagonisme! Tindràs la llibertat per proposar i portar a terme noves idees. Et donarem la confiança per accedir i impactar en el nostre compte d'explotació i et donarem autonomia per apostar i establir plans d'acció en qualsevol secció de la botiga.
 * Tots som una pinya: Treballaràs amb un ambient de confiança i bon rotllo dins les botigues, que transmetem també en els nostres clients.
 * Cuidaràs el medi ambient i la salut dels nostres clients. Treballem amb productes de proximitat, sense químics i de temporada, assegurant la màxima qualitat i servei.
 * Integració a l’ofici per assegurar el teu èxit: Un cop comencis amb nosaltres, escollirem les millors botigues de la zona per formar-te durant els primers mesos. D'aquesta manera, podràs aprendre i adaptar-te molt millor a la nostra manera de treballar.
 * T’acompanyem en el teu creixement: Tenim establert un Pla de carrera per optar a nous reptes professionals fent el salt a botigues de més facturació, volums i objectius reptadors! També ens assegurarem d’acompanyar-te amb formacions d’especialització perquè siguis un expert en producte fresc i líder de botiga.
 * A la teva disposició teva tindràs aquests beneficis
 * Assegurança de salut amb cobertura dental
 * Servei de nutrició i dietètica
 * Descompte del 7% en la teva compra i accés a descomptes exclusius per Ametllerencs/ques!
   
   

I molts altres descomptes i beneficis!


 * Estabilitat laboral: Oferim un contracte indefinit (6 mesos de prova) amb un sou fix mensual i un programa d'incentius molt atractiu cada quadrimestre. A més, premiarem la teva capacitat de generar talent a la teva botiga amb bonificacions importants.
   
   

Si vols treballar en una empresa on puguis créixer professionalment, liderar un equip i superar objectius diaris de la teva botiga.

No t'ho pensis més, et volem conèixer!

Vols formar part del nostre equip?

And you deserve it because you are…


 * A Conversion Architect, skilled at diagnosing funnel bottlenecks and translating data into structured experimentation roadmaps that deliver measurable business outcomes.
 * A Behavioral Strategist, fascinated by what drives human action, able to mix cognitive psychology, UX, and persuasion frameworks to design experiences that convert because they resonate.
 * A Data-driven Creator, fluent in GA4, Hotjar, AB Tasty, VWO, Amplitude, not just running tests, but connecting insights to revenue, retention, and lifetime value.
   
   

This is a full-time position, carried out remotely or from our beautiful offices in Dubaï or Lisbon.

About Paradox

French and English fluency is required.

What We Do

At Paradox, we are convinced that greatness is trainable.

That’s why we want to empower people at scale, by leveraging cutting edge technologies like AI, and crafting user experiences with outstanding aesthetics.

We do that by merging :


 * Human Intelligence (coaches, peers, and mentors)
 * Structured Intelligence (protocols, mental models, rituals),
 * Technological Intelligence (AI personalization, feedback loops, adaptive journeys)
   
   

To create one seamless ecosystem: Paradox OS.

OUR BELIEFS

We believe self-help is broken.

Most learning platforms are used the same way : consuming generic theories, getting quick highs, ending with no real change.

At Paradox, we believe people deserve more.

More than content. More than motivation.

They deserve a system that knows them, one that adapts, challenges, and grows with them.

We believe that every human learns differently, and that technology can do more than entertain or save time.

It can translate insight into transformation, through AI personalization, lean experimentation, and deep psychological understanding.

Because learning shouldn’t just make you feel inspired for a day, it should change how you live, think, and create.

OUR VISION

At Paradox, we want to re-invent how people grow.

We do not build another course or coaching app but the Operating System for Greatness.

Founded by David Laroche, a creator followed by over 2 million people and known for his interviews with icons like Tony Parker, Mike Horn, Richard Branson, and Gad Elmaleh, Paradox aims to build something that will live beyond any individual (including its founder), for decades to come.

Our ambition is to compete with players like Mindvalley (150M ARR), but with a sharper vision, grounded protocols for achievers, people who want more for their life, refusing mediocrity.

To do that, we bring together designers, tech, coaches, and filmmakers to create learning experiences that are cinematic, precise, and effective.

We move fast, aim high, and hold ourselves to the standards of Apple, Spotify, and MasterClass. No fluff, focused on meaningful impact.

While others hide their numbers, we want to let our results speak loudly for us.

Get obsessed with transforming our clients’ lives and let those transformations be our marketing.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Architect and pilot the Revenue Engine. You will transition Paradox from a founder-led marketing approach to a brand-led, repeatable, data-driven engine.

You don't just manage a team, you get your hands dirty to identify growth levers and pull them yourself. Your obsession: taking a funnel, dismantling it, and rebuilding it to convert 2x better. You lead from the front, testing hypotheses, launching new channels, and showing the team how it's done.

Your Key Responsibilities


 * Offer–Market Fit continuously assessed, refined, repositioned, and launched
 * Identify which segments an offer truly works for and which it doesn’t.
 * Refine, reposition, or stop offers based on evidence.
   
   

2. Architect Funnels and campaigns (Hands-On)


 * You don't just "request" new funnels, you map them out and oversee their implementation directly.
 * You set up the tracking, you check the flows, and you ensure the machine works before managing budget scaling.
 * Relentless Optimization (CRO & A/B Testing)
 * You design, launch, and analyze A/B tests yourself (headlines, pricing, offers…). You don't wait for a report, you dig into the data to find the winner.
 * You proactively hunt for friction points in the user journey. If a page isn't converting, you audit it, propose a fix, and implement the test immediately with the team.
 * Design, launch, and analyze experiments across funnels, pricing, messaging
 * Ensure tracking, data integrity, and learnings compound over time
 * Channel Exploration & Scaling
 * While Yann manages our core Paid Social (Meta), your job is to overview Yann’s work and identify the next winning acquisition channels to maximize Profitability and Volume (ROI/ROAS).
 * You are the "Client" of the Content Factory. You analyze ad performance, provide data-backed briefs to the Content Strategist and identify winning angles quickly to scale them aggressively.
 * Growth Loops
 * Design and optimize growth loops (product, retention, referral, content → product → content)
 * Diagnose growth across acquisition, activation, sales alignment, retention, and expansion
 * Identify where growth is constrained and why
 * "Player-Coach" Leadership
 * You manage the Growth team (Paid, Copy, Web, PMM) by showing them the standard of excellence. You are their sparring partner for strategy, copy angles, and technical execution.
 * You’re responsible to build your team by sourcing talents, to manage them, to train them and to stop with them while necessary.
 * Sales Alignment & Revenue Quality
 * Your metric isn't just "Leads generated", it's "Appointments held" and "Deals closed". You set up a tight feedback loop with the Sales Team Lead to adjust targeting based on lead quality.
 * You prioritize High-Intent leads over cheap volume. You stop campaigns that bring tire-kickers, even if the CPL is low.
   
   

Tools you’ll master:

GA4, Optibase, Wefblow, Vidalytics, Clarity, Hotjar, Amplitude, Figma, Looker Studio, VWO, Optimizely, and whatever helps you see what others miss.

You’ll own KPIs :


 * LTV / CAC ratio
 * Funnel conversion rates by stage
 * X experiments launched per week
   
   

Desired Outcomes


 * Conversion Rates 2× better than baseline
 * Growth experimentation runs continuously
 * A Predictable Growth Engine
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience


 * You have ideally a minimum of 3 years of experience in Conversion Rate Optimization, Growth Experimentation, or Performance Marketing, ideally within SaaS, e-commerce, or digital product environments.
 * You have a track record of designing, implementing, and scaling A/B and multivariate tests that have generated measurable improvements in revenue, user activation, or conversion.
   
   

Competencies


 * Growth Diagnosis & System Thinking
 * Persuasion & Behavioral Insight
 * Analytical
   
   

Personality


 * Curiosity: You relentlessly dig into why users behave the way they do until you uncover the insight behind the data.
 * Hands-On Execution
 * Precision: You care about clarity in hypotheses, clean data, and unambiguous results.
 * Agility: You move fast, adapt instantly to new findings, and turn insights into tests within hours, not weeks.
   
   

Language

French: Native / Bilingual

English: Fluent English, you can hold a conversation on specific details with English-speaking colleagues.

Our chosen language for written communication is English.

IT MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

❌ If you need clarity before chaos — wrong place.

❌ If you prefer balance over intensity — wrong season.

❌ If you build to deliver, not to elevate — wrong mission.

❌ If you want to optimize without getting your hands dirty in Webflow, copy, or design — wrong role.

WHY JOIN US ❤️

Help us market a product that fuses neuroscience, design, and AI to reinvent how humans grow.

Work with filmmakers, psychologists, engineers, and creatives obsessed with impact.

In the heart of our headquarters stands the 100 000 Dreams Wall,

Every photo on that wall is a life rewritten:

“I ran a marathon.”

“I started my company.”

“I found peace with my father.”

You will play a crucial role in the development of an Iconic Product.

Growth & Ambition


 * > 🏅Being surrounded by A-players who strive to perform
   
   

Impact & Meaning


 * > Playing a crucial role in the development of a company whose content and products will be used by millions of people
 * > Waking up in the morning feeling like you are making a difference is something!
   
   

We receive messages every day from clients who have successfully lost weight, quit smoking, reach a milestone in their business, built better relationships, and made positive changes in their lives.


 * > ❤️ Contributing to the Paradox Foundation (our non-profit), dedicated to empower teenagers
   
   

But that's not all, we believe that driven people deserve…

Freedom & Well Being 🗽


 * > 😎A company culture based on autonomy & accountability
 * > 🗽Flexible working hours
 * > 🌎A remote culture from day one with the freedom to work from wherever you want
 * > 🏤Magnificent office in Dubai, Paris, Lisbon - it feels like home :)
 * > 💻Work on Mac, for us it counts :)
 * > 🏀350€ per year paid by the company to take care of yourself ( for your gym, or dance class or whatever make you feel great)
 * > 📚150€ of books or education - At Paradox, we are learner lovers and we want to support you in that
 * > 🔥6 1:1coachings - A Paradox Coach supporting you on anything personal or professional, we want you to live your best life
   
   

HIRING PROCESS 📃

📃 A 6 to 8 minutes application survey.

💻 A 15-30 minutes video call with Timy, our HR, to assess the fit between the position, the company, and your own career path.

💻 A video-call focused on your career with Quentin, VP Marketing, to review your background & see how we can match your desires with our needs.

💻 A culture-fit video call to check in depth the alignment between you and our values and culture.

💼 Reference calls to get in-depth insights about how you work in different environments, make your onboarding easier, and give everybody on the team the insurance to be surrounded by A-Players.

🤗 Welcome aboard!

If you’re not joining to tweak landing pages.

If you’re here to engineer behavioral change at scale, for millions.

Welcome to Paradox.

Let’s build the Operating System for Greatness.

title: Regional Information Security Officer
description:
About The Job

The Regional Information Security Officer (RISO) for Central Europe is a key role within the Allianz Technology’s global IS organization. The RISO shall be responsible for oversight of the related ISMS activities, risk identification and assessment, prevention and advice to regional management as well as to the Local IS Functions with respect to the Information Security risk areas of the region, such as services provided to the Allianz-internal customers including those provided by 3rd parties. In his/her function, the RISO will be instrumental in building up and integrating IS assurance capabilities and have a direct functional reporting line to the Allianz Technology SE Head of Information Security Governance.

What You Do


 * Oversee the regional Information Security function’s activities in close alignment with the central Corporate Information Security function, including all aspects of people management such as target setting and tracking for Local Information Security functions
 * Exchange information within the relevant CTO area and support regional and local executive body in their regulatory Information Security-related governance requirements and their responsibility to set up sound organizational and operational structures and frameworks;
 * Serve as central contact person for information security-related matters in the region, including interfaces to business, partners, customers and other safeguarding functions;
 * Provide information security consulting and liaison with all relevant stakeholders and regional management;
 * Oversee and account for the implementation of Information Security principles and procedures during the full service life cycle; systematically assess the effectiveness of security controls in all services provided by Allianz Technology, its partners and third-party providers;
 * Oversee the implementation of and compliance with Group-wide IS framework, regulatory requirements and industry security standards in all Allianz Technology services and in projects; oversee the annual compliance reporting process for local entities; assess and address deviations from security policies and contractual security provisions, as well as developing effective strategies to mitigate identified information security risks;
 * Regularly align with and contribute to the global Allianz Technology ISO community;
   
   

What You Bring


 * University degree in computer science, IT auditing, cybersecurity or equivalent professional experience & long track record of experience in IT, 5 years+ experience in Information Security related fields and/or risk management or IT audit
 * Sound hands-on knowledge of IT security technology, architecture and processes and profound knowledge of information security management systems and relevant industry standards and control frameworks (in particular ISO270xx, COBIT2019); local regulatory standards
 * Professional experience with supplier management (including Cloud providers), IT outsourcing and relevant control frameworks; track record in defining and monitoring contractual information security provisions
 * Proven track record in people management and/or project management in complex enterprise environments
 * Ability to cope with high workload, and being able to exercise good levels of independence, judgment and initiative
 * Desirable certifications: CISM/CISSP/CRISC; ISO27001 Lead Implementer/Auditor
 * Basic knowledge of AI technologies and their practical use.
   
   

What We Offer


 * We offer a hybrid work model which recognizes the value of striking a balance between in-person collaboration and remote working incl. up to 25 days per year working from abroad.
 * We believe in rewarding performance and our compensation and benefits package includes a company bonus scheme, pension, employee shares program and multiple employee discounts (details vary by location).
 * From career development and digital learning programs to international career mobility, we offer lifelong learning for our employees worldwide and an environment where innovation, delivery and empowerment are fostered.
 * Flexible working, health and wellbeing offers (including healthcare and parental leave benefits) support to balance family and career and help our people return from career breaks with experience that nothing else can teach
   
   

92544 | IT & Tech Engineering | Professional | Non-Executive | Allianz Technology | Full-Time | Permanent

About Allianz Technology

With its headquarters in Munich, Germany, Allianz Technology is Allianz's global IT service provider and delivers IT solutions that drive the group's digitalization. With more than 11,000 employees in over 20 countries around the world, Allianz Technology is tasked to run, optimize, transform, and innovate the infrastructure, applications, and services together with Allianz companies to co-create the best customer experience.

We service the entire spectrum of digitalization – from one of the industry's largest IT infrastructure projects that spans data centers, networks, and security, to application platforms ranging from workplace services to digital interaction.

In short: We deliver comprehensive end-to-end IT solutions for Allianz in the digital age. We are the backbone of Allianz.

Find us at: www.linkedin.com/company/allianz-technology.

Commitment to Integrity, Fairness & Inclusion

Allianz Technology is proud to be an equal opportunity employer dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment for everyone. We embrace individuals of all gender identities and expressions, sexual orientations, ethnicities, ages, nationalities, religions, disabilities, and philosophies of life. Ultimately, our greatest strength as a company lies in the unique skills, experiences, and backgrounds our employees contribute.

To Recruitment Agencies

Allianz Technology has an in-house recruitment team that sources great candidates directly. Therefore, Allianz Technology does not accept unsolicited resumes from agencies or search firm recruiters.

When we do work with recruitment agencies, that engagement is formalized by a contract. Fees will only be paid when there is a contract in place. Without a contract in place, we will not accept invoices on unsolicited resumes, even if the candidate was ultimately employed by Allianz.

title: Director/a Madrid
description:
This is Odd arranca el 2026 con muchas ganas de comerse el mundo. Y aunque el mundo es muy grande, Madrid es un muy buen lugar para empezar. Buscamos a mentes brillantes, con un hambre insaciable y con muchísimas ganas para que nos ayuden a hacernos un hueco en la capital y a consolidar el crecimiento de la agencia. 




QUIÉNES SOMOS




Somos una agencia social-first que construye marcas desde el entorno digital. Empezamos hace 7 años, pero entre COVID y vaivenes de la vida, hace solo 3 o 4 que pisamos fuerte. Creamos contenido y estrategias ganadoras que se basan en el pleno conocimiento del target, de sus necesidades y de la visión del negocio. 




Trabajamos desde la estrategia y la creatividad hasta la ejecución y medición de campañas y content para las marcas más top del momento como WALLAPOP, MANGO, OPPO, HENKEL… 




LA OPORTUNIDAD




¡Abrimos oficina en Madrid! Somos de Barcelona donde tenemos nuestro HQ y a 25 maravillosas personas. Buscamos poner un pie en la capital contigo y 5 perfilazos más para crecer como la espuma en los próximos meses y años. ¿Nos ayudas?




Uno de nuestros principales clientes está en Madrid y vamos a crear la estructura en la ciudad para darle servicio. En paralelo vamos a buscar nuevas oportunidades para crecer.




JOB DESCRIPTION 




Necesitamos a un/a líder. Si somos completamente sinceros, no tenemos superclaro el perfil. O más bien, estamos superabiertos a valorar perfiles diferentes con backgrounds diferentes. En especial nos llamarán la atención personas que… 

 * …tengan un fuerte background en dirección de cuentas
 * …tengan un perfil comercial con experiencia en el sector de la publicidad
 * …sean directores creativos/estrategia
 * …sean head of marketing, CMO, head of social, etc. de alguna marca top. 




Además de un background potentorro en alguna de estas áreas, necesitamos que gestiones equipo y cliente como los dioses. Si las cosas van como nos gustaría será un equipo que crecerá rápido y necesitamos que su líder lo gestione con todo el power que se necesita. 




TUS RESPONSABILIDADES

 * Comercial: abrir mercado en Madrid. 
 * Supervisión estratégica y creativa: supervisar ideas y propuestas generadas por el equipo para asegurar que sea relevante, coherente con la estrategia y de alta calidad.
 * Client relations: enamoramiento total de todos nuestros clientes. 
 * Procesos: Implementación de procesos y asegurar la continuidad de nuestro modelo de gestión. 
 * Pitching: participar en concursos 







REQUISITOS 

 * Experiencia contrastada en agencia o cliente. No nos gusta hablar de años pero esta es una posición senior. 
 * Liderazgo de equipos: necesitamos que hayas liderado equipos antes y que puedas demostrar que has sido un role model para ellos. 
 * Inglés. Mucho y muy bien.
 * Actitud, actitud, actitud: buscamos gente con espíritu líder y mucha proactividad y un buenrrollo increíble.
 * Sobre ese último punto: VA EN SERIO. Buscamos gente asertiva, paciente, con ganas de aprender y también de enseñar. Si eres lo más en todo pero desprendes onda negativa no te consideraremos para formar parte del equipo. La genialidad de nuestro trabajo depende en gran medida del buenrrollo que hay en el equipo, así que lo protegemos a capa y espada. 
 * Referencias impecables de clientes y de anteriores empleos.
 * Trabajar en equipo: es cliché pero es importante, queremos que sepas delegar y que puedas generar un ambiente de trabajo eficiente y buenrrollero con tus juniors y seniors. Si la gente está living cuando trabaja contigo, ¡nos interesas!. 




LOS RETOS 

Si lo que lees te interesa, nos gustaría que le des una vuelta a alguno de los retos que tenemos y nos cuentes cómo enfocarías resolverlos:

 1. Comercial: empezar y liderar nuevas relaciones comerciales en Madrid. 
 2. Operaciones: cómo gestionar la interrelación entre las dos oficinas y asegurar independencia a la vez que trabajamos como uno. 
 3. Gestión de equipo: gestionar un equipo que dependen de ti a la vez que reciben feedback de los directores (creatividad, estrategia, contenido…) en Barcelona. 
 4. Cultura: cómo asegurar que nuestra cultura permea en la nueva oficina y se traspasa a las nuevas contrataciones. 




QUÉ OFRECEMOS

 * Emprender una nueva aventura abriendo camino en Madrid, con todo el excitement que conllevan los new beginnings. 
 * Una cultura trabajada desde la cooperación y el compañerismo para que se genere una magia única. Queremos que vayas feliz al trabajo. 
 * Flexibilidad: 2 días de teletrabajo (pueden ser lunes y viernes, sí), vacaciones flexibles, día de tu cumple de fiesta, jornada intensiva en verano… 




CÓMO APLICAR

 1. Abre el mail
 2. Actualiza tu CV y adjúntalo
 3. Explícanos en un par de lineas por qué eres la persona que estamos buscando. No nos metas un rollo aburrido porfa.
 4. Tus top 3 restaurantes de la ciudad.
 5. SEND a jobs(arroba)thisisodd.es




Ganas de conocerte!!!!

title: Guest Services Manager
description:
Being a key member of the shipboard management team, the Guest Services Manager possesses a dynamic outgoing demeanor with a passion for delivering an industry leading guest vacation experience while personifying The ROYAL WAY (Friendly, Passionate, and Committed). The Guest Services Manager continually strives to exceed hospitality industry standards, while ensuring complete guest and team satisfaction. This role establishes and drives a positive working environment and focuses on operational goals where training, leadership, development, and recognizing overall team performance are paramount. Leading by example and from the front of the house, the Guest Services Manager is the ship's driving advocate for delivering outstanding service to our guests that goes above and beyond their expectations.

Hiring Requirements:

 * Minimum two years’ front of house managerial/operational experience in a hotel, cruise line or hospitality related field preferred.
 * The ability to effectively deal with internal and external guests, some of whom will require high levels of discretion, patience, tact and diplomacy.
 * Knowledge of principles and processes for providing exemplary customer and personal service including needs assessment, problem resolution and achievement of quality service standards.
 * Ability to communicate diplomatically with managers, shipboard and shore-side employees to resolve problems and negotiate amicable resolution to challenging issues.
 * Flexibility to manage, focus, direct and encourage a positive, dynamic, diverse guest services operation by navigating through a changing work environment.
 * Should be able to utilize and administer the progressive disciplinary action process through coaching and counseling to improve performance where possible.
 * Ability to work positively and cooperatively in a diverse team environment to meet overall established timeframes for the Guest Services division operation.
 * Should harbor a flexible outlook towards placement throughout the fleet, considering changing fleet-wide operational business needs.
 * Working knowledge of computers, internet access, and the ability to navigate within a variety of software packages such as Microsoft Office.
 * Demonstrates a working knowledge to operate all office equipment. Completion of high school, basic or vocational education equivalency preferred.
 * Working knowledge of US cash handling procedures and foreign exchange required. Required to speak English clearly and distinctly.
 * Aptitude to read and write English to understand and interpret written procedures. This includes the ability to give and receive instructions in written and verbal forms and to effectively present information and respond to questions from guests, supervisors and co-workers.
 * Ability to speak additional languages such as Spanish, French, German, Italian or Portuguese preferred but not essential.




Physical Requirements:

 * While performing the duties of this job, the shipboard employee is regularly required to stand, walk, use hands to touch, handle, or feel, reach with hands and arms, talk or hear, and taste or smell.
 * Specific vision abilities required by this job include close vision, distance vision, color vision, peripheral vision, depth perception and ability to adjust focus.
 * All shipboard employees must be physically able to participate in emergency lifesaving procedures and drills.
 * Full use and range of arms and legs as well as full visual, verbal and hearing abilities are required to receive and give instructions in the event of an emergency including the lowering of lifeboats and ability to lift and/or move up to 50 pounds.

title: Director de Solvencia y Rentabilidad
description:
Entidad financiera de primer nivel busca incorporar a su equipo de Auditoría a un/a:




Director/a de Auditoría de Solvencia y Rentabilidad




Funciones:




 * Liderar y gestionar el equipo de Auditoría de Solvencia y Rentabilidad, fomentando el desarrollo profesional, la autonomía y la excelencia técnica.
 * Elaborar la planificación anual de revisiones de auditoría, alineada con el marco de riesgos, prioridades estratégicas y expectativas supervisoras.
 * Supervisar las revisiones realizadas, garantizando rigor técnico, profundidad analítica y calidad de conclusiones.
 * Interlocución con responsables de las direcciones auditadas, presentando resultados y ejerciendo un rol de influencia, criterio y acompañamiento.
 * Presentar conclusiones y recomendaciones en Comités y foros de alto nivel.
 * Mantener relación directa con Supervisores, gestionando requerimientos, inspecciones y ejercicios regulatorios relevantes.
 * Monitorizar métricas de solvencia y rentabilidad, planificación estratégica y operativa, y contribuir a la mejora continua de procesos, metodologías y marcos de control.




Requisitos y perfil:

 * Licenciatura o Grado en Economía, Finanzas, ADE o áreas afines.
 * Conocimientos sólidos en Solvencia y Rentabilidad, métricas regulatorias y visión económica.
 * Nivel muy alto de inglés, hablado y escrito.
 * Experiencia en interlocución con Supervisores y entornos regulatorios exigentes.
 * Experiencia en funciones similares y liderazgo de equipos; muy valorable trayectoria como consultor/a.
 * Conocimiento del negocio financiero de la entidad y de su cartera de productos, valorable.
 * Manejo de herramientas de ofimática (Word, Excel, Access y PowerPoint).
 * Capacidad directiva, orientación a resultados y desarrollo del equipo.
 * Habilidad de comunicación a distintos niveles y gestión de expectativas.
 * Autonomía, proactividad, capacidad de análisis y resolución de problemas complejos.
 * Flexibilidad, adaptación al cambio y orientación a la mejora continua.




Se ofrece incorporación estable en una entidad financiera de referencia, con un entorno profesional exigente y con posibilidades reales de crecimiento y desarrollo profesional.

title: Director/a de Operaciones
description:
Compañía líder en el segmento de retail gastronómico especializado, con presencia nacional e internacional y una sólida implantación en aeropuertos, busca incorporar un Director/a de Operaciones. La empresa combina restauración y venta especializada, con un fuerte enfoque en calidad de producto, experiencia de cliente y crecimiento sostenido a través de nuevas licitaciones y aperturas.

La persona que ocupe este rol será responsable de liderar la estrategia operativa global de las unidades de restauración y retail en los aeropuertos donde la compañía opera. Su misión será garantizar la excelencia operativa, impulsar la eficiencia y rentabilidad en todas las localizaciones y asegurar que los equipos y procesos evolucionen al ritmo del negocio y del entorno aeroportuario. La posición combina visión estratégica, orientación a resultados y un sólido acompañamiento operativo mediante el Responsable Transversal de Operaciones y los Área Managers.





Responsabilidades principales



Dirección Estratégica de Operaciones



 * Definir y ejecutar la estrategia operativa global alineada con los objetivos corporativos.

 * Diseñar modelos operativos escalables que permitan el crecimiento en nuevos aeropuertos y licitaciones.

 * Impulsar una cultura de excelencia, eficiencia y disciplina operativa en colaboración con el Responsable Transversal y los Área Managers.
   
   
   
   

Supervisión y Mejora de la Operación Diaria



(En coordinación directa con el Responsable Transversal de Operaciones y los Área Managers)

 * Asegurar la correcta ejecución de los estándares operativos, de calidad y de experiencia del cliente.

 * Monitorizar indicadores clave (productividad, merma, ventas, satisfacción, SLAs) y establecer planes de acción.

 * Garantizar el cumplimiento de procedimientos, normativas internas y requisitos específicos del entorno aeroportuario.

 * Optimizar los flujos de trabajo, recursos y procesos para maximizar la eficiencia y minimizar los costes productivos.
   
   
   
   

Liderazgo y Desarrollo de Equipos / People & Talent



 * Liderar, inspirar y acompañar al equipo de Área Managers y gerencias de alto volumen.

 * Diseñar planes de desarrollo y formación para fortalecer las capacidades operativas y de liderazgo.

 * Fomentar un entorno de trabajo de alto rendimiento basado en la responsabilidad, la comunicación fluida y la cultura de servicio.
   
   
   
   

Relación con Aeropuertos y Entidades Regulatorias

title: Client Success Director for Talent Solutions
description:
Client Success Director for Talent Solutions 




Location: Barcelona, Hybrid 




About Workfully




Workfully is a VC-backed technology company building the world’s most trusted recruiting experience. 




Instead of relying on traditional recruitment agencies or building large in-house teams, companies use Workfully to access curated, high-performing independent recruiters through a structured, AI-enabled platform. Our model delivers faster results, greater flexibility, and full transparency—without placement fees or long-term lock-ins.




On the other side of the marketplace, Workfully empowers top recruiters to build scalable, independent businesses, supported by software, automation, and AI-driven leverage.




We work with ambitious, fast-growing organizations running complex, multi-country hiring projects—and client success is at the heart of everything we do.




About the Role




We’re hiring a Client Success Director / Senior Client Success Manager to own the success, retention, and expansion of our most important client accounts.




This is a senior, high-impact role at the intersection of client leadership, delivery excellence, product thinking, and AI-first execution. You’ll ensure clients get consistent hiring outcomes, seamless execution across countries and roles, and a best-in-class experience from onboarding to renewal.




A core expectation of this role is the ability to use AI as a daily operating tool—to reduce manual work, improve decision-making, scale delivery, and continuously upgrade how client success is run. This is not a “support” role; it’s a leverage role.




What You’ll Do




Client Ownership & Delivery Excellence




 * Own relationships with key client accounts and act as their trusted, senior point of contact
   
   




 * Lead onboarding and kickoff processes to ensure fast, confident activation
   
   




 * Design and manage delivery plans for large, multi-location recruiting projects
   
   




 * Use AI tools to monitor delivery signals, surface risks early, and prioritize actions
   
   




 * Proactively solve delivery issues before they escalate, using data and automation rather than reactive meetings
   
   




 * Ensure clients experience consistency, transparency, and trust in the process
   
   




Renewals, Expansion & Commercial Impact




 * Identify upsell and expansion opportunities across hiring volume, geographies, and business units
   
   




 * Use AI-driven insights (performance data, usage patterns, sentiment signals) to inform renewal and expansion conversations
   
   




 * Own renewals and contribute directly to revenue retention and growth
   
   




 * Report clearly on account performance, revenue potential, and client health
   
   




 * Partner with Sales to transition closed deals into scalable, long-term accounts
   
   




Product-Led & AI-First Client Success




 * Design and deploy a product-first, AI-enabled approach to managing smaller accounts at scale—ensuring every client gets value without heavy meeting dependency
   
   




 * Ensure clients are properly onboarded into the platform, including AI-enabled workflows, education, and troubleshooting
   
   




 * Actively collaborate with Product and Tech to:
   
   




 * Translate client needs into product and AI opportunities
   
   




 * Test and roll out new AI-driven features and workflows
   
   




 * Improve automation across onboarding, delivery, and reporting
   
   




 * Continuously replace manual processes with systems, templates, automation, and AI-assisted decision-making
   
   




Who You Are




 * Years of experience in TA leadership, RPO leadership, or senior client success roles, managing complex, large-scale hiring programs
   
   




 * Proven ability to operate at senior client level with strong commercial awareness (renewals, expansions, retention)
   
   




 * AI-native or AI-first mindset: you actively use AI tools in your daily work to think faster, work smarter, and scale your impact
   
   




 * High emotional intelligence—you build trust quickly and manage senior stakeholders with confidence
   
   




 * Fluent (native or C2) in English; additional European languages are a strong plus
   
   



Fill in the form, we will contact you...

title: Head of UAV Systems
description:
About the role

Imagine being technical backbone behind Destinus' unmanned aerial vehicles, owning the system end to end and setting the technical direction that turns bold concepts into flight-ready reality. The Head of UAV Systems is the technical authority and system owner for the development of unmanned aerial vehicles. This role leads the end-to-end technical execution of UAV development programs, from early concept and requirements definition through detailed design, prototype manufacturing, system integration, testing, and flight qualification. This position requires strong hands-on technical background, proven leadership in complex aerospace programs, and a clear focus on results, quality, and delivery timelines.

At Destinus, we are revolutionizing the defense industry with cutting-edge Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Our innovative technologies are designed to meet the unique demands of modern defense operations, delivering unparalleled speed, precision, and cost effectiveness. Destinus partners with government agencies and defense organizations worldwide to provide advanced solutions for mission-critical operations, enabling a new era of efficiency and technological superiority. Join us in shaping the future of defense with groundbreaking aerospace innovations.

What You´ll Do

Technical Leadership & System Ownership

 * Act as the technical authority and system architect for UAV development programs
 * Own system-level technical decisions, trade-offs, and design rationale
 * Ensure coherence across all UAV subsystems and maintain system architecture and interfaces

Requirements & Vehicle Design

 * Lead system and subsystem requirements definition and management
 * Translate mission, customer, and regulatory needs into verifiable technical requirements
 * Guide aerodynamic design and flight performance, mechanical design and structural sizing, and materials selection and manufacturing concepts
 * Drive system-level optimization for performance, weight, cost, reliability, and manufacturability

Hands-on Engineering, Prototyping & Manufacturing

 * Stay directly involved in prototype manufacturing and assembly
 * Apply strong Design for Manufacturing and Assembly principles
 * Lead prototype builds for metallic and composite structures
 * Ensure designs reflect manufacturability, tolerances, and production feedback

Integration, Testing & Flight Campaigns

 * Support system integration across all UAV subsystems
 * Define and oversee ground and flight test plans
 * Actively support and participate in flight test campaigns, ensuring safe execution and rapid technical feedback loops
 * Lead anomaly investigations, root cause analysis, and corrective actions

Project Execution & Delivery

 * Ensure technical execution meets quality standards and delivery milestones
 * Identify and mitigate technical risks early
 * Maintain strong focus on results, deadlines, and engineering excellence
 * Support program planning with realistic schedules and technical estimates

Team Leadership & Collaboration

 * Lead and develop a multidisciplinary engineering team
 * Establish engineering standards and best practices
 * Collaborate closely with program management, manufacturing, operations, and partners
   
   

Requirements



What You'll Need

 * Minimum 10 years of experience in technical leadership roles within UAV or aerospace development programs
 * Proven track record as technical lead, system engineer, chief engineer or vehicle architect on complex UAV projects
 * Demonstrable hands-on experience across the full UAV development lifecycle{{:}} design → build → test → fly
 * Deep technical expertise in{{:}}
    * System requirements definition and management
    * UAV and aircraft design
    * Aerodynamics and flight mechanics
    * Mechanical design and structural analysis
    * System architecture definition
    * Integration of avionics, propulsion, payloads, and control systems
    * Ground and flight testing

 * Strong understanding of manufacturing-driven design and prototype iteration
 * Experience working in high-technology, fast-paced, results-oriented environments
   

Who You Are

You bring hands-on experience navigating airworthiness, certification, and regulatory frameworks, and you understand what it takes to move UAV systems from concept to compliant, flight-ready platforms. You have worked with fixed-wing, VTOL, or hybrid UAV configurations and know the technical and operational trade-offs that come with each architecture.

 



Benefits



Why Join Us?

✨ The Thrill of the Future - Work on cutting-edge projects that redefine aerospace.
✨ Global Innovation Hub - Collaborate with top engineers from all over the world.
✨ Fast-Paced & High-Growth - Experience the rush of working in a rapidly expanding company.
✨ Real Impact - Your work won't be theoretical—it will shape the future of flight.

Destinus is an equal-opportunity employer. We value diversity in our companies and our teams and do not discriminate based on age, race, religion, color, country of origin, gender, sexual orientation, or disability status.

🚀 Destinus - Challenge the limits of time, space, and human potential.

 * A Conversion Architect, skilled at diagnosing funnel bottlenecks and translating data into structured experimentation roadmaps that deliver measurable business outcomes.
 * A Behavioral Strategist, fascinated by what drives human action, able to mix cognitive psychology, UX, and persuasion frameworks to design experiences that convert because they resonate.
 * A Data-driven Creator, fluent in GA4, Hotjar, AB Tasty, VWO, Amplitude, not just running tests, but connecting insights to revenue, retention, and lifetime value.
   
   

This is a full-time position, carried out remotely or from our beautiful offices in Dubaï or Lisbon.

About Paradox

French and English fluency is required.

What We Do

At Paradox, we are convinced that greatness is trainable.

That’s why we want to empower people at scale, by leveraging cutting edge technologies like AI, and crafting user experiences with outstanding aesthetics.

We do that by merging :


 * Human Intelligence (coaches, peers, and mentors)
 * Structured Intelligence (protocols, mental models, rituals),
 * Technological Intelligence (AI personalization, feedback loops, adaptive journeys)
   
   

To create one seamless ecosystem: Paradox OS.

OUR BELIEFS

We believe self-help is broken.

Most learning platforms are used the same way : consuming generic theories, getting quick highs, ending with no real change.

At Paradox, we believe people deserve more.

More than content. More than motivation.

They deserve a system that knows them, one that adapts, challenges, and grows with them.

We believe that every human learns differently, and that technology can do more than entertain or save time.

It can translate insight into transformation, through AI personalization, lean experimentation, and deep psychological understanding.

Because learning shouldn’t just make you feel inspired for a day, it should change how you live, think, and create.

OUR VISION

At Paradox, we want to re-invent how people grow.

We do not build another course or coaching app but the Operating System for Greatness.

Founded by David Laroche, a creator followed by over 2 million people and known for his interviews with icons like Tony Parker, Mike Horn, Richard Branson, and Gad Elmaleh, Paradox aims to build something that will live beyond any individual (including its founder), for decades to come.

Our ambition is to compete with players like Mindvalley (150M ARR), but with a sharper vision, grounded protocols for achievers, people who want more for their life, refusing mediocrity.

To do that, we bring together designers, tech, coaches, and filmmakers to create learning experiences that are cinematic, precise, and effective.

We move fast, aim high, and hold ourselves to the standards of Apple, Spotify, and MasterClass. No fluff, focused on meaningful impact.

While others hide their numbers, we want to let our results speak loudly for us.

Get obsessed with transforming our clients’ lives and let those transformations be our marketing.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Architect and pilot the Revenue Engine. You will transition Paradox from a founder-led marketing approach to a brand-led, repeatable, data-driven engine.

You don't just manage a team, you get your hands dirty to identify growth levers and pull them yourself. Your obsession: taking a funnel, dismantling it, and rebuilding it to convert 2x better. You lead from the front, testing hypotheses, launching new channels, and showing the team how it's done.

Your Key Responsibilities


 * Offer–Market Fit continuously assessed, refined, repositioned, and launched
 * Identify which segments an offer truly works for and which it doesn’t.
 * Refine, reposition, or stop offers based on evidence.
   
   

2. Architect Funnels and campaigns (Hands-On)


 * You don't just "request" new funnels, you map them out and oversee their implementation directly.
 * You set up the tracking, you check the flows, and you ensure the machine works before managing budget scaling.
 * Relentless Optimization (CRO & A/B Testing)
 * You design, launch, and analyze A/B tests yourself (headlines, pricing, offers…). You don't wait for a report, you dig into the data to find the winner.
 * You proactively hunt for friction points in the user journey. If a page isn't converting, you audit it, propose a fix, and implement the test immediately with the team.
 * Design, launch, and analyze experiments across funnels, pricing, messaging
 * Ensure tracking, data integrity, and learnings compound over time
 * Channel Exploration & Scaling
 * While Yann manages our core Paid Social (Meta), your job is to overview Yann’s work and identify the next winning acquisition channels to maximize Profitability and Volume (ROI/ROAS).
 * You are the "Client" of the Content Factory. You analyze ad performance, provide data-backed briefs to the Content Strategist and identify winning angles quickly to scale them aggressively.
 * Growth Loops
 * Design and optimize growth loops (product, retention, referral, content → product → content)
 * Diagnose growth across acquisition, activation, sales alignment, retention, and expansion
 * Identify where growth is constrained and why
 * "Player-Coach" Leadership
 * You manage the Growth team (Paid, Copy, Web, PMM) by showing them the standard of excellence. You are their sparring partner for strategy, copy angles, and technical execution.
 * You’re responsible to build your team by sourcing talents, to manage them, to train them and to stop with them while necessary.
 * Sales Alignment & Revenue Quality
 * Your metric isn't just "Leads generated", it's "Appointments held" and "Deals closed". You set up a tight feedback loop with the Sales Team Lead to adjust targeting based on lead quality.
 * You prioritize High-Intent leads over cheap volume. You stop campaigns that bring tire-kickers, even if the CPL is low.
   
   

Tools you’ll master:

GA4, Optibase, Wefblow, Vidalytics, Clarity, Hotjar, Amplitude, Figma, Looker Studio, VWO, Optimizely, and whatever helps you see what others miss.

You’ll own KPIs :


 * LTV / CAC ratio
 * Funnel conversion rates by stage
 * X experiments launched per week
   
   

Desired Outcomes


 * Conversion Rates 2× better than baseline
 * Growth experimentation runs continuously
 * A Predictable Growth Engine
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience


 * You have ideally a minimum of 3 years of experience in Conversion Rate Optimization, Growth Experimentation, or Performance Marketing, ideally within SaaS, e-commerce, or digital product environments.
 * You have a track record of designing, implementing, and scaling A/B and multivariate tests that have generated measurable improvements in revenue, user activation, or conversion.
   
   

Competencies


 * Growth Diagnosis & System Thinking
 * Persuasion & Behavioral Insight
 * Analytical
   
   

Personality


 * Curiosity: You relentlessly dig into why users behave the way they do until you uncover the insight behind the data.
 * Hands-On Execution
 * Precision: You care about clarity in hypotheses, clean data, and unambiguous results.
 * Agility: You move fast, adapt instantly to new findings, and turn insights into tests within hours, not weeks.
   
   

Language

French: Native / Bilingual

English: Fluent English, you can hold a conversation on specific details with English-speaking colleagues.

Our chosen language for written communication is English.

IT MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

❌ If you need clarity before chaos — wrong place.

❌ If you prefer balance over intensity — wrong season.

❌ If you build to deliver, not to elevate — wrong mission.

❌ If you want to optimize without getting your hands dirty in Webflow, copy, or design — wrong role.

WHY JOIN US ❤️

Help us market a product that fuses neuroscience, design, and AI to reinvent how humans grow.

Work with filmmakers, psychologists, engineers, and creatives obsessed with impact.

In the heart of our headquarters stands the 100 000 Dreams Wall,

Every photo on that wall is a life rewritten:

“I ran a marathon.”

“I started my company.”

“I found peace with my father.”

You will play a crucial role in the development of an Iconic Product.

Growth & Ambition


 * > 🏅Being surrounded by A-players who strive to perform
   
   

Impact & Meaning


 * > Playing a crucial role in the development of a company whose content and products will be used by millions of people
 * > Waking up in the morning feeling like you are making a difference is something!
   
   

We receive messages every day from clients who have successfully lost weight, quit smoking, reach a milestone in their business, built better relationships, and made positive changes in their lives.


 * > ❤️ Contributing to the Paradox Foundation (our non-profit), dedicated to empower teenagers
   
   

But that's not all, we believe that driven people deserve…

Freedom & Well Being 🗽


 * > 😎A company culture based on autonomy & accountability
 * > 🗽Flexible working hours
 * > 🌎A remote culture from day one with the freedom to work from wherever you want
 * > 🏤Magnificent office in Dubai, Paris, Lisbon - it feels like home :)
 * > 💻Work on Mac, for us it counts :)
 * > 🏀350€ per year paid by the company to take care of yourself ( for your gym, or dance class or whatever make you feel great)
 * > 📚150€ of books or education - At Paradox, we are learner lovers and we want to support you in that
 * > 🔥6 1:1coachings - A Paradox Coach supporting you on anything personal or professional, we want you to live your best life
   
   

HIRING PROCESS 📃

📃 A 6 to 8 minutes application survey.

💻 A 15-30 minutes video call with Timy, our HR, to assess the fit between the position, the company, and your own career path.

💻 A video-call focused on your career with Quentin, VP Marketing, to review your background & see how we can match your desires with our needs.

💻 A culture-fit video call to check in depth the alignment between you and our values and culture.

💼 Reference calls to get in-depth insights about how you work in different environments, make your onboarding easier, and give everybody on the team the insurance to be surrounded by A-Players.

title: Director of Media - EdTech (French fluent 🇫🇷)
description:
