Then you’ll love this.

We’re not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to follow a calendar. We’re looking for a Director of Media (Brand & Content).

Someone who understands that to win today, you don't just need "content", you need a Movement. You will have the freedom to propose bold, unconventional concepts and the resources to bring them to life immediately.

We need a strategist like you who will bridge the gap between David Laroche’s personal influence and Paradox’s institutional power.

A Brand Architect, capable of orchestrating a complex dual-strategy: scaling a personal brand while simultaneously building a standalone Company Brand that outlasts its founder.

A Creative Disruptor, you hate "best practices" because they lead to average results. You constantly hunt for the "Purple Cow", the angle, the format, or the story that no one else is daring to tell.

A "Doer" with Taste, you don't just float ideas in a meeting room. You script them, you drive them, and you ship them.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Transform a "Personal Brand" into a "Top-Tier Media".

You lead the Content Factory not by administrative management, but by creative authority. Your goal is to produce content that is so good, unique, and aligned with our values that it makes our competitors look outdated.

Your 4 Major Responsibilities


 * Architect the "Dual-Brand" Strategy
 * Build a symbiotic strategy where David Laroche’s personal brand and Paradox’s company brand reinforce each other without cannibalization.
 * Propose radical new formats (documentaries, reality shows, conceptual shorts) that shatter the boring codes of the "Self-Help" industry.

 * Treat David as the "Actor" on set: you ensure scripts, set, and direction are flawless so he can just show up, perform, and leave without any mental load, trusting you to handle every detail of the final output.
 * Command the Content Factory
 * Take full leadership of the internal content team (Factory Manager, Video Editors, Graphic Designers…) by setting the tempo, the culture, and the daily standards of excellence.
 * Provide high-level artistic direction and act as the final quality check; nothing gets published if it doesn't meet the "Paradox Standard" of aesthetics and storytelling.
 * Challenge the team to constantly upskill, pushing them for sharper cuts, better sound design, and stronger visual storytelling.
 * Fuel the Growth Engine
 * Treat content as our primary acquisition channel by collaborating with the Head of Growth to produce assets specifically designed to convert in Ads.
 * Analyze retention graphs, CTR, and CPL to iterate based on feedback, killing what fails and aggressively scaling what works.
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience

title: Director of Marketing
description:
Embrace the energy of ZEST.

Where wild beauty meets relaxed luxury, a refined escape with Ibiza’s energy. A place to unwind, connect and indulge. Morning sun, slow breakfasts, music in the air, and a view that somehow shifts your whole mindset.

ZEST is a five-star resort tucked into the hills above San Antonio.




The Director of Marketing will launch and lead the marketing strategy for our new luxury resort in Ibiza. This pivotal role will define and execute a holistic marketing plan to position the property & F&B outlets as a premier destination for global travellers, ensuring brand visibility, guest engagement, and revenue growth. This position will work closely with the General Manager, F&B Director and Commercial team onsite and will cultivate local & global relationships to generate brand awareness. The ideal candidate would be a self-starter, outgoing, a creative thinker and enjoy working in a fast-paced environment.

Job duties & responsibilities

Strategic Planning & Brand Positioning

 * Develop and implement the hotel’s pre-opening and post-opening marketing strategy aligned with brand values and business goals.
 * Position the hotel & F&B outlets as a top-tier luxury destination, capitalising on Ibiza’s global appeal and culture vibrancy.
 * Work closely with management team and ownership to execute the brand identity, tone, and market differentiation.
 * Maintain and enforce brand standards in all local marketing materials and communications.

Marketing Strategy & Execution

 * Concepting marketing plan inclusive of advertising, PR, social, email, and events.
 * Create content plan and oversee photoshoots
 * Support execution of paid media & CRM working closely with agencies and Schulte Hospitality’s global organisation.
 * Manage the marketing budget to ensure optimal allocation of resources aligned to business objectives.

Digital & Performance Marketing

 * Oversee digital campaigns (SEO, SEM, email, social media, influencer marketing) to drive direct bookings and brand awareness
 * Manage the hotel website, ensuring optimal UX, content relevance, and conversion performance
 * Analyse performance metrics and KPI’s to optimise campaign effectiveness and ROI

PR & Partnerships

 * Manage PR agency partners to ensure relationships with global media, influencer & luxury lifestyle publications are cultivated
 * Plan and execute launch events and media fam trips
 * Build strategic alliances with high-end brands, tourism boards, and event organisers.

Revenue Generation & Demand Creation

 * Collaborate with the sales and revenue management teams to drive occupancy and RevPAR.
 * Identify emerging travel trends and adjust marketing initiatives to capture new audiences.




Requirements:

 * Bachelor’s or master’s degree in marketing, Communications, or related field.
 * 8+ years of marketing experience in luxury hospitality or lifestyle brands, with at least 3 years in a leadership role.
 * Proven track record launching or rebranding high-profile resorts, hotels, or similar properties.
 * Deep understanding of the Ibiza market and international luxury travel trends.
 * Fluency in English required; Spanish proficiency strongly preferred.
 * Strong leadership, communication, and project management skills.
 * Experience managing external agencies, creative teams, and digital platforms.
 * Strategic, highly organised and results driven
 * This is a high-profile role for someone who knows how to market a luxury brand and can balance strategy with day-to-day execution.

We’re seeking a self-starter who enjoys working in a fast-paced entrepreneurial environment
sector: Hospitality, Hotels and Motels, and Travel Arrangements

title: Wealth Sales Iberia - Director
description:
About This Role

Iberia Wealth Business Overview

The Iberia Wealth team is responsible for managing and expanding BlackRock’s relationships across Spain, Portugal, and Andorra. The team covers the full Wealth ecosystem, including Asset Managers, Wealth Managers, Private Banks, Retail Networks, Fund Platforms, Independent Financial Advisors, and Digital players.

Our objective is to grow the business, strengthen brand visibility, and deliver BlackRock’s full investment platform, spanning Active funds, ETFs, Index funds, and Private Markets solutions, in close alignment with the EMEA Wealth strategy.

Key Responsibilities

Based in Madrid, this role is responsible for leading the Distribution segment within Iberia Wealth, encompassing Private Banks, Retail Networks, Fund Platforms, and Independent Financial Advisors across Spain, Portugal, and Andorra.

The position focuses on positioning the full breadth of BlackRock’s investment platform, from Active strategies and ETFs to Index funds and Private Market solutions, in Iberia.

Responsibilities

The role operates in close alignment with the overall Iberia Wealth strategy, ensuring a consistent approach to client engagement, business development, and brand positioning across the region. Key responsibilities include defining the commercial strategy, driving the execution of business plans, leading a team, and delivering results in terms of net flows, net fees and market share growth:


 * Define and execute a client-centric commercial strategy for the Distribution segment in Iberia, aimed at deepening client relationships and driving the growth of BlackRock’s Wealth franchise across Spain, Portugal, and Andorra.
 * Lead and oversee BlackRock’s Distribution business, ensuring performance accountability, best-practice execution, and alignment with the firm’s broader commercial objectives.
 * Drive day-to-day coverage of key relationships across Private Banks, Retail Networks, Fund Platforms, and Independent Financial Advisors, ensuring coordinated and consistent client engagement.
 * Collaborate closely with investment and product teams to deliver on strategic priorities and expand expertise across Active funds, ETFs, Index strategies, and Private Market solutions.
 * Identify and pursue opportunities for strategic partnerships and portfolio solutions, fostering innovation and cross-functional collaboration to enhance client value.
 * Represent BlackRock in client events, presentations, and educational sessions, contributing as a speaker and supporting the ongoing development of high-impact engagement formats.
 * Conduct ongoing analysis of the Iberia Distribution landscape, providing market insights and contributing to the evolution of BlackRock’s product offering to meet changing client needs.
 * Promote and expand access to BlackRock’s thought leadership, ensuring that Distribution clients benefit from the firm’s global investment expertise and insights.
 * Ensure full adherence to regulatory and legal requirements, maintaining the highest standards of compliance and integrity within the team.
 * Foster a culture of collaboration, accountability, and commercial excellence, developing talent and ensuring the team’s alignment with the EMEA Wealth strategy.
   
   

Knowledge/Experience


 * Minimum of 10 years’ experience in a financial services sales or leadership role within the Wealth and Asset Management industry, with a proven track record in the Distribution segment.
 * Demonstrated experience in defining and executing commercial strategies, leading teams, and delivering measurable business growth across Private Banks, Retail Networks, Fund Platforms, and Independent Financial Advisors.
 * Thorough knowledge of the Iberia Private Banking, Wealth, and Asset Management landscape, including market dynamics, clients, and regulatory environment across Spain, Portugal, and Andorra.
 * Deep understanding of the sales lifecycle, including strategic prospecting, client acquisition, objection handling, deal closing, and long-term relationship management.
 * Comprehensive understanding of investment solutions, including Active funds, ETFs, Index strategies, and Private Market solutions.
 * Strong leadership and people management skills, with the ability to inspire, develop, and motivate high-performing teams.
 * Proven ability to collaborate cross-functionally with product, investment, and marketing teams to align local execution with broader EMEA Wealth priorities.
 * Strategic mindset combined with operational excellence, ensuring disciplined execution, pipeline management, and delivery of commercial objectives.
   
   

Skills/Qualifications


 * At least a Bachelor’s degree (Master’s degree preferred) in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, or equivalent professional experience.
 * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret complex data, identify trends, and translate insights into actionable commercial strategies.
 * Advanced proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint, with the ability to build high-quality business plans, performance dashboards, and client presentations.
 * Excellent research and data management capabilities, supporting market analysis, segmentation, and business development activities.
 * Outstanding communication and presentation skills, with the ability to engage effectively with senior stakeholders and external partners.
 * High level of commercial acumen and strategic thinking, with strong attention to detail and execution discipline.
 * Proactive, collaborative, and results-driven mindset, able to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
 * Strong organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to balance multiple priorities and meet tight deadlines.
 * Fluent in English.
   
   

Our Benefits

To help you stay energized, engaged and inspired, we offer a wide range of employee benefits including: retirement investment and tools designed to help you in building a sound financial future; access to education reimbursement; comprehensive resources to support your physical health and emotional well-being; family support programs; and Flexible Time Off (FTO) so you can relax, recharge and be there for the people you care about.

Our hybrid work model

BlackRock’s hybrid work model is designed to enable a culture of collaboration and apprenticeship that enriches the experience of our employees, while supporting flexibility for all. Employees are currently required to work at least 4 days in the office per week, with the flexibility to work from home 1 day a week. Some business groups may require more time in the office due to their roles and responsibilities. We remain focused on increasing the impactful moments that arise when we work together in person – aligned with our commitment to performance and innovation. As a new joiner, you can count on this hybrid model to accelerate your learning and onboarding experience here at BlackRock.

About BlackRock

At BlackRock, we are all connected by one mission: to help more and more people experience financial well-being. Our clients, and the people they serve, are saving for retirement, paying for their children’s educations, buying homes and starting businesses. Their investments also help to strengthen the global economy: support businesses small and large; finance infrastructure projects that connect and power cities; and facilitate innovations that drive progress.

This mission would not be possible without our smartest investment – the one we make in our employees. It’s why we’re dedicated to creating an environment where our colleagues feel welcomed, valued and supported with networks, benefits and development opportunities to help them thrive.

For additional information on BlackRock, please visit @blackrock | Twitter: @blackrock | LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/blackrock

BlackRock is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to age, disability, race, religion, sex, sexual orientation and other protected characteristics at law.

title: DIRECTOR/A DE OPERACIONES ES_874567
description:
Compañía industrial líder en su sector, precisa incorporar un/a DIRECTOR/A DE OPERACIONES que, reportando a la Dirección General, tendrá como objetivo gestionar y coordinar el área industrial del negocio de velas, incluyendo producción, calidad, compras, I+D, logística y mantenimiento, asegurando el óptimo rendimiento de las instalaciones productivas y el cumplimiento de los objetivos de coste, calidad y servicio.

 * Proponer inversiones y mejoras para garantizar competitividad en el negocio.
 * Gestionar el área de Compras, asegurando la negociación con proveedores, la optimización de costes y la disponibilidad de materiales en tiempo y forma.
 * Coordinar el área de I+D, impulsando la innovación en productos y procesos, garantizando el desarrollo de nuevos proyectos alineados con la estrategia del negocio.
 * Velar por el cumplimiento de normas de seguridad, prevención de riesgos y medio ambiente en las plantas de velas.
 * Liderar planes de mejora continua en calidad, productividad y mantenimiento.
 * Reportar mensualmente sobre: producción, entregas, costes, calidad, inversiones, seguridad y proyectos de mejora.




Requisitos:

 * Experiencia mínima de 10 años en sector industrial
 * Experiencia en mercados internacionales.

Buscamos un profesional con visión de negocio, claramente orientado a resultados y a la rentabilidad, y con una buena capacidad de liderazgo para la gestión del cambio.

title: Director of Media - EdTech (French fluent 🇫🇷)
description:
What if your next playground was transforming a massive Personal Brand ecosystem into a global, iconic Company Brand? What about challenging the status quo of an entire industry and building a brand you can be proud of, and that will help millions of people?

Then you’ll love this.

We’re not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to follow a calendar. We’re looking for a Director of Media (Brand & Content).

Someone who understands that to win today, you don't just need "content", you need a Movement. You will have the freedom to propose bold, unconventional concepts and the resources to bring them to life immediately.

We need a strategist like you who will bridge the gap between David Laroche’s personal influence and Paradox’s institutional power.

A Brand Architect, capable of orchestrating a complex dual-strategy: scaling a personal brand while simultaneously building a standalone Company Brand that outlasts its founder.

A Creative Disruptor, you hate "best practices" because they lead to average results. You constantly hunt for the "Purple Cow", the angle, the format, or the story that no one else is daring to tell.

A "Doer" with Taste, you don't just float ideas in a meeting room. You script them, you drive them, and you ship them.

This is a full-time position, carried out remotely or from our beautiful offices in Dubaï or Lisbon. French and English fluency is required.

About Paradox

WHAT WE DO

At Paradox, we are convinced that greatness is trainable.

That’s why we want to empower people at scale, by leveraging cutting edge technologies like AI, and crafting user experiences with outstanding aesthetics.

We do that by merging :


 * Human Intelligence (coaches, peers, and mentors)
 * Structured Intelligence (protocols, mental models, rituals),
 * Technological Intelligence (AI personalization, feedback loops, adaptive journeys)
   
   

To create one seamless ecosystem: Paradox OS.

OUR BELIEFS

We believe self-help is broken.

Most learning platforms are used the same way : consuming generic theories, getting quick highs, ending with no real change.

At Paradox, we believe people deserve more.

More than content. More than motivation.

They deserve a system that knows them, one that adapts, challenges, and grows with them.

We believe that every human learns differently, and that technology can do more than entertain or save time.

It can translate insight into transformation, through AI personalization, lean experimentation, and deep psychological understanding.

Because learning shouldn’t just make you feel inspired for a day, it should change how you live, think, and create.

OUR VISION

At Paradox, we want to re-invent how people grow.

We do not build another course or coaching app but the Operating System for Greatness.

Founded by David Laroche, a creator followed by over 2 million people and known for his interviews with icons like Tony Parker, Mike Horn, Richard Branson, and Gad Elmaleh, Paradox aims to build something that will live beyond any individual (including its founder), for decades to come.

Our ambition is to compete with players like Mindvalley (150M ARR), but with a sharper vision, grounded protocols for achievers, people who want more for their life, refusing mediocrity.

To do that, we bring together designers, tech, coaches, and filmmakers to create learning experiences that are cinematic, precise, and effective.

We move fast, aim high, and hold ourselves to the standards of Apple, Spotify, and MasterClass. No fluff, focused on meaningful impact.

While others hide their numbers, we want to let our results speak loudly for us.

Get obsessed with transforming our clients’ lives and let those transformations be our marketing.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Transform a "Personal Brand" into a "Top-Tier Media".

You lead the Content Factory not by administrative management, but by creative authority. Your goal is to produce content that is so good, unique, and aligned with our values that it makes our competitors look outdated.

Your 4 Major Responsibilities


 * Architect the "Dual-Brand" Strategy
 * Build a symbiotic strategy where David Laroche’s personal brand and Paradox’s company brand reinforce each other without cannibalization.
 * Propose radical new formats (documentaries, reality shows, conceptual shorts) that shatter the boring codes of the "Self-Help" industry.
 * Define distinct, sharp editorial lines for each platform: Depth & Search for YouTube, Aesthetic & Vibe for Instagram, and Authority & Authenticity for LinkedIn.
 * Radical Concepting & End-to-End Delivery
 * Take responsibility for the entire production chain by writing the hooks, storyboarding the narrative, and ensuring the final cut matches the vision.
 * Deliver what you pitch: if your concept requires a specific motion designer, a drone operator, or a niche expert, you find them, hire them, and onboard them to bring the vision to life.
 * Treat David as the "Actor" on set: you ensure scripts, set, and direction are flawless so he can just show up, perform, and leave without any mental load, trusting you to handle every detail of the final output.
 * Command the Content Factory
 * Take full leadership of the internal content team (Factory Manager, Video Editors, Graphic Designers…) by setting the tempo, the culture, and the daily standards of excellence.
 * Provide high-level artistic direction and act as the final quality check; nothing gets published if it doesn't meet the "Paradox Standard" of aesthetics and storytelling.
 * Challenge the team to constantly upskill, pushing them for sharper cuts, better sound design, and stronger visual storytelling.
 * Fuel the Growth Engine
 * Treat content as our primary acquisition channel by collaborating with the Head of Growth to produce assets specifically designed to convert in Ads.
 * Analyze retention graphs, CTR, and CPL to iterate based on feedback, killing what fails and aggressively scaling what works.
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience


 * Proven Content Builder: You have successfully grown a media brand, a YouTube channel, or a personal brand to significant scale (100k+ followers or millions of views). You understand the mechanics of virality and retention.
 * Editorial Leadership: You have experience managing a creative team (editors, designers) and know how to give feedback that elevates a "good" video to a "masterpiece."
 * Elite Scripting Skills: You can show us scripts you wrote that performed. You know how to structure a narrative, write a hook that stops the scroll, and keep an audience engaged for 20+ minutes.
 * Performance Fluency: You have worked in environments where content had to drive business results (ads, launches, conversion), not just vanity metrics.
   
   

PERSONALITY


 * Intolerant to Mediocrity: You have "Taste." You are physically pained by a bad font, a clumsy cut, or a weak headline. You fight for the details that others ignore.
 * Psychology Obsessed: You don't just "make content"; you study human nature. You constantly ask why people click, why they share, and what emotion drives them.
 * A "Doer" with Authority: You command respect not by title, but by competence. You can jump into a project, write the script, direct the shoot, and fix the edit if needed.
 * No Ego, Just Impact: You don't fall in love with your ideas. You accept that even the best concepts can flop. When it happens, you don't take it personally; you analyze the data, pivot immediately, and ship the next concept with renewed energy.
   
   

Language

French: Native / Bilingual

English: Fluent English, you can hold a conversation on specific details with English-speaking colleagues.

Our chosen language for written communication is English.

IT MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

❌ If you need clarity before chaos — wrong place.

❌ If you prefer balance over intensity — wrong season.

❌ If you don't genuinely care about the topics we cover — wrong place.

❌ If you want to strategize without getting your hands dirty in scripting, directing, or the editing suite — wrong role.

WHY JOIN US ❤️

Help us market a product that fuses neuroscience, design, and AI to reinvent how humans grow.

Work with filmmakers, psychologists, engineers, and creatives obsessed with impact.

In the heart of our headquarters stands the 100 000 Dreams Wall,

Every photo on that wall is a life rewritten:

“I ran a marathon.”

“I started my company.”

“I found peace with my father.”

You will play a crucial role in the development of an Iconic Product.

Growth & Ambition


 * > 🏅Being surrounded by A-players who strive to perform
   
   

Impact & Meaning


 * > Playing a crucial role in the development of a company whose content and products will be used by millions of people
 * > Waking up in the morning feeling like you are making a difference is something!
   
   

We receive messages every day from clients who have successfully lost weight, quit smoking, reach a milestone in their business, built better relationships, and made positive changes in their lives.


 * > ❤️ Contributing to the Paradox Foundation (our non-profit), dedicated to empower teenagers
   
   

But that's not all, we believe that driven people deserve…

Freedom & Well Being 🗽


 * > 😎A company culture based on autonomy & accountability
 * > 🗽Flexible working hours
 * > 🌎A remote culture from day one with the freedom to work from wherever you want
 * > 🏤Magnificent office in Dubai, Paris, Lisbon - it feels like home :)
 * > 💻Work on Mac, for us it counts :)
 * > 🏀350€ per year paid by the company to take care of yourself ( for your gym, or dance class or whatever make you feel great)
 * > 📚150€ of books or education - At Paradox, we are learner lovers and we want to support you in that
 * > 🔥6 1:1coachings - A Paradox Coach supporting you on anything personal or professional, we want you to live your best life
   
   

How To Apply 📃

That job description resonated with you?

Click on "Apply for this position" and fill out a short questionnaire (7 to 8 minutes) to tell us more about yourself and send us your CV!

Hiring process

📃 A 6 to 8 minutes application survey.

💻 A 15-30 minutes video call with Timy, our HR, to assess the fit between the position, the company, and your own career path.

💻 A video-call focused on your career with Quentin, VP Marketing, to review your background & see how we can match your desires with our needs.

💻 A culture-fit video call to check in depth the alignment between you and our values and culture.

💼 Reference calls to get in-depth insights about how you work in different environments, make your onboarding easier, and give everybody on the team the insurance to be surrounded by A-Players.

🤗 Welcome aboard!

About Our Hiring Process

Our recruitment process is tailored to do our best to avoid that you or us realize that we’re not a perfect fit in two or six months. It might seem long, but every step serves a purpose and will allow us to get to know you better as much as it’ll help you understand more where you’ll be stepping in.

We also want you to have time to ask all of your questions regarding your job description, the long-term vision of your team and the company, our values, with the relevant interlocutor in front of you.

The steps mentioned above can be rearranged depending on yours and the interviewer’s availability.

If you’re not joining to tweak landing pages.

If you’re here to engineer behavioral change at scale, for millions.

Welcome to Paradox.

Let’s build the Operating System for Greatness.

title: Head Analytics Engineering & Self-service
description:
Are you passionate about empowering people with data and shaping modern self‑service analytics? Do you enjoy working where technology, product thinking, and user enablement come together? Then our Analytics Engineering & Self‑Service team wants to hear from you. We are a driven and collaborative group responsible for building the foundations, governance, and tools that enable SIX BFI to become a truly data‑empowered organization.

In this role, you will lead the evolution of our self‑service ecosystem while coaching a small team and partnering closely with business stakeholders and platform engineering. Your mission is to scale autonomy, strengthen data literacy, and ensure that users across the organization can explore, analyze, and act on data with confidence.

 

What You Will Do 

 * Shape and Evolve the Self‑Service Operating Model: Drive a decentralized analytics approach that boosts autonomy for end users, defining clear ownership boundaries and ensuring scalable, efficient ways of working across teams.
 * Lead User Enablement Strategy: Define the strategy for ongoing training, documentation, and enablement programs—leveraging your own team and indirect contributors to deliver high‑impact sessions on Azure, Databricks, Power BI, and related tools.
 * Act as a Platform and Data Expert: Develop deep expertise in SIX BFI’s data assets and analytics platforms, guiding users, answering complex questions, and helping teams get the most value from available tooling.
 * Engage and Support Stakeholders: Serve as the primary partner for business stakeholders—gathering needs, offering hands‑on support, and ensuring feedback directly shapes platform improvements and user experience.
 * Lead and Develop the Team: Mentor a small team of analytics engineers and specialists, set execution priorities, and ensure the team focuses on high‑value projects while maintaining responsive user support.

What You Bring

 * Leadership Experience: 5+ years in data/analytics roles and at least 1 year managing people in a data-focused environment, balancing strategy with hands-on execution.
 * Education: A degree in a relevant field (Data Science, Engineering, Computer Science, Business, or similar) is welcome, but equivalent hands-on experience in analytics leadership is equally valued.
 * Technical Proficiency: Hands-on experience with Databricks, Spark, Python, SQL, dbt, and BI tools (such as Power BI), with the ability to coach users and guide platform adoption.
 * Governance & Operating Model Insight: Experience defining ownership boundaries, establishing ways of working across teams, and aligning decentralized analytics practices with organizational goals.
 * Communication & Stakeholder Skills: Ability to translate complex data concepts to technical and non‑technical audiences, build trusted relationships, and tactically guide users across multiple departments.
 * Domain Awareness & Language Skills: Financial data understanding is a plus, English fluency is required, and experience navigating multinational environments is beneficial.

title: Sr. Director, Sales Pharmacies
description:
Job description:



Resumen de funciones
Tiene la responsabilidad general de la gestión, el desarrollo y el rendimiento de todos los canales comerciales minoristas (farmacias independientes, cadenas de farmacias, mayoristas, parafarmacias, comercio electrónico, etc.) en toda España.
El rol garantiza la alineación entre la estrategia de comercialización, la ejecución y la rentabilidad. 

En un entorno minorista dinámico y altamente competitivo, esta posición es un pilar clave para maximizar la rentabilidad del canal a través de la asignación estratégica de inversiones y decisiones de combinación de productos en todos los canales y clientes, asegurando el acceso, la penetración y la sostenibilidad comercial.

El rol trabaja sinérgicamente con Trade Marketing, Marketing, BU Primary and CHC, Finanzas y Supply para optimizar el modelo de distribución y la presencia en la tienda.

Responsabilidades clave

 * Implementar la estrategia de la compañía, asegurando un posicionamiento comercial y de distribución adecuado para cada canal y segmento. 
 * Gestione directamente los responsables de canal, asegurando la venta, distribución, rotación de la cartera de productos, ejecución promocional, condiciones comerciales y facilitación de la venta. 
 * Apoyar a Commercial Excellence en la definición de la lógica de segmentación y priorización de canales/clientes, alineados con el potencial de mercado, la estrategia de cartera y las prioridades de Iberia 
 * Supervisar las relaciones con clientes clave (distribuidores, redes, mayoristas, grupos de compra), liderando negociaciones estratégicas y acuerdos marco.
 * Garantizar una ejecución comercial coherente en todo el territorio mediante la coordinación de las estructuras de campo y el seguimiento de los KPI de actividad y rendimiento (venta, cobertura, eficiencia promocional, rentabilidad, etc.). 
 * Colaborar con el equipo de Trade Marketing para optimizar las condiciones promocionales, la arquitectura del paquete y las acciones de gasto comercial. 
 * Colaborar con Supply Chain en la planificación de la demanda y logística, asegurando la previsión ascendente por cliente/canal/producto.
 * Fomentar una cultura organizacional centrada en el cliente, la eficacia de la ejecución y la responsabilidad. 

Requisitos Educación y experiencia

 * Licenciado en Economía, Administración de empresas, o campos relacionados. MBA o Máster en Gestión Farmacéutica / Estrategia Comercial es una ventaja. 
 * 10+ años de experiencia en roles comerciales y de canal dentro de los sectores farmacéutico o de bienes de consumo, con responsabilidad directa sobre los canales minoristas y E-commerce. 
 * Trayectoria probada en la gestión de estructuras multicanal complejas (ventas + comercio), con un enfoque analítico y orientado al rendimiento.
 * Valorable experiencia en Marketing/Trade Marketing. 

Habilidades técnicas y gerenciales

 * Profundo conocimiento del mercado minorista farmacéutico español, su dinámica de distribución y los comportamientos de compra de varios actores. 
 * Excelentes habilidades de negociación, capacidad para gestionar clientes complejos y construir relaciones beneficiosas para todos.
 * Sólida orientación a los datos y a los resultados financieros, con un enfoque en el crecimiento sostenible a medio y largo plazo.
 * Visión estratégica para modelos de comercialización, con capacidad para estructurar e implementar marcos organizacionales efectivos.
 * Competencia en el uso de KPI y paneles para impulsar el rendimiento comercial (por ejemplo, IQVIA, IRI, Power BI, CRM).
 * Fuertes capacidades de liderazgo, coaching y gestión del cambio.
 * Espíritu colaborativo y habilidades de influencia multifuncionales. Departamento: Sales Retail Ubicación: Barcelona (preferiblemente) Reporta a: Iberia GM Org chart Sales Retail Department:

title: Director/a de Calidad Multiplanta
description:
La posición de Director/a de Calidad Multiplanta será responsable de liderar la estrategia de Calidad, Seguridad Alimentaria y Cumplimiento Normativo en varias plantas productivas ubicadas en la Comunidad Valenciana. Será la máxima figura garante de la calidad dentro del modelo industrial, asegurando que todas las fábricas operan bajo estándares homogéneos, eficientes y alineados con la regulación vigente, los requisitos de clientes y las certificaciones internacionales del sector alimentario.




Su rol será esencial para estandarizar procesos, impulsar mejoras continuas, preparar auditorías, coordinar equipos técnicos y garantizar el cumplimiento de las políticas corporativas, actuando como nexo entre Dirección Industrial, Producción y los distintos responsables de planta




RESPONSABILIDADES PRINCIPALES:




Dirección Estratégica de Calidad

 * Definir, desarrollar y ejecutar la estrategia global de Calidad y Seguridad Alimentaria para todas las plantas asignadas.
 * Garantizar la correcta implementación de las políticas corporativas en materia de calidad, seguridad alimentaria, higiene y sistemas de gestión.
 * Liderar el proceso de armonización de procedimientos, controles y estándares comunes entre plantas.




Gestión y Supervisión Multiplanta

 * Coordinar y supervisar a los Responsables de Calidad locales, asegurando coherencia y eficiencia entre centros.
 * Realizar visitas periódicas a plantas para evaluar desempeño, riesgos y oportunidades de mejora.
 * Asegurar que los equipos disponen de recursos, formación y metodologías adecuadas.




Certificaciones, Auditorías y Cumplimiento

 * Gestionar y asegurar el mantenimiento de certificaciones como IFS, BRC, ISO 22000, ISO 9001, bienestar animal o certificaciones específicas según categoría de producto.
 * Coordinar auditorías internas y externas, así como inspecciones oficiales.
 * Velar por el estricto cumplimiento de la legislación nacional y europea en materia alimentaria (APPCC, etiquetado, higiene, trazabilidad, etc.).




Gestión de No Conformidades y Mejora Continua

 * Dirigir la investigación de incidentes, reclamaciones y no conformidades; definir planes correctivos y preventivos.
 * Impulsar proyectos de mejora continua orientados a la reducción de mermas, optimización de procesos de calidad y robustez de sistemas.
 * Promover la cultura de calidad en toda la cadena productiva.




Relación con Clientes y Proveedores

 * Ser interlocutor/a clave frente a clientes estratégicos para temas de calidad, auditorías y homologaciones.
 * Asegurar la evaluación, auditoría y homologación de proveedores críticos.




Gestión de Datos y Reporting

 * Consolidar información entre plantas, analizar KPIs de calidad y presentar informes a Dirección General y Dirección Industrial.
 * Detectar tendencias y proponer planes de acción.




REQUISITOS DEL PERFIL:

Formación

 * Ingeniería Alimentaria, Ingeniería Química, Veterinaria, Ciencia y Tecnología de los Alimentos o titulaciones afines.
 * Formación complementaria en Seguridad Alimentaria, APPCC, IFS/BRC o similar.




Experiencia

 * Más de 7–10 años de experiencia en departamentos de Calidad dentro del sector alimentario.
 * Experiencia demostrable gestionando equipos y responsabilidad sobre varias plantas.
 * Haber trabajado con clientes y retailers exigentes (distribución moderna, exportación…).




Competencias Clave

 * Liderazgo, visión estratégica y capacidad de influencia.
 * Alto conocimiento técnico en sistemas de calidad y seguridad alimentaria.
 * Capacidad de gestión del cambio, orden y estandarización de procesos.
 * Comunicación efectiva y orientación a resultados.
 * Capacidad para trabajar bajo exigencia y alta responsabilidad.




Idiomas

 * Castellano nativo.
 * Valorable inglés a nivel profesional (B2+ / C1).




Disponibilidad

 * Movilidad frecuente para visitar plantas en la Comunidad Valenciana y ocasionalmente fuera de la región.

title: Responsable de mantenimiento industria alimentaria
description:
Tu labor principal consistirá en coordinar y supervisar el plan de mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo de toda la maquinaria e instalaciones de la planta. Deberás gestionar el equipo de técnicos a tu cargo organizando los turnos de trabajo y asegurando que las averías se resuelvan con la mayor rapidez para minimizar paradas en la producción. También te encargarás de la relación con proveedores externos y de la gestión del stock de repuestos necesarios para la actividad diaria.

Otra de tus responsabilidades fundamentales será garantizar que todas las intervenciones cumplan estrictamente con las normativas de seguridad alimentaria y prevención de riesgos laborales. Participarás activamente en la propuesta de mejoras técnicas para optimizar el rendimiento de las líneas de envasado y procesado de alimentos. Además, llevarás el control de los presupuestos del departamento y el seguimiento de los indicadores clave de rendimiento para asegurar la máxima eficiencia operativa de la fábrica.




requisitos del puesto

 * Ingeniero Técnico: Industrial, Grado
 * Inglés: B1
 * Conocimientos
 * automatizacion industrial, scada factory talk native spanish
 * Experiencia: 3 años

Ingeniería industrial o formación técnica en Mantenimiento Industrial, Electromecánica o

Valorable formación complementaria en gestión de equipos y seguridad industrial.

Experiencia como mínimo 3-5 años en mantenimiento industrial, preferiblemente en sector alimentario.

Experiencia en gestión de equipos (4-6 personas) y planificación de mantenimiento preventivo.

Conocimientos técnicos en Electromecánica, electricidad y automatización industrial. Normativas de seguridad alimentaria y PRL.

Gestión de repuestos y herramientas.Software de gestión de mantenimiento.Programación y manejo de sistemas de control industrial (SCADA, PLC, automatización avanzada).

マリオットインターナショナルでは、機会均等の雇用主として、すべての人を歓迎し、機会を提供するよう努めています。アソシエイトひとり一人のバックグラウンドが評価され、尊重される環境を積極的に育んでいます。私たちの最大の強みは、アソシエイトの様々な文化、才能、経験が豊かに融合している点にあります。当社は、身体障害者、退役軍人、あるいは準拠法によって保護されるその他の根拠を含め、あらゆる根拠に基づく差別の撤廃に取り組んでいます。

時代を超越した魅力と先駆的な精神を兼ね備えたセントレジスホテル＆リゾートは、世界各地の一等地に50以上のラグジュアリーホテルとリゾートを展開し、極上の体験をお届けすることに尽力しています。20世紀初頭にジョン・ジェイコブ・アスター4世がニューヨークにセントレジスホテルを開業して以来、すべてのお客様一人ひとりに妥協のないきめ細やかな最高級のサービスを提供することに尽力しています。これを完璧に実現するのが、洗練されたクラシックなスタイルとモダンな感性を兼ね備えたホスピタリティあふれるチームと、シグネチャーサービスであるバトラーサービスです。ぜひセントレジスの採用情報をご覧ください。セントレジスの一員になると、マリオット・インターナショナルのブランドポートフォリオに加わることになります。最高の仕事をして、 目標を達成し、素晴らしいグローバルチームに参加し、 最高の自分になることができる場所 で働いてみませんか。

title: Director, GMNS Strategic Risk – International
description:
At American Express, our culture is built on a 175-year history of innovation, shared values and Leadership Behaviors, and an unwavering commitment to back our customers, communities, and colleagues. From delivering differentiated products to providing world-class customer service, we operate with a strong risk mindset, ensuring we continue to uphold our brand promise of trust, security, and service.





Here, your voice and ideas matter, your work makes an impact, and together, you will help us define the future of American Express.





How will you make an impact in this role?





The Director, GMNS Strategic Risk - International, is part of the Risk & Business Operations team within Global Strategy, Operations & Performance (GSOP). GSOP serves as a Center of Excellence for Global Merchant & Network Services (GMNS), driving enterprise-level strategy, performance management, and operational execution.



The GMNS Strategic Risk team is a project-based group responsible for addressing key business questions that integrate strategic insight, detailed planning, and disciplined execution with a focus on delivering risk mitigation, remediation, and operational resilience across GMNS. The team also leads cross-business strategic program implementations that align to GMNS priorities.


The Director will play a central role in shaping and delivering key initiatives and will oversee these cross-functional projects to ensure compliance, process rigor, and readiness to meet evolving regulatory and operational demands.



The Director will report to the Vice President, GMNS Business Operations and Strategic Projects.





Key Responsibilities:





 * Hire, lead, develop, and coach a team of three Managers.
   
 * Manage a portfolio of strategic projects, from inception through to delivery, collaborating with cross-functional partners across market and central program teams.
   
 * Establish workstream and governance structures and develop tracking mechanisms to communicate progress, risk and outcomes, and the effectiveness of those risk mitigation actions.
   
 * Apply innovative, strategic thinking to synthesize insights, customer needs, and market dynamics to inform business recommendations around remediation and mitigation efforts.
   
 * Create structure in ambiguous and evolving situations, ask the right questions, and synthesize complex inputs to guide strategic direction.  Use data, dashboards, and insights to guide priorities.
   
 * Build strong stakeholder relationships (across 1st and 2nd Lines of Defense, and GCO) and effectively communicate recommendations to GMNS partners and Senior Leadership, to facilitate decision-making and resolve strategic trade-offs. 
   
 * Maintain a pipeline of projects and initiatives in partnership with GMNS leaders, and prioritize those projects based on strategic value, ROI, and risk.
   
 * Foster collaboration and a culture of continuous learning.
   




Minimum Qualifications:





 * Highly motivated, strategic thinker with demonstrated success leading cross-functional teams and delivering complex programs, projects or processes in a global, matrixed environment.
   
 * Proven experience in project management, risk management or process ownership, with a strong sense of urgency and focus on results.
   
 * Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to translate regulatory and operational complexity into actionable strategies for stakeholders across levels.
   
 * Strong relationship management capabilities with internal and external partners.
   
 * Self-starter with high intellectual curiosity, initiative, drive, and attention to detail.
   
 * Proven experience in risk management, remediation, and regulatory execution across multiple markets and functions.
   
 * Background in program management, process transformation, governance, compliance, operational excellence are all beneficial for success in this role.
   
 * Collaborative people leader with a demonstrated passion for talent development.
   
 * Proven strengths in learning and change agility.
   











Employment eligibility to work with American Express in Spain is required as the company will not pursue visa sponsorship for these positions.








We back you with benefits that support your holistic well-being so you can be and deliver your best. This means caring for you and your loved ones' physical, financial, and mental health, as well as providing the flexibility you need to thrive personally and professionally:
 * Competitive base salaries 
 * Bonus incentives 
 * Support for financial-well-being and retirement 
 * Comprehensive medical, dental, vision, life insurance, and disability benefits (depending on location) 
 * Flexible working model with hybrid, onsite or virtual arrangements depending on role and business need 
 * Generous paid parental leave policies (depending on your location) 
 * Free access to global on-site wellness centers staffed with nurses and doctors (depending on location) 
 * Free and confidential counseling support through our Healthy Minds program 
 * Career development and training opportunities
   

Offer of employment with American Express is conditioned upon the successful completion of a background verification check, subject to applicable laws and regulations.

title: Senior Business Controller
location: Sant Cugat del Vallès, Catalonia, Spain
description:
Desde Paul Marlex, estamos colaborando con un sólido grupo empresarial que precisa incorporar un/a Controller Financiero/a Senior para su equipo, en dependencia directa de la Responsable Financiera del área.




¿Cuál será tu misión en la empresa?




Tu objetivo será dar soporte y aportar valor añadido a la Dirección de las diferentes Unidades de Negocio, asegurando un control financiero eficaz y una visión estratégica de los resultados.




Tus principales responsabilidades serán:

 * Elaborar y supervisar el proceso de reporting mensual, tanto interno como externo, de las empresas bajo tu responsabilidad.
 * Preparar el presupuesto anual y sus revisiones mensuales, analizando desviaciones y proponiendo acciones correctoras.
 * Desarrollar los Forecasts y herramientas de control de la actividad.
 * Definir y hacer seguimiento de los indicadores clave (KPIs).
 * Optimizar los Sistemas de Información y participar en proyectos de mejora como implantaciones de ERP o nuevas adquisiciones.
 * Gestionar el Balance y garantizar la fiabilidad de la información financiera.




Si tienes esto, ¡este es tu proyecto!

 * Pasión por las finanzas, proactividad y capacidad de autonomía.
 * Titulación universitaria en ADE o similar; se valorará formación adicional (MBA, Auditoría o especialización Financiera).
 * Experiencia mínima de 5 años en una posición similar, preferiblemente en auditoría o en gestión financiera.
 * Dominio de Excel avanzado y conocimientos de CRM, sistemas de gestión de reporting, bases de datos y Power BI.
 * Perfil analítico y estructurado, con orientación a negocio y excelentes habilidades de comunicación.




¿Qué te ofrece la empresa?

 * Incorporación a un grupo empresarial sólido y referente en su sector.
 * Formar parte de un equipo profesionalizado y con proyectos de crecimiento.
 * Posibilidades reales de desarrollo profesional.
 * Plan de retribución flexible (seguro médico, ticket restaurante, ticket guardería, entre otros beneficios).
 * Proyecto que prioriza el trabajo en equipo dentro de la oficina, no se ofrece teletrabajo.

W Marriott International dążymy do tego, aby być pracodawcą oferującym równe szanse, przyjmującym wszystkich i zapewniającym dostęp do możliwości. Aktywnie wspieramy środowisko, w którym wyjątkowe pochodzenie naszych pracowników jest cenione i honorowane. Naszą mocną stroną jest bogata różnorodność kulturowa, talenty i doświadczenia naszych pracowników. Zobowiązujemy się do zapobiegania dyskryminacji ze względu na jakąkolwiek chronioną podstawę, w tym niepełnosprawność, status weterana lub inną podstawę chronioną przez obowiązujące prawo.

Łącząc ponadczasowe piękno z awangardową atmosferą, St. Regis Hotels & Resorts zobowiązuje się do zapewnienia wyszukanych doświadczeń w ponad 50 luksusowych hotelach i kurortach w najlepszych lokalizacjach na całym świecie. Od otwarcia pierwszego hotelu The St. Regis w Nowym Jorku przez Johna Jacoba Astora IV na początku XX wieku marka pozostaje wierna pierwotnej idei. Pragniemy dostarczać wszystkim gościom bezkompromisowego poziomu usług, które łączą tradycyjne wyrafinowanie z nowoczesną wrażliwością i są bezbłędnie świadczone przez zespół życzliwych gospodarzy, a także w ramach naszej charakterystycznej usługi Butler Service. Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z ofertami pracy w St. Regis. Stając się częścią zespołu St. Regis, dołączasz do portfolio marek Marriott International. Bądź tam, gdzie możesz pracować najlepiej, jak potrafisz, rozpocznij realizację zamierzeń, poczuj przynależność do niesamowitej globalnej społeczności i stań się najlepszą wersją siebie.

title: Senior Director, EMEA Marketing
description:
Acronis is a global leader in cyber protection, delivering natively integrated solutions that monitor, control, and protect the data that businesses and lives rely on every day. Driven by our passion to protect every workload, we’ve built the industry’s only all-in-one cyber protection platform. We are looking for a Senior Marketing Director for EMEA to join us in protecting the digital world.

The Senior Director of EMEA Marketing will lead regional field marketing strategy and execution across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. This is a senior leadership role responsible for driving pipeline, revenue impact, and brand presence across the region through close partnership with sales leadership.

Reporting directly to the CMO, this role will own the development and execution of the EMEA marketing strategy, leading a high-performing team focused on scalable demand generation, account-based marketing, thought leadership, partner programs, and customer experiences. This is an exciting opportunity to help shape the regional marketing function and make a measurable impact in a high-growth, global organization.

What You'll Do


 * Own and execute the EMEA marketing strategy, aligning regional and sub-regional plans to global priorities and sales targets
 * Partner closely with EMEA sales leadership to drive pipeline, revenue, and market impact
 * Build, lead, and develop a high-performing regional field marketing team across multiple countries and operating models
 * Drive scalable demand generation programs, including targeted account marketing, regional campaigns, and local execution
 * Lead regional thought leadership and third-party programs to increase awareness and engagement with key decision-maker audiences
 * Leverage data and insights (e.g., Salesforce, intent data, marketing analytics) to guide targeting, prioritization, and optimization across the buyer journey
 * Design and execute impactful customer experiences and events that drive engagement, advocacy, and action
 * Deliver regionally aligned channel and alliance marketing programs in partnership with channel sales and marketing teams
 * Support the development of customer stories, use cases, and advocacy programs that highlight Acronis’ value and differentiation
 * Build strong cross-functional relationships to deliver a consistent, high-quality Acronis experience for customers and partners
 * Leverage AI, automation, and data-driven technologies to improve marketing efficiency, scalability, and impact across demand generation, campaign execution, and performance optimization
   
   

Who We’re Looking For


 * 8–10+ years of marketing experience within a technology and/or SaaS company, ideally in a high-growth, B2B environment
 * Proven success leading regional or field marketing teams with clear revenue and pipeline impact
 * Strong experience partnering with sales leadership in a matrixed organization
 * Demonstrated ability to drive demand generation, account-based marketing, and regional campaigns at scale
 * Data-driven mindset with experience using Salesforce, Marketo, and broader MarTech ecosystems
 * Experience leveraging AI, automation, or advanced analytics to drive marketing efficiency, scale, and measurable business outcomes
 * Strong strategic thinking paired with hands-on execution
 * Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence at all levels
 * Highly organized with strong project and program management capabilities
 * Bachelor’s degree required (Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field preferred)
 * Willingness to travel within the region up to ~30%
   
   

Who We Are

A Swiss company founded in Singapore in 2003, Acronis offers over twenty years of innovation with 15 offices worldwide and more than 1800 employees in 50+ countries. Acronis Cyber Protect is available in 26 languages in 150 countries and is used by over 20,000 service providers to protect over 750,000 businesses.

Our corporate culture centers on innovation, accountability, and impact. We encourage our people to think boldly, challenge conventional approaches, and take ownership of outcomes. As a member of our global “A-Team,” you’ll operate in a high-growth, fast-paced environment where resilience, adaptability, and a commitment to continuous improvement drive success.

title: Head of sales Europe Insulation & components
description:
The opportunity

The Head of sales Europe Insulation & components will lead global marketing strategy and execution for Hitachi’s HUB portfolio, driving market growth, product adoption, and brand leadership. This role develops comprehensive marketing plans, defines value propositions, and ensures effective go-to-market strategies in collaboration with product, sales, and engineering teams. It combines strategic planning with hands-on leadership, including managing budgets, guiding sales teams across multiple regions, and identifying new opportunities through market research and competitive analysis. Acting as a subject matter expert, the manager will represent Hitachi at industry events while staying ahead of emerging technologies and market trends.

How You’ll Make An Impact


 * Develop and implement comprehensive global marketing plans for the HUB product line, ensuring alignment with business objectives and market trends.
 * Facilitate and lead sales teams across multiple locations to drive performance and collaboration.
 * Support and execute the HUB product line strategy, including developing bottom-up budgets and achieving or exceeding top-down targets.
 * Conduct market research and competitive analysis to identify new opportunities, customer needs, and market gaps.
 * Define and articulate the value proposition, messaging, and positioning for the HUB product line across diverse customer segments and geographies.
 * Collaborate closely with product management, sales, and engineering teams to deliver successful product launches, go-to-market strategies, and sales enablement initiatives.
 * Manage the marketing budget for the HUB product line, ensuring efficient resource allocation.
 * Act as a subject matter expert for the HUB product line, representing Hitachi at industry events, conferences, and customer engagements.
 * Stay informed on emerging technologies and market dynamics within relevant industry sectors.
   
   

Your background


 * Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related technical field; MBA preferred
 * Minimum of 7 years of experience in product marketing, including at least 3 years focused on product line marketing within a technology or industrial sector
 * Proven track record of developing and executing successful global marketing strategies for complex technical products
 * Strong understanding of HUB technologies, industrial automation, or related infrastructure solutions
 * Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences
 * Demonstrated experience in market research, competitive analysis, and defining product value propositions
 * Proficiency in marketing automation platforms, CRM systems, and analytics tools
 * Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, matrixed organization
 * Strong project management skills and attention to detail
 * Willingness to travel internationally as required (approximately 20–30%)
   
   

Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader in electrification, powering a sustainable energy future through innovative power grid technologies with digital at the core. Over three billion people depend on our technologies to power their daily lives.

With over a century in pioneering mission-critical technologies like high-voltage, transformers, automation, and power electronics, we are addressing the most urgent energy challenge of our time – balancing soaring electricity demand, while decarbonizing the power system.

Headquartered in Switzerland, we employ over 50,000 people in 60 countries and generate revenues of around $16 billion USD. We welcome you to apply today.

title: Director of Engineering - AI Integrated Systems
description:
About Us

Axelera AI is not your regular deep-tech startup. We are creating the next-generation AI platform to support anyone who wants to help advancing humanity and improve the world around us.

In just four years, we have raised a total of $120 million and have built a world-class team of 220+ employees (including 49+ PhDs with more than 40,000 citations), both remotely from 18 different countries and with offices in Belgium, France, Switzerland, Italy, the UK, headquartered at the High Tech Campus in Eindhoven, Netherlands.

We have also launched our Metis™ AI Platform, which achieves a 3-5x increase in efficiency and performance, and have visibility into a strong business pipeline exceeding $100 million.

Our unwavering commitment to innovation has firmly established us as a global industry pioneer.

Are you up for the challenge?

Position Overview

We’re looking for a hands-on, strategic engineering leader to take ownership of our in-house hardware to lead the full hardware development organization responsible for designing our cards and system-level AI solutions built around the company’s accelerator chips.

This role is deeply rooted in hardware engineering excellence—owning schematic design oversight, power delivery architecture, high-speed board design, PCB layout quality, SI/PI methodologies, validation strategy, and the overall technical integrity of our products.

You will partner closely with the Director of AI Integrated Systems, who drives product development strategy, and the technical roadmap prioritisation. Your focus will be on engineering execution and technical leadership required to deliver high-performance, reliable, manufacturable hardware platforms.

Key responsibilities:


 * Serve as the technical authority for all hardware designs, guiding architecture, schematics, PCB stack-ups, high-speed routing, power delivery, SI/PI, thermal and mechanical engineering.
 * Own end-to-end hardware execution—from design reviews and bring-up to validation, reliability testing, DFM/DFT/DFR and mass-production readiness.
 * Oversee all hardware development activities in partnership with the Hardware R&D Manager, ensuring technical robustness, compliance, and performance across all products.
 * Define and enforce engineering processes, documentation standards, validation methodologies, and quality gates across the organisation.
 * Identify and mitigate technical risks, resolve engineering escalations, and drive debugging and root-cause analysis during development and early production.
 * Partner with product technical leaders to ensure strong product requirements, architectural clarity, and lean, manufacturable design execution.
 * Occasionally lead project technical execution when needed
 * Lead and mentor an experienced engineering organisation, ensuring clear roles, accountability, and growth paths for senior technical talent.
 * Align hardware execution with system integration, silicon, SDK/software, supply chain, productization, and operations.
 * Partner with the division Director to translate product development strategy into actionable engineering plans, schedules, and development priorities.
   
   

Qualifications:


 * 15+ years in hardware engineering for complex electronics products and 5+ years in senior leadership roles.
 * Experience with embedded compute, firmware or board-bring-up; familiarity with structured NPI processes.
 * Experience with high-speed interfaces,power delivery/VRM, PCB layout in high density, thermal/mechanical design, simulations and product validation/compliance.
 * Proven track record of delivering hardware designs into volume production.
 * Hands-on ability to review schematics, layouts, simulations, and lab validation data.
 * Experience with AI accelerators is a plus
 * Experience with server-level engineering is a plus
 * Leadership experience across multidisciplinary teams
 * Strong strategic thinker, excellent communicator and skilled at decision-making in fast-moving environments.
   
   

Location

We offer a flexible working arrangement, with options to:


 * Work from one of our Axelera AI offices (Leuven in Belgium, Amsterdam and Eindhoven in the Netherlands, Zurich in Switzerland, Florence and Milan in Italy or Bristol in the United Kingdom) if you're already based in the vicinity.
 * Work fully remotely from any European country (incl. the UK) you are already in.
 * Relocate with us and work from Italy (Florence or Milan) or the Netherlands (Amsterdam or Eindhoven).
   
   

What We offer 

This is your chance to shape and be part of a dynamic, fast-growing, international organization. We offer an attractive compensation package, including a pension plan, extensive employee insurances and the option to get company shares. 

An open culture that supports creativity and continual innovation is awaiting you. Collaborative ownership and freedom with responsibility is characteristic for the way we act and work as a team. 

At Axelera AI, we wholeheartedly embrace equal opportunity and hold diversity in the highest regard. Our steadfast commitment is to cultivate a warm and inclusive environment that empowers and celebrates every member of our team. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds to join us in shaping the future of AI.

title: Gerente
description:
Desde LHH Recruitment Solutions, estamos acompañando a una empresa industrial en la incorporación de un/a Gerente con fuerte orientación comercial y visión estratégica, capaz de liderar la compañía desde una perspectiva global de negocio: mercado, clientes, producción, personas y rentabilidad.




Buscamos un perfil senior, con criterios sólidos y experiencia real en la gestión integral de entornos industriales, alineado con los valores del modelo cooperativo y con vocación de permanencia.




Funciones principales

Dirección comercial y desarrollo de negocio

 * Liderar la estrategia comercial desde la propia gerencia, con foco en rentabilidad y crecimiento sostenible.
 * Analizar márgenes por cliente y proyecto, priorizar cuentas estratégicas y gestionar riesgos de concentración de cartera.
 * Evaluar la viabilidad de trabajos y ofertas desde un criterio económico–industrial.
 * Traducir las capacidades productivas reales en propuestas comerciales competitivas y sostenibles.

Visión estratégica y evolución del negocio

 * Participar, junto a producción y finanzas, en la definición y priorización de inversiones productivas y tecnológicas, impulsando la transición hacia Industria 4.0.
 * Planificar el relevo generacional y gestionar los procesos asociados a jubilaciones de socios, en coordinación con los órganos sociales.
 * Evaluar la evolución del mercado y anticipar necesidades futuras del negocio.

Liderazgo organizativo

 * Ordenar, estructurar y profesionalizar una organización pequeña pero compleja, definiendo funciones y responsabilidades claras.
 * Favorecer una comunicación directa, transparente y orientada a resultados.

Relación con el modelo cooperativo

 * Integrarse en la gobernanza cooperativa, comprendiendo los mecanismos de toma de decisiones y la participación de los socios.
 * Mostrar una visión de compromiso y permanencia dentro del modelo.




Requisitos

 * Formación superior en Ingeniería Industrial o similar.
 * Experiencia consolidada en entornos industriales y en posiciones de gestión con capacidad de decisión.
 * Trayectoria liderando áreas comerciales o la función comercial desde puestos de dirección.
 * Conocimiento y/o experiencia en entorno cooperativo industrial.
 * Euskera: nivel alto.
 * Inglés: nivel medio–alto.




Competencias clave

 * Rigor técnico–económico y criterio estratégico.
 * Comunicación clara y liderazgo orientado a la acción.
 * Visión comercial orientada a rentabilidad.
 * Capacidad para generar confianza en entornos cooperativos.
 * Toma de decisiones complejas en contextos industriales.

title: Jefe de producción
description:
Empresa del sector alimentario, integrada en un grupo líder a nivel nacional, especializada en la fabricación de productos de panadería y bollería, busca incorporar un/a Jefe/a de Producción para su centro productivo ubicado en zona Sur de Madrid.




Se trata de una organización con larga tradición industrial, que combina experiencia, innovación de producto y procesos de fabricación apoyados en las últimas tecnologías, eficiencia operativa y altos estándares de seguridad alimentaria.




Buscamos una persona que quiera implicarse en un proyecto sólido, estable y con recorrido, con capacidad real de influencia en el área productiva.




¿Cuál será tú misión?

Liderar y optimizar el área de producción, asegurando la eficiencia de los procesos, el desarrollo del equipo humano y la mejora continua de la planta.




¿Qué harás en tu día a día?

 * Planificar y programar la producción, optimizando recursos y capacidades.
 * Analizar y hacer seguimiento de los KPI’s de Producción.
 * Liderar y coordinar los equipos de producción, fomentando un entorno positivo y orientado a resultados.

 * Gestionar la información productiva como herramienta clave para la toma de decisiones.

¿Qué buscamos?

¿Qué ofrecemos?

Inscríbete o contacta con nosotros y forma parte de un proyecto con historia, presente y futuro.

title: Head Of Growth - EdTech (Full remote - French fluent 🇫🇷)
description:
Are you obsessed with turning insights into measurable growth?

What if your experiments didn’t just lift conversions but shaped how millions of people grow, learn, and act on their potential?

This Isn’t Another Growth Job.

It’s the chance to define a new category : The EcoSystem for Human Greatness Augmented with AI, combining behavioral science, technology, and AI.

We’re not looking for someone who only advises on what to test, we’re looking for someone who builds it.

A hands-on Head Of Growth who can ideate, copy, design the strategy and launch experiments directly.

Someone who speaks both data and persuasion fluently, and leverages AI tools daily to generate hypotheses, build assets, and accelerate iteration speed.

And you deserve it because you are…


 * A Conversion Architect, skilled at diagnosing funnel bottlenecks and translating data into structured experimentation roadmaps that deliver measurable business outcomes.
 * A Behavioral Strategist, fascinated by what drives human action, able to mix cognitive psychology, UX, and persuasion frameworks to design experiences that convert because they resonate.
 * A Data-driven Creator, fluent in GA4, Hotjar, AB Tasty, VWO, Amplitude, not just running tests, but connecting insights to revenue, retention, and lifetime value.
   
   

This is a full-time position, carried out remotely or from our beautiful offices in Dubaï or Lisbon.

About Paradox

French and English fluency is required.

What We Do

At Paradox, we are convinced that greatness is trainable.

That’s why we want to empower people at scale, by leveraging cutting edge technologies like AI, and crafting user experiences with outstanding aesthetics.

We do that by merging :


 * Human Intelligence (coaches, peers, and mentors)
 * Structured Intelligence (protocols, mental models, rituals),
 * Technological Intelligence (AI personalization, feedback loops, adaptive journeys)
   
   

To create one seamless ecosystem: Paradox OS.

OUR BELIEFS

We believe self-help is broken.

Most learning platforms are used the same way : consuming generic theories, getting quick highs, ending with no real change.

At Paradox, we believe people deserve more.

More than content. More than motivation.

They deserve a system that knows them, one that adapts, challenges, and grows with them.

We believe that every human learns differently, and that technology can do more than entertain or save time.

It can translate insight into transformation, through AI personalization, lean experimentation, and deep psychological understanding.

Because learning shouldn’t just make you feel inspired for a day, it should change how you live, think, and create.

OUR VISION

At Paradox, we want to re-invent how people grow.

We do not build another course or coaching app but the Operating System for Greatness.

Founded by David Laroche, a creator followed by over 2 million people and known for his interviews with icons like Tony Parker, Mike Horn, Richard Branson, and Gad Elmaleh, Paradox aims to build something that will live beyond any individual (including its founder), for decades to come.

Our ambition is to compete with players like Mindvalley (150M ARR), but with a sharper vision, grounded protocols for achievers, people who want more for their life, refusing mediocrity.

To do that, we bring together designers, tech, coaches, and filmmakers to create learning experiences that are cinematic, precise, and effective.

We move fast, aim high, and hold ourselves to the standards of Apple, Spotify, and MasterClass. No fluff, focused on meaningful impact.

While others hide their numbers, we want to let our results speak loudly for us.

Get obsessed with transforming our clients’ lives and let those transformations be our marketing.

And that’s where you come in.

YOUR MISSION 🚀

Architect and pilot the Revenue Engine. You will transition Paradox from a founder-led marketing approach to a brand-led, repeatable, data-driven engine.

You don't just manage a team, you get your hands dirty to identify growth levers and pull them yourself. Your obsession: taking a funnel, dismantling it, and rebuilding it to convert 2x better. You lead from the front, testing hypotheses, launching new channels, and showing the team how it's done.

Your Key Responsibilities


 * Offer–Market Fit continuously assessed, refined, repositioned, and launched
 * Identify which segments an offer truly works for and which it doesn’t.
 * Refine, reposition, or stop offers based on evidence.
   
   

2. Architect Funnels and campaigns (Hands-On)


 * You don't just "request" new funnels, you map them out and oversee their implementation directly.
 * You set up the tracking, you check the flows, and you ensure the machine works before managing budget scaling.
 * Relentless Optimization (CRO & A/B Testing)
 * You design, launch, and analyze A/B tests yourself (headlines, pricing, offers…). You don't wait for a report, you dig into the data to find the winner.
 * You proactively hunt for friction points in the user journey. If a page isn't converting, you audit it, propose a fix, and implement the test immediately with the team.
 * Design, launch, and analyze experiments across funnels, pricing, messaging
 * Ensure tracking, data integrity, and learnings compound over time
 * Channel Exploration & Scaling
 * While Yann manages our core Paid Social (Meta), your job is to overview Yann’s work and identify the next winning acquisition channels to maximize Profitability and Volume (ROI/ROAS).
 * You are the "Client" of the Content Factory. You analyze ad performance, provide data-backed briefs to the Content Strategist and identify winning angles quickly to scale them aggressively.
 * Growth Loops
 * Design and optimize growth loops (product, retention, referral, content → product → content)
 * Diagnose growth across acquisition, activation, sales alignment, retention, and expansion
 * Identify where growth is constrained and why
 * "Player-Coach" Leadership
 * You manage the Growth team (Paid, Copy, Web, PMM) by showing them the standard of excellence. You are their sparring partner for strategy, copy angles, and technical execution.
 * You’re responsible to build your team by sourcing talents, to manage them, to train them and to stop with them while necessary.
 * Sales Alignment & Revenue Quality
 * Your metric isn't just "Leads generated", it's "Appointments held" and "Deals closed". You set up a tight feedback loop with the Sales Team Lead to adjust targeting based on lead quality.
 * You prioritize High-Intent leads over cheap volume. You stop campaigns that bring tire-kickers, even if the CPL is low.
   
   

Tools you’ll master:

GA4, Optibase, Wefblow, Vidalytics, Clarity, Hotjar, Amplitude, Figma, Looker Studio, VWO, Optimizely, and whatever helps you see what others miss.

You’ll own KPIs :


 * LTV / CAC ratio
 * Funnel conversion rates by stage
 * X experiments launched per week
   
   

Desired Outcomes


 * Conversion Rates 2× better than baseline
 * Growth experimentation runs continuously
 * A Predictable Growth Engine
   
   

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Experience


 * You have ideally a minimum of 3 years of experience in Conversion Rate Optimization, Growth Experimentation, or Performance Marketing, ideally within SaaS, e-commerce, or digital product environments.
 * You have a track record of designing, implementing, and scaling A/B and multivariate tests that have generated measurable improvements in revenue, user activation, or conversion.
   
   

Competencies


 * Growth Diagnosis & System Thinking
 * Persuasion & Behavioral Insight
 * Analytical
   
   

Personality


 * Curiosity: You relentlessly dig into why users behave the way they do until you uncover the insight behind the data.
 * Hands-On Execution
 * Precision: You care about clarity in hypotheses, clean data, and unambiguous results.
 * Agility: You move fast, adapt instantly to new findings, and turn insights into tests within hours, not weeks.
   
   

Language

French: Native / Bilingual

English: Fluent English, you can hold a conversation on specific details with English-speaking colleagues.

Our chosen language for written communication is English.

IT MIGHT NOT BE FOR YOU

❌ If you need clarity before chaos — wrong place.

❌ If you prefer balance over intensity — wrong season.

❌ If you build to deliver, not to elevate — wrong mission.

❌ If you want to optimize without getting your hands dirty in Webflow, copy, or design — wrong role.

WHY JOIN US ❤️

Help us market a product that fuses neuroscience, design, and AI to reinvent how humans grow.

Work with filmmakers, psychologists, engineers, and creatives obsessed with impact.

In the heart of our headquarters stands the 100 000 Dreams Wall,

Every photo on that wall is a life rewritten:

“I ran a marathon.”

“I started my company.”

“I found peace with my father.”

You will play a crucial role in the development of an Iconic Product.

Growth & Ambition


 * > 🏅Being surrounded by A-players who strive to perform
   
   

Impact & Meaning


 * > Playing a crucial role in the development of a company whose content and products will be used by millions of people
 * > Waking up in the morning feeling like you are making a difference is something!
   
   

We receive messages every day from clients who have successfully lost weight, quit smoking, reach a milestone in their business, built better relationships, and made positive changes in their lives.


 * > ❤️ Contributing to the Paradox Foundation (our non-profit), dedicated to empower teenagers
   
   

But that's not all, we believe that driven people deserve…

Freedom & Well Being 🗽


 * > 😎A company culture based on autonomy & accountability
 * > 🗽Flexible working hours
 * > 🌎A remote culture from day one with the freedom to work from wherever you want
 * > 🏤Magnificent office in Dubai, Paris, Lisbon - it feels like home :)
 * > 💻Work on Mac, for us it counts :)
 * > 🏀350€ per year paid by the company to take care of yourself ( for your gym, or dance class or whatever make you feel great)
 * > 📚150€ of books or education - At Paradox, we are learner lovers and we want to support you in that
 * > 🔥6 1:1coachings - A Paradox Coach supporting you on anything personal or professional, we want you to live your best life
   
   

HIRING PROCESS 📃

📃 A 6 to 8 minutes application survey.

💻 A 15-30 minutes video call with Timy, our HR, to assess the fit between the position, the company, and your own career path.

💻 A video-call focused on your career with Quentin, VP Marketing, to review your background & see how we can match your desires with our needs.

💻 A culture-fit video call to check in depth the alignment between you and our values and culture.

💼 Reference calls to get in-depth insights about how you work in different environments, make your onboarding easier, and give everybody on the team the insurance to be surrounded by A-Players.

🤗 Welcome aboard!

If you’re not joining to tweak landing pages.

If you’re here to engineer behavioral change at scale, for millions.

Welcome to Paradox.

Let’s build the Operating System for Greatness.

title: Associate Director Clinical Operations
description:
